subject: It’s already June???

body:
It’s finally June, team! And that means the countdown to Election Day on the 25th is officially on.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=a901d2590a984c59911c95936bedf67c&_e=XS7Kdl2v6mXY0DBPl-4wm7RN52qv8P-y26ET-fwpn14Z99bshtwl7flZ7OJGBOQTnYUpscT58T68EEYQX5EsbFB7N4gwfnbasSZwedpee4nGiHeK0GbUQraDXaJ6j8Xg6dBUnrZu7-iCoCLBvsF48uEfrPkoQxahGOvhrnKyoMczT67jwL1CVCprfDgqIfhTNhHHI6yuxgqT6eNxIFSsLZ3JdLDeae6RgQT_6GQ41i2hFo1XjhhnhO7dVKQnJNjsM5n4rw5s5U8stDU2HyqOIFCeiJ4EsODI_VWtiWJxvKW4bBc-PJ0d3jEMDkJoD45Au74WmvDnPG6W0tb4JK2k2eR4YuRdAj4K12mODIe7U3lL29ma86ZsjI00NIa2HkEmbp1Gfg83rIaGQhnYdeaeaw%3D%3D) It’s finally June, team! And that means the countdown to Election Day on the 25th is officially on. This year has felt like it’s FLOWN by. I can’t believe we’re finally into June. I already know we’re in a great spot to win this race because of how strongly y’all showed up for my campaign last month. It was truly unbelievable, and I can’t wait to see what we can accomplish over the next 24 days. I feel so grateful to have such a great team around me and I am honored to have so many amazing supporters on my side just like you. Because the truth is, no matter how hard I work or how great my team is, none of this becomes possible without you. We’re going to win this race. I can’t wait to do it together. Very best,
John [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=a901d2590a984c59911c95936bedf67c&_e=XS7Kdl2v6mXY0DBPl-4wm7RN52qv8P-y26ET-fwpn14Z99bshtwl7flZ7OJGBOQTnYUpscT58T68EEYQX5EsbFB7N4gwfnbasSZwedpee4nGiHeK0GbUQraDXaJ6j8Xg6dBUnrZu7-iCoCLBvsF48uEfrPkoQxahGOvhrnKyoMczT67jwL1CVCprfDgqIfhTNhHHI6yuxgqT6eNxIFSsLZ3JdLDeae6RgQT_6GQ41i2hFo1XjhhnhO7dVKQnJNjs8tWi-wSyDSDr8H6LFRpHjOnCWX8l2Eapi5bgAuR5UegssXyMwkSDjuW8HjySqpQq8XtgmDYbw83Z5lF_BoCdPPg6LhJdroPjSZ9LNRPoeMgd8jDKl_lbhZVt9clhu8s5q57tMfUHpFOhNptfmjXAEA%3D%3D) I'm John Padora, a Democrat running for Congress in CD-04. Lauren Boebert recently jumped into my district in a desperate attempt to stay in DC. My campaign is powered by grassroots donations - donate anything you can monthly to keep Boebert OUT of this seat. Here’s what you _need to know now:_

**WORSE:** MAGA Judge Aileen Cannon gave Trump a HUGE victory by delaying his trial indefinitely, _boosting his chances of seizing the White House _again.__

**EVEN WORSE:** Her attacks are far from over — she just scheduled a hearing to investigate the “unlawful appointment” of Special Counsel Jack Smith.

**THE WORST OF ALL:** Cannon has faced ZERO accountability for her blatant bias, corruption, and far-right extremism. **It’s DISGRACEFUL!**
[**We refuse to stand idly by. Join 999 Democrats in signing our urgent petition DEMANDING Judge Cannon be removed from office immediately! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cannon_pet/?source=VPP_20240601_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=14942%2E878179%2EtEliuS)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Not A Dime In Corporate Donations.
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us21.campaign-archive.com/?e=5d7e9a146c&u=98998055a4d4c8cdda41af3ea&id=9a3ff1372c)
---
|
# A message from Ro Khanna:

In less than 13 days, South Carolina primary voters will head to the polls. We need to make sure they pick Mal Hyman, a common-sense progressive, for Congress. There’s just one problem: Like me, Mal has pledged not to take a dime of corporate donations. That means he depends on grassroots donors like you and me to fuel his campaign to victory.
Let me tell you why I’m proud to support Mal for Congress. [But first, can you rush a donation to his campaign so he has the resources to win his primary?](https://malhyman.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=98998055a4d4c8cdda41af3ea&id=6b1cb2f481&e=5d7e9a146c)
---
|
Mal Hyman has been there and done it. He spent his career as an educator, teaching in public schools, men’s prisons, and for three decades at Coker University in Hartsville. He is ready to fight to ensure working families get a fair shake in Washington. That means fighting for:
* A living wage;
* Healthcare as a human right;
* Access to abortion;
* Quality, affordable childcare;
* Strengthening Social Security;
* A safe and clean environment;
* And more.

We need progressive champions like Mal in Congress who will prioritize working families and everyday Americans over special interests. But we can’t do it without your help.
[Will you split a donation between our campaigns right now and help send Mal to Washington?](https://malhyman.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=98998055a4d4c8cdda41af3ea&id=6a692c9e05&e=5d7e9a146c)
---
[Donate Now](https://malhyman.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=98998055a4d4c8cdda41af3ea&id=09da7230a0&e=5d7e9a146c)
| Thank you for your support, activism, and all you do. In solidarity,Ro
---
|
---
| | | | | |
---|---|---
| | |
---

Our mailing address is:
Mal Hyman for Congress 309 Deerwood Dr Hartsville, SC 29550-4821 USA

You can [update your preferences](https://malhyman.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=98998055a4d4c8cdda41af3ea&id=a3ae0b476d&e=5d7e9a146c&c=9a3ff1372c) or [unsubscribe](https://malhyman.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=98998055a4d4c8cdda41af3ea&id=a3ae0b476d&t=b&e=5d7e9a146c&c=9a3ff1372c)

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: this could happen any day now
body:
These could be the biggest decisions since Roe was reversed...
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

Right now, there are _MULTIPLE_ major abortion-related cases that the Supreme Court could rule on any day, including:

**• _FDA v. Alliance for Hippocratic Medicine_** and **_Danco Laboratories v. Alliance for Hippocratic Medicine_** – where President Biden and his FDA are trying to keep deadly Chemical Abortion Pills on the market despite the FDA recklessly approving them back in 2000; and

**• _Idaho v. United States_** and **_Moyle v. United States_** – where the Biden Administration is attempting to use the _Emergency Medical Treatment and Active Labor Act_ (EMTALA) to FORCE all emergency room doctors in EVERY state to commit abortions!
[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gqwdy-duchtdja-y/) Depending on the Supreme Court’s rulings on these cases, they could change the future of Life in America as we know it . . .

Which is why _Students for Life Action’s_ **_SCOTUS Squad_** – _a deployment team composed of dozens of enthusiastic, young pro-lifers_ – must be on the steps of the Supreme Court the moment the rulings go public.

But with the Supreme Court set to make their decisions on these cases any day now, I need to have the resources on hand to be able to get them there at the drop of a hat!

**[So, would you please consider making your most generous contribution towards our SCOTUS SQUAD right away to help me make sure they have everything they need to counter the pro-abortion mob at the Supreme Court](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gqwdy-duchtdja-j/)?**

Any time the U.S. Supreme Court takes up an abortion-related case, it’s a news and PR madhouse in Washington, D.C.

Which is why it is so crucial that _Students for Life Action’s_ **_SCOTUS Squad_** is there immediately when these decisions are finally made.

We can’t let the Abortion Lobby steal the national spotlight . . . _Not with the November elections right around the corner._

And we certainly can’t let them use their intimidation tactics on the Supreme Court to try and make them cave to their demands.

Pro-Life Friend, you and I both know the Abortion Lobby would love nothing more than to overrun Capitol Hill with a pro-abortion mob to try and force the Supreme Court into making a pro-abortion decision that they’re happy with.

Thanks to our **_SCOTUS Squad’s_** efforts, they haven’t been able to do that.

But their failure has only made them become more radical . . .

They’ve utilized tactics akin to those of actual terrorists, such as riots and mob intimidation, firebombing Pregnancy Resource Centers, and even committing brutal violence against pro-lifers!

We saw some of the worst of this when _Roe v. Wade_ was reversed.

They even sent their goons to several of the Supreme Court Justices HOUSES to intimidate their families – _which is illegal by the way!_

**One person even intended to assassinate Justice Brett Kavanaugh . . .**

And since President Biden’s Department of Justice (DOJ) is always quick to overlook the extremism of pro-abortion whack jobs, if the Supreme Court makes the pro-life ruling, there will be almost nothing standing between them and the Supreme Court.

Nothing except our **_SCOTUS Squad_ ,** that is . . .

These brave young women and men are putting themselves on the line for the sake of justice, and even risking their safety for the lives of the preborn.

But they can’t do it alone.

**[So, will you please consider a generous contribution of $250, $100, $75, or $50 right away to help our SCOTUS SQUAD stand strong in the face of pure evil](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gqwdy-duchtdja-i/)?**

**[Even a gift of just $25 or $10 will go a long way with the future of Life in America hanging in the balance with these Supreme Court cases](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gqwdy-duchtdja-d/).**

Thank you for everything you do for Life.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

[update preferences](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.updatemyprofile.com/j-gqwdy-026154D2-duchtdja-h) | [unsubscribe](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-u-gqwdy-duchtdja-k/)
**

**
---

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgl9qe0ctue7djthe4a5cnoqekdtbbl3vd9e7h30_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cph60or6c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuoutmo4pc4dtei0bp657gfsf796hus2s8de09u8_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cph60or6c9h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ziet4j3p433ref938v24qgn1ab4iun5etforntp8_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cph60or6c9h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zclmfebe7ilpip9npss7ldrrmlcdkqmdnui5abk8_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cph60or6c9h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

ICYMI News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

body:

And it gets worse... We fell short right after the news broke of a Liberal Super PAC unleashing 100 million dollars to destroy our Pro-Trump House Majority.

This is an emergency at the worst possible time.

_We can 't hand power over to the Radical Democrats who just convicted President Trump! _

If there's any hope to defeat them, we need your help right now. Because if not enough American Patriots step up, we'll be forced to:

>>> SLASH our voter contact budgets
>>> PULL our ads off the airwaves
>>> TURN OFF fundraising efforts in some key districts
>>> CUT BACK doorknocking schedules
>>> And END critical get-out-the-vote operations

The repercussions of doing so cannot be overstated. If we fall any further behind, we might as well say GOODBYE to our Pro-Trump House Majority.

The difference between delivering a strong House Majority for President Trump and a COMPLETE DEMOCRAT TAKEOVER comes down to this. If we keep missing deadlines, we're cooked!

name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zla1tne1tf4bkgurc494v8nc756cirjtacecfvbo_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cph64ob7chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0rvuih3f9vse0nlcahktqqvudr1gde9e95m4h40_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cph64ob7chh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsdhvmgjsl8v7u09gqukmck9rmprk1qqanfvahro_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cph64ob7chh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbvlrs64ekfa8nrtv6h1q834bi89urv1g0cndkc0_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cph64ob7chh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Trump Train News

body:
And it gets worse...

| |

| | | This needs your attention immediately: **We just missed our FIRST fundraising deadline since Trump 's sham conviction!**

And it gets worse... We fell short right after the news broke of a Liberal Super PAC unleashing 100 million dollars to destroy our Pro-Trump House Majority.

This is an emergency at the worst possible time.

_**[We desperately need all Patriots to pitch in AT LEAST $15 to get back on track and save our Pro-Trump Majority.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5djhhij103rvmg6sgvjae7mdst5nksav7lg56r0_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cph62oj2cjh2bs "We desperately need all Patriots to pitch in AT LEAST $15 to get back on track and save our Pro-Trump Majority.")**_ Our May deadline has come and gone and we fell JUST SHORT of our fundraising goal.

_We can 't hand power over to the Radical Democrats who just convicted President Trump! _

If there's any hope to defeat them, we need your help right now. Because if not enough American Patriots step up, we'll be forced to:

>>> SLASH our voter contact budgets
>>> PULL our ads off the airwaves
>>> TURN OFF fundraising efforts in some key districts
>>> CUT BACK doorknocking schedules
>>> And END critical get-out-the-vote operations

The repercussions of doing so cannot be overstated. If we fall any further behind, we might as well say GOODBYE to our Pro-Trump House Majority.

---
The difference between delivering a strong House Majority for President Trump and a COMPLETE DEMOCRAT TAKEOVER comes down to this. If we keep missing deadlines, we're cooked!

_**[Can we count on you to step up and meet the moment?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsqribm2a302vv7ehgvpfm2gibrojoeko5s2jpoo_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cph62oj2cjh2bs "Can we count on you to step up and meet the moment?")**_

We hope so...

- House GOP

This is very important to me.

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvbllg4ukfec1v1n0h3dc1354tis49jgqobli5g8_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cph62oj2c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvb5lidv7a9uak0hmd1sjqk909mhclh4v51b5kc0_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cph62oj2c1h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zchhp1i8ac5fh0i4q52240otvfqj1id1jbfjmnq8_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cph62oj2c1h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdi2jl7chtqda50or15ku7k3smj32ocsbs47lt9g_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cph62oj2c1h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrnb8a0p0m1djpv7dv6824s4847k5gu9ulhll6to_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cph62oj2c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c9ge6pb2cph2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeik59ijsceu3ig5uiaqn91bj3gc42peoahb1a90_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cph62oj2c1h2bs)_

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z670e6a0831hovqkb42prfsi6idv5o38fptvms1o_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cph66o31cdh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWukfR8WNB
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWukfR8WNB

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Do you
think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College
works and its role in preserving free and representative
government?
YES
NO

Dear
Fellow American,

I am
enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will
only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our
nation's future.

A
movement is growing, led by progressives-but supported by many
well-meaning Americans-to change the way we elect our president.
In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as
devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's
why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on
Presidential Selection.

By
completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as
possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand
the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue-views we
will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can
complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using
the link below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63240254:WukfR8WNB:m:3:2532013465:913852229F62CE054781536610A08D07:r

Please
represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential
Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention-and for
your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm
regards,

Larry P.
Arnn

Pursuing
Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

The man accused of killing Georgia nursing student Laken Riley pled
not guilty during an arraignment hearing on Friday. Jose Ibarra, a
Venezuelan national living unlawfully in the United States, pled not
guilty to charges that he killed Riley during his arraignment hearing
in a Clarke County courtroom, according to local reporters on the
scene.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
You are an informed citizen—I believe that wholeheartedly.

| | | This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yJgHa3iGdqpzCJPW-qAJ1w~~/AARclAA~)
---
| | Good day, fellow American. You are an informed citizen—I believe that wholeheartedly. You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren’t afraid to stand up for America’s founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation. _**[Your leadership and knowledge are needed today...](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yJgHa3iGdqpzCJPW-qAJ1w~~/AARclAA~)_**

## Do you believe it is important for Americans to have basic knowledge of American history and civics, including knowledge about the Constitution?
[Yes](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yJgHa3iGdqpzCJPW-qAJ1w~~/AARclAA~) [No](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yJgHa3iGdqpzCJPW-qAJ1w~~/AARclAA~) [Not Sure / Don't Know](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yJgHa3iGdqpzCJPW-qAJ1w~~/AARclAA~)
We need more citizens like you— _informed citizens_ —because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism. The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can’t let that happen! That’s why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our nationwide initiative—the **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS**. We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand
* WHAT the Constitution says;
* HOW it relates to current issues and events; and
* WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty.

If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed. These are young people that “educators” deliberately deceived or who just haven’t learned about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable.** That’s because we’re seeking _1,000 people_ in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to _10,000,000 Americans_ , and this initiative starts with you—YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what’s best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education** today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email! [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yJgHa3iGdqpzCJPW-qAJ1w~~/AARclAA~) For our children, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

Conservative Broadcast
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-2e8FztFOuiACbqXIeTsrA~~/AARclAA~/RgRoPtgmP0RwaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQuY29uc2VydmF0aXZlYnJvYWRjYXN0LmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1Db25zZXJ2YXRpdmUtQnJvYWRjYXN0LU9mZmVycyZlPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclMjU0MGdtYWlsLmNvbVcDc3BjQgpmVdJAXGYF0iyaUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/oLOde1gLTrxZph6H-4zT4w~~/AARclAA~/RgRoPtgmP0QuaHR0cHM6Ly9jb25zZXJ2YXRpdmVicm9hZGNhc3QuY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpmVdJAXGYF0iyaUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

These are young people that “educators” deliberately deceived or who just haven’t learned about a proper understanding of American history in school. You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable. That’s because we’re seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to 10,000,000 Americans , and this initiative starts with you—YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what’s best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the National Survey on the State of American Education** today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email! ~~ For our children, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~

body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fa9ec19c894349b9a86c38f0ea5e9496&_e=R_8xS-bEiA76h-3F2N10FzsiAHObCwZXr4moi0dm9i9UB-1c5l6g_NZS9XMksmALjJRfzJDqE6u-6u7mcTuyNG5_4xq-ZLg2CCr9BAFg09j18pKTcXuanAMFZqLGO7qNTXPvTP_7YW-0MR6vn3rOYk_1TJtrZhJowUMU8NhiziVDSGqkjLENsYvFOhfRYIo35u3cBe5EQXW9ikXH9am0wLxfxkYdAHkw_oDk5v2JsN5RBaRdwr5S60WLz4mdTrUVQ8ciXiKBpjlHAr3W6nHKW7tt91q8PLZOm04QYDyaRuBcRqDihbYHojpzQGUMsoDfkxQgf66rf8P6Y50vFdpKnJB__SGZlffxHavssV34LZQyc-4gjz70d8XeF7d3J4piA534De8coqzDYb0NLZGiuoVYTWcgK1ZjiJtu3ftLLt-NbZOS2n7ek_ll_j1JUHIk)

| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fa9ec19c894349b9a86c38f0ea5e9496&_e=R_8xS-bEiA76h-3F2N10FzsiAHObCwZXr4moi0dm9i9UB-1c5l6g_NZS9XMksmALjJRfzJDqE6u-6u7mcTuyNG5_4xq-ZLg2CCr9BAFg09j18pKTcXuanAMFZqLGO7qNTXPvTP_7YW-0MR6vn3rOYk_1TJtrZhJowUMU8NhiziVDSGqkjLENsYvFOhfRYIo35u3cBe5EQXW9ikXH9am0wLxfxkYdAHkw_oDk5v2JsN5RBaRdwr5S60WLz4mdTrUVQ8ciXiKBpjlHAr3W6nHKW7tt91q8PLZOm04QYDyaRuCStlgHYWFHpCkoGPyas4_Axv48uIaQ7DZh0_FUrf7XpzHa-cJBPzb0Vg_lydDsNfAFB7d7oK4IYKGmmxd9GGX611-CVQu-Bw7t0WQskS4UKkn38B_b6vZrbslmgwYVJL-Hd_cHL0Ts3w5LFmsqXI5a)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fa9ec19c894349b9a86c38f0ea5e9496&_e=R_8xS-bEiA76h-3F2N10FzsiAHObCwZXr4moi0dm9i9UB-1c5l6g_NZS9XMksmALjJRfzJDqE6u-6u7mcTuyNG5_4xq-ZLg2CCr9BAFg09j18pKTcXuanAMFZqLGO7qNTXPvTP_7YW-0MR6vn3rOYk_1TJtrZhJowUMU8NhiziVDSGqkjLENsYvFOhfRYIo35u3cBe5EQXW9ikXH9am0wLxfxkYdAHkw_oDk5v2JsN5RBaRdwr5S60WLz4mdTrUVQ8ciXiKBpjlHAr3W6nHKW7tt91q8PLZOm04QYDyaRuDfewauqYfyOMxYMKAWBoFRwe5AMKfPWVq54n0Ih3XRImaxAMn1di0ovDq-yJii0zlAocWeNsMpy2x8v0tVBOBmSCw3VZaB9TdGO4-5u2XXVQczzgqfkac6-Vxx00D4dJTLGpM_Qo8XDkUAKkLK8EYz)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fa9ec19c894349b9a86c38f0ea5e9496&_e=R_8xS-bEiA76h-3F2N10FzsiAHObCwZXr4moi0dm9i9UB-1c5l6g_NZS9XMksmALjJRfzJDqE6u-6u7mcTuyNG5_4xq-ZLg2CCr9BAFg09j18pKTcXuanAMFZqLGO7qNTXPvTP_7YW-0MR6vn3rOYk_1TJtrZhJowUMU8NhiziVDSGqkjLENsYvFOhfRYIo35u3cBe5EQXW9ikXH9am0wLxfxkYdAHkw_oDk5v2JsN5RBaRdwr5S60WLz4mdTrUVQ8ciXiKBpjlHAr3W6nHKW7tt91q8PLZOm04QYDyaRuAsBOl6DEEHCN5CkN4rg2HC3WqJAo7Rk6wtbpued78rggFHkv9Gxtxw6j9SPBSvNPYhat9jQcVbozMWdjdpivcG9WhRSGUsm_FzuMLy0ZnpZH2Zvzyjh8hap90oUko5dLeGo7W65aT4b9z1ru1DYX8n).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6c10d748ff144c2b437e0dc0ce93cab&_e=yIG3iDAX2CWVQrWg32BMdtzjR_LIVLR6fEtQOK6wIGvprNLsdM4TpNXAvu4KtU-uSCNwyIbkno7FPgQeHjTgrXPTWmNAi45W4eXUlcW6IS3NhdY8QJWbW7A6q1wX8c0a2M3hyVuVIGuhGgh1UwWqTUHPUipAb2NVQmSQht9vj1ZgEcyVo-YPoAeaDszCPo2XNV07NOH-_IWSu3E0zN58k_Tz68FsGpRlI9OiH7JugrbCH45AMy8O4WEK6n040ynavb2vOt4ep6olByrY3FJcOaePSn-QWHtl0ZRdwjEpdllJM3W8gjrmo2N0X4gh6aGmlOf37VN6SkrT0evMZuDpA9QiiWdKT1OfADzfllV7-RrHaRO-EaEhfXmOgIfHwFaxI1vCfSWpaFQ7rovSywG1y-RuMaBu8b9jzf-Db88HKmhAJIZgBgscpLX0eq38zvVp)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6c10d748ff144c2b437e0dc0ce93cab&_e=yIG3iDAX2CWVQrWg32BMdtzjR_LIVLR6fEtQOK6wIGvprNLsdM4TpNXAvu4KtU-uSCNwyIbkno7FPgQeHjTgrXPTWmNAi45W4eXUlcW6IS3NhdY8QJWbW7A6q1wX8c0a2M3hyVuVIGuhGgh1UwWqTUHPUipAb2NVQmSQht9vj1ZgEcyVo-YPoAeaDszCPo2XNV07NOH-_IWSu3E0zN58k_Tz68FsGpRlI9OiH7JugrbCH45AMy8O4WEK6n040ynavb2vOt4ep6olByrY3FJcOaePSn-QWHtl0ZRdwjEpdllajWtu3j7w0n1JI49wRrZKn7M7aKPo1a4tZVq7kJolN09Tl00nt9kefF_Rip_YYMUGmBuDAgmp_0uahAd9Sy-ZxeEjGaOqvKytCPtgPsIb5cp7KssoEYavtLKdhYNWKlkfCaF_ks5y01jM0KMDWfkL)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6c10d748ff144c2b437e0dc0ce93cab&_e=yIG3iDAX2CWVQrWg32BMdtzjR_LIVLR6fEtQOK6wIGvprNLsdM4TpNXAvu4KtU-uSCNwyIbkno7FPgQeHjTgrXPTWmNAi45W4eXUlcW6IS3NhdY8QJWbW7A6q1wX8c0a2M3hyVuVIGuhGgh1UwWqTUHPUipAb2NVQmSQht9vj1ZgEcyVo-YPoAeaDszCPo2XNV07NOH-_IWSu3E0zN58k_Tz68FsGpRlI9OiH7JugrbCH45AMy8O4WEK6n040ynavb2vOt4ep6olByrY3FJcOaePSn-QWHtl0ZRdwjEpdlnlDFpVFY-kX_L-YpJB8ZcJ-kIXKmQTn2kqttEp4t_uPkRgED2J6sqMRp9h6h_4zDcUzS_3QtQZDwkKRwB1iDMWPn3bD0v3gEBiunYqgCNvo19-KbXnbK_T2PvoaMivBVi5bBjE4jGGs-Oy4Tz6aBr6)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99d6b384c7504d42b221f9ee0d7f421b&_e=wUuaSYmw_IT5LESvPJZOaOqxhSnHIdEv1Mrsa_Y6h0juHpA43i1LI-WbfNHOZJBi2qLt-CswbP0EzLXlW-ITB8DzzcVvDbo0gWJAH5buTxrR8AW6yWy4Ae0kLjviU_ZCIyHFARb0GxS5P5q1_2x5fAcsVHAYPF17dysxwJa1DBBPzsEha6SsGCFuxxCGLv5g3anvFhB_CHSmEpSeGN5dAyx3p-DdRGdmQ6AO1P3cg9UkkbEsz5e5RbtXQBP6WvgBDq7UFRGEgGq1xPBsGi893b5ahTzpEW3oOSYScHV8ho6Y7wcqg2Qcb05yXaVjcfdNJvMu0Pc8UMh7-99hEvIqLVrAc-HKmTRTrbaKBU6AILF6FrB6L4tv78WILLfwoBJs-TuinqcgP26e91YGH7-bl5WvQTT_bMM-cwknKt-rZQ0FVK_HqhsizFriOq4WYWT9)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99d6b384c7504d42b221f9ee0d7f421b&_e=wUuaSYmw_IT5LESvPJZOaOqxhSnHIdEv1Mrsa_Y6h0juHpA43i1LI-WbfNHOZJBi2qLt-CswbP0EzLXlW-ITB8DzzcVvDbo0gWJAH5buTxrR8AW6yWy4Ae0kLjviU_ZCIyHFARb0GxS5P5q1_2x5fAcsVHAYPF17dysxwJa1DBBPzsEha6SsGCFuxxCGLv5g3anvFhB_CHSmEpSeGN5dAyx3p-DdRGdmQ6AO1P3cg9UkkbEsz5e5RbtXQBP6WvgBDq7UFRGEgGq1xPBsGi893b5ahTzpEW3oOSYScHV8ho6Jo-yzn4WwfDJvmlSw4N_zXshPh5hDsf6ijBY_hdQPc5tMPxXqsq4Csq-vOuSVWKo73sThrGzJswXNkcn_UXHnDa_6uQzHuC4iZK6Kl123Hp1XY82MMp4chcq7MpOrtEaNX3UhvSsySFzctrNaRF8h)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99d6b384c7504d42b221f9ee0d7f421b&_e=wUuaSYmw_IT5LESvPJZOaOqxhSnHIdEv1Mrsa_Y6h0juHpA43i1LI-WbfNHOZJBi2qLt-CswbP0EzLXlW-ITB8DzzcVvDbo0gWJAH5buTxrR8AW6yWy4Ae0kLjviU_ZCIyHFARb0GxS5P5q1_2x5fAcsVHAYPF17dysxwJa1DBBPzsEha6SsGCFuxxCGLv5g3anvFhB_CHSmEpSeGN5dAyx3p-DdRGdmQ6AO1P3cg9UkkbEsz5e5RbtXQBP6WvgBDq7UFRGEgGq1xPBsGi893b5ahTzpEW3oOSYScHV8ho4pHSuT-uKaLUcoE6XfFWXxRY_amZvZwfPr2yu2MHRozJleclED_3CPtI_UNwfe1RoFILVnWJt_MG7fjKzmwzYUZNl0SDsfb6_uB0CjPgoy0mhp4S288dlq2gM32o_TwH04HJ5vGS9FgRuQD17qvpHI)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99d6b384c7504d42b221f9ee0d7f421b&_e=wUuaSYmw_IT5LESvPJZOaOqxhSnHIdEv1Mrsa_Y6h0juHpA43i1LI-WbfNHOZJBi2qLt-CswbP0EzLXlW-ITB8DzzcVvDbo0gWJAH5buTxrR8AW6yWy4Ae0kLjviU_ZCIyHFARb0GxS5P5q1_2x5fAcsVHAYPF17dysxwJa1DBBPzsEha6SsGCFuxxCGLv5g3anvFhB_CHSmEpSeGN5dAyx3p-DdRGdmQ6AO1P3cg9UkkbEsz5e5RbtXQBP6WvgBDq7UFRGEgGq1xPBsGi893b5ahTzpEW3oOSYScHV8ho6fFyfDZXvpVIop3kAIWk5CAzf1zZqZgZjA6GBObuXiKvY7ElDccelH6ggTlyNNxjNA6VEa64akBm3E6D-PyOW7pUH2ZILyvjr_z6YOds_9vr7ChCiSOvuPMNj-3R4jcJ0rC4ukmVSdC7EWXBymoUB9).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Sarah DeValkenaere
subject: In prison for saving a life
body:
Dear Friend,

I wish I could sit down with you face to face instead of writing this e-mail.

I wish I could sit down with you face to face instead of writing this e-mail.
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/5uNkvJSXx1CfTm_H-67QsA~~/AARclAA~/RgRoPuY2P0STaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi9kMjZlYWUzMS04ZWVhLTQxYTktODI3OC1hYmNhMTE1YzhkNzA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwNjAyX0JER19MRUxERl9TRDJfUkVOX1BBLUNCVwNzcGNCCmZVHE5cZjNUHwlSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
That's a picture of me and my husband, Eric, so you at least know what we look like.

Eric is a Detective with the Kansas City Police Department.

I wanted to send a picture of us with our three beautiful children - but in this current political climate, I don't feel safe sharing photos of our kids on the Internet.

When I tell you what happened, I think you'll understand. **[And I pray that you'll find it in your heart to help me save my husband.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/5uNkvJSXx1CfTm_H-67QsA~~/AARclAA~/RgRoPuY2P0STaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi9kMjZlYWUzMS04ZWVhLTQxYTktODI3OC1hYmNhMTE1YzhkNzA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwNjAyX0JER19MRUxERl9TRDJfUkVOX1BBLUNCVwNzcGNCCmZVHE5cZjNUHwlSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

You see, it all started in early December - a few weeks before Christmas.

One of Eric's fellow detectives witnessed two vehicles speeding through the city streets - one was clearly chasing the other - and the police helicopter quickly got involved. A spotter in the helicopter was able to locate the suspect in a red pickup truck... still speeding down city streets.

The driver, 26-year-old Cameron Lamb, was chasing his ex-girlfriend in a stolen truck - weaving across lanes and running through stoplights.

My husband and his partner responded to the call and caught up with the suspect as he attempted to back the stolen truck into a garage.

Both detectives got out of their police vehicles and approached the stolen truck while repeatedly ordering the suspect to STOP and SHOW HIS HANDS.

That's when it happened.

**As Eric 's partner approached the driver's side, the suspect reached into his waistband and pulled out a handgun - pointing it directly at the detective.**

**My husband 's police training kicked in.**

He fired four rounds in the direction of the suspect through the truck's front windshield. The truck continued traveling into the garage where it finally came to a stop.

When officers entered, they found the suspect deceased - his arm hanging out the open window with a .45 semi-automatic pistol on the ground below.

That night, when Eric returned home, I hugged him and burst into tears. I was so thankful he was safe - and hopeful we could move forward and put this episode behind us.

But it didn't end there.

Several months later, the local prosecutor _charged Eric with MANSLAUGHTER and Armed Criminal Action._

I was in shock.

Then late last year, my husband finally went to trial. The judge ruled against him - and Eric was sentenced to 6 years in prison.

Now you understand why I'm asking for your help.

My husband is an honest man of integrity who followed in his father's law enforcement footsteps. Eric himself is a decorated, 21-year veteran of the Kansas City Police Department.

He's a role model in our community - a Little League baseball coach, a tireless volunteer, and a loving husband and father.

My husband is a hero.

But it didn't matter to the prosecutor that the suspect recklessly swerved a stolen truck through city streets... that he was violent toward his ex-girlfriend and endangered the lives of her two children... that he pointed a stolen gun directly at a police officer.

For serving our community for over 20 years - and risking his life - my has been shipped to an out-of-state prison.

And since the Missouri Supreme Court recently declined to take up Eric's case, that's where he'll stay for the next six years unless he receives a pardon from the Governor of Missouri. He'll miss our wedding anniversaries, our children's birthdays, their graduations(?), and our home will be left without the father and husband we love.

Even if Eric's good name is eventually cleared, just thinking about the cost of his defense and now our efforts to get him pardoned is overwhelming...

... but thank God we got a call from Jason Johnson, President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF).

If you've ever heard of LELDF you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly accused police officers like Eric.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops - and their families - at their lowest moments.

And with the thought of trying to suddenly raise our three children alone - I was certainly at one of the lowest moments of my life.

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help provide Eric with the best possible legal defense, but now they're helping us launch a nationwide petition campaign urging Missouri Governor Mike Parson to pardon Eric.

But as a non-profit organization, they depend solely on generous gifts from folks like you to defend officers like Eric.

I truly believe God is using Jason and the LELDF to answer our prayers.

That's because my husband and I are not wealthy people. I'm a kindergarten teacher and Eric is a career cop.

So I must ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone.

**Will you donate[$35 or any amount to LELDF today to help save my husband?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/5uNkvJSXx1CfTm_H-67QsA~~/AARclAA~/RgRoPuY2P0STaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi9kMjZlYWUzMS04ZWVhLTQxYTktODI3OC1hYmNhMTE1YzhkNzA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwNjAyX0JER19MRUxERl9TRDJfUkVOX1BBLUNCVwNzcGNCCmZVHE5cZjNUHwlSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I am so scared for Eric and I will do whatever I can for him - and for our children.

**[So I pray you'll find it in your heart today to make a tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100 or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/5uNkvJSXx1CfTm_H-67QsA~~/AARclAA~/RgRoPuY2P0STaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi9kMjZlYWUzMS04ZWVhLTQxYTktODI3OC1hYmNhMTE1YzhkNzA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwNjAyX0JER19MRUxERl9TRDJfUkVOX1BBLUNCVwNzcGNCCmZVHE5cZjNUHwlSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

Eric and I - and our three kids - are counting on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you to help bring Eric home where he belongs.

No matter what you're able to give today, please pray for us. Thank you in advance for your support.

Sincerely,

Sarah DeValkenaere

P.S. The Missouri Supreme Court has declined to take Eric's case. Now a pardon is one of the last remaining options to bring Eric home. We're feverishly trying to raise the money to pay for a massive petition drive urging the Missouri Governor Mike Parson to pardon Eric. I know my husband is innocent. But it's so hard to be a cop these days. The 'defund the police' movement has wiped out the support officers like Eric need to do their jobs.

And dozens of prosecutors across the country have made it a priority to try and lock up as many cops as they can. Even if they followed their training or defended themselves in the line of duty. The brave men and women in blue need to know that someone... anyone still has their back.

**[That's why I sincerely hope you'll help me get justice for Eric - and our entire family - by making a tax-deductible gift of any amount to the LELDF today.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/5uNkvJSXx1CfTm_H-67QsA~~/AARclAA~/RgRoPuY2P0STaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi9kMjZlYWUzMS04ZWVhLTQxYTktODI3OC1hYmNhMTE1YzhkNzA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwNjAyX0JER19MRUxERl9TRDJfUkVOX1BBLUNCVwNzcGNCCmZVHE5cZjNUHwlSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

Thank you, and God bless!
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_

_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fUvZN8yJlSMHFVj_b7YT3w~~/AARclAA~/RgRoPuY2P0QeaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucG9saWNlZGVmZW5zZS5vcmcvVwNzcGNCCmZVHE5cZjNUHwlSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Conservative Broadcast
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3zUtqc92eGeSLL2eeaCqDw~~/AARclAA~/RgRoPuY2P0RwaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQuY29uc2VydmF0aXZlYnJvYWRjYXN0LmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1Db25zZXJ2YXRpdmUtQnJvYWRjYXN0LU9mZmVycyZlPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclMjU0MGdtYWlsLmNvbVcDc3BjQgpmVRxOXGYzVB8JUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Ez0iU_8oUYKmjdRSJp693Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRoPuY2P0QuaHR0cHM6Ly9jb25zZXJ2YXRpdmVicm9hZGNhc3QuY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpmVRxOXGYzVB8JUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: David Hogg, Leaders We Deserve
subject: From the bottom of my heart...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Hey Peter, can I get minute of your time today for something important?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T36023837-223c-42c9-8b2b-67b9d128dc92/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
| | | Hey, Peter, thanks for opening this email. I know a lot is going on, so I appreciate it. It’s a little long, but it’s from the heart, and it’s important. You don’t have to be obsessed with politics or watching the news 24/7 to know our country is in a bad place. Horrific violence in the Middle East. A Republican Party that has gone so far off the rails they could barely elect a Speaker. The leading Republican candidate for president is Donald Trump! And then we have unspeakable atrocities like the mass shooting in Maine because our “leaders” refuse to act. And many people talk about how Trump is a major threat to democracy and he is — but I believe there is an even greater and more long-term threat \- hopelessness. When I was knocking doors for Leaders We Deserve-endorsed candidate Nadarius Clark for the Virginia elections, the most concerning answer I got when I asked if people were voting was, “No, I don’t believe in voting” or “No all politics is corrupt and my vote doesn’t matter.” This scares me because things can never get better if we continue electing people who say “government doesn't work” who then get elected and make it not work. I’m deeply worried about us. And it’s not because I’m anti-America. It’s because I love this country and I desperately want to see us do better. We’re not going to fix this mess overnight. But we do have a plan. A group of us just launched Leaders We Deserve. We started it because we know that young progressive leaders can change the future of this country for the better by giving us what we need most to get through this moment of democratic backsliding, HOPE. We can elect more young leaders like Nadarius Clark, but we can ONLY do it if enough of us get behind them. For us to give the school shooting generation the hope it needs to secure the future of our democracy and build a more perfect union, we must get to work electing the next generation of morally just leaders who put kids first and the NRA out of business. The truth is that young progressive candidates who are running for office face huge barriers. The average age of our elected officials is astronomical. That’s because our election system favors those who are older, wealthy, and white. In 2020, Millennial and Gen-Z individuals only held 21% of State Legislative seats despite representing 45% of the electorate. We launched Leaders We Deserve specifically to coalesce support from millions of Americans who believe in the promise of this younger generation. Here’s our plan:
* Find young progressives who are willing to run for Congress and state legislatures.
* Equip their campaigns with messaging, scheduling, and budget tools they need to win.
* And most importantly, raise funds from our massive national network (hey, that’s you!) to allow them to go toe-to-toe with their opponents and WIN.

Peter, if we succeed, ten years from now we’ll have shifted the politics of this nation dramatically. Young, progressive leaders will make up their fair share of the legislative and congressional seats, allowing us to right the ship and build the future we deserve. But what we do right now will determine whether or not that vision comes to pass. We can’t just muddle along raising a couple hundred thousand dollars here and there. We’ll actually have to raise tens of millions of dollars from grassroots donors like you to get the breadth and scale we need to win in all corners of the country. Here’s what I need from you for our plan to work. – If you are blessed with the financial ability to make a really big donation (like $500 or more), please do so right now to help us make this vision a reality. [Click here if you are fortunate enough to give $500 or more.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tce2696e2-b522-4148-b6f9-c2afb8134bd6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) – If you can give a small donation each month, that makes a big impact too. [Click here if you think you can commit to a $25 monthly donation (or something like that).](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0d04344-d2f4-4fd0-9aa8-47bd32ea38b9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) – If you can’t give big and you can’t give monthly, that’s totally OK (most people can’t). [Click here to just give a one time donation of whatever you can afford.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td353266e-1ddc-468c-a2d0-25b17994f33d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) – Last but not least, if you can’t chip in at all, I completely understand. All I ask is that you forward this email to three friends who might be aligned with our cause. I hope this fundraiser is as successful as I know it can be. I hope that we look back at this moment in ten years and say THIS is when everything started to change. If you have any questions at all about Leaders We Deserve, please check out our website or get in touch with us on social media. From the bottom of my heart, thank you for reading today. \- David Hogg

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

clean_body: Hey Peter, can I get minute of your time today for something important? | | | | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can . | | | Hey, Peter, thanks for opening this email. I know a lot is going on, so I appreciate it. It’s a little long, but it’s from the heart, and it’s important. You don’t have to be obsessed with politics or watching the news 24/7 to know our country is in a bad place. Horrific violence in the Middle East. A Republican Party that has gone so far off the rails they could barely elect a Speaker. The leading Republican candidate for president is Donald Trump! And then we have unspeakable atrocities like the mass shooting in Maine because our “leaders” refuse to act. And many people talk about how Trump is a major threat to democracy and he is — but I believe there is an even greater and more long-term threat \- hopelessness. When I was knocking doors for Leaders We Deserve-endorsed candidate Nadarius Clark for the Virginia elections, the most concerning answer I got when I asked if people were voting was, “No, I don’t believe in voting” or “No all politics is corrupt and my vote doesn’t matter.” This scares me because things can never get better if we continue electing people who say “government doesn't work” who then get elected and make it not work. I’m deeply worried about us. And it’s not because I’m anti-America. It’s because I love this country and I desperately want to see us do better. We’re not going to fix this mess overnight. But we do have a plan. A group of us just launched Leaders We Deserve. We started it because we know that young progressive leaders can change the future of this country for the better by giving us what we need most to get through this moment of democratic backsliding, HOPE. We can elect more young leaders like Nadarius Clark, but we can ONLY do it if enough of us get behind them. For us to give the school shooting generation the hope it needs to secure the future of our democracy and build a more perfect union, we must get to work electing the next generation of morally just leaders who put kids first and the NRA out of business. The truth is that young progressive candidates who are running for office face huge barriers. The average age of our elected officials is astronomical. That’s because our election system favors those who are older, wealthy, and white. In 2020, Millennial and Gen-Z individuals only held 21% of State Legislative seats despite representing 45% of the electorate. We launched Leaders We Deserve specifically to coalesce support from millions of Americans who believe in the promise of this younger generation. Here’s our plan: Find young progressives who are willing to run for Congress and state legislatures. Equip their campaigns with messaging, scheduling, and budget tools they need to win. And most importantly, raise funds from our massive national network (hey, that’s you!) to allow them to go toe-to-toe with their opponents and WIN. Peter, if we succeed, ten years from now we’ll have shifted the politics of this nation dramatically. Young, progressive leaders will make up their fair share of the legislative and congressional seats, allowing us to right the ship and build the future we deserve. But what we do right now will determine whether or not that vision comes to pass. We can’t just muddle along raising a couple hundred thousand dollars here and there. We’ll actually have to raise tens of millions of dollars from grassroots donors like you to get the breadth and scale we need to win in all corners of the country. Here’s what I need from you for our plan to work. – If you are blessed with the financial ability to make a really big donation (like $500 or more), please do so right now to help us make this vision a reality. – If you can give a small donation each month, that makes a big impact too. – If you can’t give big and you can’t give monthly, that’s totally OK (most people can’t). – Last but not least, if you can’t chip in at all, I completely understand. All I ask is that you forward this email to three friends who might be aligned with our cause. I hope this fundraiser is as successful as I know it can be. I hope that we look back at this moment in ten years and say THIS is when everything started to change. If you have any questions at all about Leaders We Deserve, please check out our website or get in touch with us on social media. From the bottom of my heart, thank you for reading today. \- David Hogg | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC** PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

# [Start the other Trump trials as soon as possible](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb68d9a16-9c31-4ba4-bffb-7886efcab13b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | Donald Trump has been convicted on 34 counts, and that's a great start. But it's only a start, since there are multiple other trials that have been needlessly and endlessly delayed, allowing Trump to delay justice, possibly beyond the election. Enough is enough. It's time to stop the delays, move forward, and make Trump pay for his crimes. [**Add your name, and join us in demanding: "Start the other Trump trials as soon as possible."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T30bb739b-d316-4824-9a27-aedbb174422c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

_**[We desperately need all Patriots to pitch in AT LEAST $15 to get back on track and save our Pro-Trump Majority.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZULJa-2cZTHxrUMm-KW5sA~~/AARclAA~~ "We desperately need all Patriots to pitch in AT LEAST $15 to get back on track and save our Pro-Trump Majority.")**_ Our May deadline has come and gone and we fell JUST SHORT of our fundraising goal.

_We can 't hand power over to the Radical Democrats who just convicted President Trump! _

If there's any hope to defeat them, we need your help right now. Because if not enough American Patriots step up, we'll be forced to:

>>> SLASH our voter contact budgets
>>> PULL our ads off the airwaves
>>> TURN OFF fundraising efforts in some key districts
>>> CUT BACK doorknocking schedules
>>> And END critical get-out-the-vote operations

The repercussions of doing so cannot be overstated. If we fall any further behind, we might as well say GOODBYE to our Pro-Trump House Majority.

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: The problem of progressive education
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsEqtTkWNB
You've probably noticed the spread of anti-American ideology into
every area of American life.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osEqtTkWNB

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

You've
probably noticed the spread of anti-American ideology into every
area of American life.

Consider
the 2019 controversy surrounding the Betsy Ross flag. Even though
this was a few years ago, you still may have heard of it.

Shortly
before Independence Day, Nike announced its plans to release an
athletic shoe featuring the Betsy Ross flag. Then Nike spokesman
Colin Kaepernick objected, condemning the flag as a symbol of
racism and slavery.

You won't
be surprised to learn that a social media storm followed, with
Nike announcing that it was halting the production of the shoe.

The
Kaepernick episode illustrates the problem of progressive
education, which seeks to rewrite our nation's history, and
undermine the kind of informed patriotism essential to preserving
liberty.

Now that
you know what a few others think of the Betsy Ross flag...

...I hope
you will give us your thoughts about the teaching of American
history, including the American Revolution and the Declaration of
Independence, by taking a short survey.

Just
follow this link to share your opinion:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63240422:sEqtTkWNB:m:3:2627245898:66654634FD49360B9C9BAE606D6D34CA:r

Like the
frenzy for tearing down statues that we witnessed in cities not
long ago, the Nike shoe controversy is the bitter fruit of the
progressive educational agenda.

I hope I
can count on you to help us confront this destructive ideology
with the truth about American history.

Please
share your thoughts with us today!

Bill Gray
'01
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College
Pursuing
Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Elissa Slotkin for Senate
subject: Can you please endorse Elissa Slotkin for Senate?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1488%2E135344%2ENGfQd9)

Friend --
As you know, Michigan's Republican Senate primary is coming up soon. And in the weeks before the race, GOP candidates in our race and others are talking to people trying to capture something called "voter IDs."
A "voter ID" is just a simple declaration of support from potential voters.
It is a campaign contacting a voter, and a voter saying "Yes, I support you," or "no, I am supporting someone else."
These replies are the foundation of any campaign, because it’s how we know where our supporter base exists and who we need to turn out in November.
Before the election, campaigns try to make sure their stated supporters vote. And at other times -- especially when a candidate needs it most -- they will turn to those supporters for help.
So today, we are doing the same. We are asking you to add your name as a "Personal Endorser" of Elissa Slotkin's campaign for Senate. It's a small and simple act, but it will speak volumes about the grassroots support for our campaign:
**[Can Elissa count on you to add your name as a Personal Endorser of her campaign for United States Senate in Michigan? If we're in this together, we'll keep this seat blue in November.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/endorse-elissa-june24?source=em240602-1-15&refcode2=1488.135344.NGfQd9&akid=1488%2E135344%2ENGfQd9)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/endorse-elissa-june24?source=em240602-1-15&refcode2=1488.135344.NGfQd9&akid=1488%2E135344%2ENGfQd9)**
It will mean a lot to know that Elissa can count on you in this race.
Thank you,
Team Slotkin
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/endorse-elissa-june24?source=em240602-1-15&refcode2=1488.135344.NGfQd9&akid=1488%2E135344%2ENGfQd9)**

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: B+L Weekly Reads: Middle School Teacher Allegedly "Erases" Israel | Calls to Ban Fossil Fuels + More ⚡🔔
body:
News + editorial to start your week. | | | |
---
| | | Good morning, and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=324e3058ff&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Climate change? Maybe. Ban fossil fuels? No.](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8d81ca5031&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Guy Ciarrocchi_

In a two-part essay this week, Guy addressed some tough questions to that segment of the far-left that wants to ban oil and gas outright. Is there truly a climate “crisis,” unlike any other weather or climate cycle in the history of the planet? Is this historic, unprecedented climate change — that we must assume is horribly bad — caused solely or primarily because of the actions of people, e.g., fossil fuels, eating meat, farming, using air conditioners, and even having kids? And if so, is this the only course available to us?

**Why It Matters**. We have to ask because if we are going to stop using fossil fuels (and, eating meat, etc.), we should make sure that “green energy” can replace it and that it can keep up with a growing American (and world) population and the growing needs for energy. Shouldn’t we take a moment and make sure that “green energy” is actually cleaner, healthier, and better for us?

If we are going to wake up in 2034, 2044, or 2050 in an America with no gas-powered cars, no gas ranges and no natural gas-powered or coal-fired electricity plants (how 60 percent of our electricity is made), can enough solar panels be built and installed to power us safely, reliably? Have we considered how much material and land that requires, to convert even 50 percent of our energy to solar?
**[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d358934def&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Antisemitism is an issue beyond college campuses](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=dc46bb0a3c&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Beth Ann Rosica_
While college campuses have been infiltrated by antisemitic speech and actions, local public schools are also experiencing increased incidents of Jewish hate.

This [Instagram](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=fbb2e1c5be&e=b7b3eddce2) post describes one such alleged incident where a Philadelphia School District middle school teacher crossed out the word “Israel” and changed it to “Palestine” for a geography class assignment.
---
|
---
|
**Why It Matters**. The political divide on the war should not be an excuse for tolerating antisemitism in any form in our public and private schools or universities. As Robin Schatz, the Director of Government Affairs for the Jewish Community Relations Council at the Jewish Federation of Greater Philadelphia, said, “Jews hold many different viewpoints, and they just get lumped together. Even Jews in Israel have varied opinions.”

The Philadelphia School District and other schools in the region and country should take a stronger stand on harassment and discrimination of Jewish students and teachers. Elected officials and school administrators have a moral and a legal obligation to ensure that schools are safe for all children and teachers. Safety in the classroom should not be a political or election issue.

**[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d8ec042008&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Coming soon: The 2024 Candidate Spotlight Series**

We at _Broad + Liberty_ believe that an informed electorate is essential to a flourishing Republic. To that end, we want to give every candidate running for the House and Senate the opportunity to share their visions for our Commonwealth and their respective districts. We will run as many submissions over the summer that we receive to give our readers key insights into each candidate. So watch this space in the coming months for more!
---
|
---
|
# **4\. Lightning Round**
* **[Red tape to green light: Pennsylvania leaders seek tax reform for startups](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5f59e73475&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Farthest North for the Stars and Stripes](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a5028200aa&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Cheryl Allen: ‘Pro-Choice’ now means no limits through all nine months of pregnancy](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4b408b5a98&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Wally Nunn: Scanlon and the Squad](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=42d4082fee&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Michael Thomas Leibrandt: Let the boys play football](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b331643129&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **5\. What we're reading**
Well, it’s been a busy news week. There are thousands of articles being written about Donald Trump’s conviction in a New York court last Thursday, but if we had to pick one, it would be [Jim Geraghty’s analysis for _National Review_](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3d0bf0e610&e=b7b3eddce2). “The six-week trial likely cost New York City $1 million to $2 million, with roughly $50,000 per day in additional security costs. The Manhattan DA’s office does not spend seven-figure sums to chase down false business records from 2016 unless the defendant’s name is Donald Trump.” It’s hard to argue with that.
---
|
---

clean_body: News + editorial to start your week. | | | | | | | Good morning, and welcome to Broad + Liberty 's Weekly Reads. and get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | | 1. By Guy Ciarrocchi In a two-part essay this week, Guy addressed some tough questions to that segment of the far-left that wants to ban oil and gas outright. Is there truly a climate “crisis,” unlike any other weather or climate cycle in the history of the planet? Is this historic, unprecedented climate change — that we must assume is horribly bad — caused solely or primarily because of the actions of people, e.g., fossil fuels, eating meat, farming, using air conditioners, and even having kids? And if so, is this the only course available to us? Why It Matters. We have to ask because if we are going to stop using fossil fuels (and, eating meat, etc.), we should make sure that “green energy” can replace it and that it can keep up with a growing American (and world) population and the growing needs for energy. Shouldn’t we take a moment and make sure that “green energy” is actually cleaner, healthier, and better for us? If we are going to wake up in 2034, 2044, or 2050 in an America with no gas-powered cars, no gas ranges and no natural gas-powered or coal-fired electricity plants (how 60 percent of our electricity is made), can enough solar panels be built and installed to power us safely, reliably? Have we considered how much material and land that requires, to convert even 50 percent of our energy to solar? | | 2. body:
There’s no governing going on in DC because Republicans simply can’t govern.

|
---
| [ ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW9WL4ySifRyEQyG7D6ZDcaKmFQcO_SqeUFRkYFn0WrvHHisWiwN-mSj2nwLaaiVAndhLwjC3x9MI2KUAa0DnJVhamStH0yBHJI9uhbj_q0lHKyqTPgJ0Z1MPCxT_UUpWfss6xksxwG-PawO7ndm0WxV7GjkDD-6aEhEhZSlYzM_m0Ar28sm7I-tziaxd-HFxW5TsPGjw54frM2Iro7z2aNOchrjn0Kxdxo_1jNurS57CFWsMuLvofg4MbLT2dKsAeSTIfJLfyE0Gg_zyphmsM3JurdPd9DJkvg8_Ar7r59pXBeYVD96-zZM-Uw2xoFrzqbhMpYm9qF6AoH-f-j9LyEYvEswkDpaVgk0yuTyk7pOvFyeBzCOhhVqOyiQ4oZKCNEtQGXTgaTsqmfiTXNmfi5qwKG_qDxO7m3u2w8RzaLYsLKlDD_vptpMNBW196VkqWs7G51R3QqpbBAJbDBnCbZ9xjpFWMYvRRtNEcf5UAk78LGNXaQRFg2HUxQ6-yV-LOg/46v/SwDBhE2uTcqdmQoFIPN0zg/h0/h001.dDLjgjQcIDu8nqZ87Etq_9nHk6xC45AowJOZQWPCatM)
