1️⃣ **_Trump Alert:_ Trump found guilty of all 34 felony charges **
On Thursday, Trump was found guilty of felony fraud charges related to the 2016 election. His party is already rallying behind him and using this verdict as a fundraising grab ahead of November's elections. [We’re counting on Democrats to pitch in to counteract the surge of GOP donations and fight back against Trump loyalists running in the states. Can we count on you? → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDt4Do6vyPJ50F6Afq3NtvRIb_g6nYEnhO_3uIQHG-k-fRfyAySV0R4SuLBYpyBi5hmbmXD4ortPYA_1Jx0b701ud8EuwabRrHJy_brijaGzUatp6Ay5BPrBNOeK9mwgiJXTE9Zbu8X6Yh7UbPi-o-ll-m9qwMglGrkBHu6PYgJaPRk3Ozbo750AuTnwiNLhdC-dRzwbOXPkwzhwZY4vgwu6zqCvI-QgomeFHFmqkVIh1XIEQYs7iN8atLnQfCvXUrKANEVxJGiI2az014hJwEY4V6CevP9Xe56DzTT5q_9HlgID7Hrg2-IOLWF-PYhzsZHGH_AqFTjSyJ36uH2cfm3gxEykPLGUxyvZrp0xSxrl-bSIL_2295mHxftYGxOhugvlY4P8tVBLZXrmOR8kPfBFbU6FW7J-OyLWjJCiFY-_QJv9q-vBrozsRiSu15g9nkimULVL5h8y2Uywe9j5OkOinAi6Jq2no81Fd80WItui1X9Di5hw6SHzIE-5FfclKf/46v/SwDBhE2uTcqdmQoFIPN0zg/h1/h001.5NkLlI7NLDBATG6AKRUZPe6qBwE9eazuxEgQ2kDF4aM)
**[Chip in to help block MAGA extremism](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDt4Do6vyPJ50F6Afq3NtvRIb_g6nYEnhO_3uIQHG-k-fRfyAySV0R4SuLBYpyBi5hmbmXD4ortPYA_1Jx0b701ud8EuwabRrHJy_brijaGzUatp6Ay5BPrBNOeK9mwgiJXTE9Zbu8X6Yh7UbPi-o-ll-m9qwMglGrkBHu6PYgJaPs65vMO7jynJWGlDOyVLSwTze83oHbwpAQOUE35ge5tHMWf4TAONtRVH7MrxubgdMfcDNCae1ateitCF7S42MBSltv8D5q3st7A_FeVBwYEGvRAGwOptAWp21g0ax6ScWqBvWQVlYx22bxm2ya9MOOSAy1u-NbBF_7g4RX3afKfqeRWRalaW5RmsCVQ4QPCmdqC9JD_sT8foN8gM6GygbV8CFflU7_QRH_FUyh_ZQkuM7ijGXWp5fDAlnTlbzFOpvhtV69cpXu4BBIHsgHGKSsRGnBbjgMM0zV9gUSJ9OsVJqtTmh2Q39PbJ9bLhHgPIaTJqYoh1jqqP23vQtI73Fb/46v/SwDBhE2uTcqdmQoFIPN0zg/h2/h001.gsKE0UHFkYFEG14VnXAuZiV3OfZIfON71a861ls1RPg)**
2️⃣ **_Louisiana:_ Senate Republicans pass bill restricting discussion of gender and sexuality **
In Louisiana, Senate Republicans gave final approval for a far-reaching bill, similar to Florida’s infamous “Don’t Say Gay” law, that would ban discussion of gender and sexuality in all K-12 public schools. [**This bill is the GOP’s latest despicable attack on LGBTQ+ youth →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.SNYHID0cgDJeR88MOfSMuSyFrJodH4d8_axiA23d-6cx6IlGya6mwnebol5euiZMUgF9JoBKwjCljCchLf8wTfrRGv4NImTTDp-zFKulM9cIPQdVtp_3Lu7vZNPBzI1puKPt_1sPFRZo7pxM5dQJmzv7O6JHUDhfDNm39uMeramFdiEYO0AFkUFEZhgDm5A8BOVyZCW8ZhKh25DhQh52E0zFp3cv5mdMGT6bf4OVtFDTkg7rHPRx50SU_FvwLTdtkBlZEHtoZ6LGQDWNRtiaBHCS8q09disFS53i8pPlFNdrjmw--isGajq0lMFRw6mlCNg01tp4Hsws-Te8fguww8nghfexuTO2TM8KlZdd4w1CUvhuRX6dzVKY7AsH4BM0IAo_CFkDLdjQlwMh4sBELOnh8jov-_phcW55wBcc8B1kVvJNQPPw0IaOB6F0qLaTGl0jQ3Awf45eaxXMZbAHyjA8Yem-aJuv4KGPOrtbbpuOCmmyJ4Ultk2jT7vagTcO7Q4_OK0y8cd6Ztvd0y0mU2IpZzHYdPHC1GouSgQMvJfzx3KQoRwBL_ebYtXwBYBFTkPwIK0PsGjy5XS2nDMABNBx7Hj9OKS4COSLgsAsE9sLKHWungBuCUKtOGDKvO4zTltteqdeDmMVFnFwvwgx6zOtwQ4OAD88R5xjpu2RRfY/46v/SwDBhE2uTcqdmQoFIPN0zg/h3/h001.kx8PQFj6MafpeR14rj5KIbRCyF_7OfT-hbphOOjt4CQ)
📖 **_Read:_ Republicans Aren’t Stopping with Attacks on Abortion – Birth Control is Next **
Since the fall of _Roe_ , Republican-controlled state legislatures have waged war on reproductive freedoms – and there are no bounds to their extremism. [**Click here to see how they are escalating →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5urRMpuKreY0_4KS0xJ1pBqEi88rIi_dHZ5TvRqTNBQXknldqK2ugict2-_B1tinLzkL7p51JxCYT7FxAPsFT4v5sQRTjK66qauV8bKvinNjDZ5PXZ3NvUXX4zuRcbuVc2INrItNy7Q--nojoXoxpAWus7243PnTTwqdIr477nfg5iIaam-_8nEbUtE-4gZl2v5VSy05O7R0wulP4x4-9Rnqzc_O9AEaLVTA87dY2ldusI4JfcPYy9ZAXfLBI9OO0JHO7pkA-ddh5ZHpziVgatI4sdXiNJU4YbtYnLvijfpNpNvBsLagn446V8poeYjwPFaay4TdySyH1BQZaefGvgP7vzPjcI5DgGljVxXVQYDLR3fIcIxXc2tCuN50IKfA6KdFXPpJPKqtNmrdvhgplo_Bje9DA1Vb7s2IbKGiAR55iTQwS45v6tJE_oNmlRMCgHNLag91TGqR3cudna2up0fvKOxtw_c5ej_sZzrgP8NC3PQ2AMR-E6sprkeNQmAnsKdJq6weeyQj3iaJZfJT_BZC-I5m4m3diHxE-s9lqQtkXvRHOAuhTriGA64v1GN0htqpobHvM1RFfSFDfD5a8M2viaQB4FfGbktW8nqgJzKj94x8Kol3cyHcT2KvSpdssRHU2rph5cwe68CgEvYgpM/46v/SwDBhE2uTcqdmQoFIPN0zg/h4/h001.gmDa2fMzZbxVpNXYGZZLzFb85wLs4elmu1Zk00iTmyU)
🔦 **_Spotlight:_ _DLCC_ Announces Spotlight Candidate to Flip Idaho House Seat **
Ahead of the SCOTUS ruling _Idaho v. United States_ , a critical case that will have huge repercussions for safe abortion access, the DLCC is proud to spotlight Democrat Mary Shea. She is committed to holding extreme MAGA Republicans accountable for their attacks on reproductive freedom. name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: The Truth About My Father’s Sham Trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate
body:
I am personally calling on you to support not only my father in this critical election year but also America First patriots like Bernie Moreno in Ohio. |
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a4bd35a0e591401ca2a39e1089b5983b&_e=TkEy8lpAHFSPVVgyRPTApz21BWD7uvGeIch9hJ5VtM26WEDsMPYvJPW1zvO6WxCXCQ9K05HaKlRNKuGPZWws51RBSu7aaCGdO8OqYhtDxKhIcgGWpZ4Wnu6dTl5j7FhzLndtgtd4Kva-wu40dg5G-_DALWaWqrcJp3wHbjA-KuxZYaC8-RTj3uhFoNJVifa9RtyCTA55QZvnZwjtELWlF2D8xvHoGwhW7HZijceRaf3ZvBR6x5wejQXZMqWuPf8jVETviehbmiZINaB-jtlqv0lKBmmZyZNodkznLtc3EVX6r5heQU-N6Ye4j6RgwZpl2jDw-ILK_ALC0Vr_XtuuS4AgCZk-DAbw7NoPs9JjmIQcoJtLnEcG3JwLzDkU9n9YpsxT9FM0nPXqs47-IcNvKylk4Bh6e5IUaSYtCBn8NZI%3D)

Well Fellow patriot,

The Democrats have succeeded in their years-long crusade against my father. **_This is a complete and total outrage._**

The guilty verdict brought on by a radical, Soros-backed Democrat in a kangaroo court in New York City will forever be a stain on our nation's history. The case was rigged from the start. [**We’ve got to have your support if we’re going to fix our fractured nation.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a4bd35a0e591401ca2a39e1089b5983b&_e=TkEy8lpAHFSPVVgyRPTApz21BWD7uvGeIch9hJ5VtM26WEDsMPYvJPW1zvO6WxCXCQ9K05HaKlRNKuGPZWws51RBSu7aaCGdO8OqYhtDxKhIcgGWpZ4Wnu6dTl5j7FhzLndtgtd4Kva-wu40dg5G-_DALWaWqrcJp3wHbjA-KuxZYaC8-RTj3uhFoNJVifa9RtyCTA55QZvnZwjtELWlF2D8xvHoGwhW7HZijceRaf3ZvBR6x5wejQXZMqWuPf8jVETviehbmiZINaB-jtlqvxUVjREV7LJ1oJ-_2E6fa5q6Wcao-Yc2QJAJjWaZfLcFpeocH-NR4UmqrfO03DBFVEJnT7TDIrtRQyLdk8c9-RYklDSVsFeXrx6_zrXh6H2ZIhIIdWv2DZiTYCne1aj7sVzWIo5eg3raydL_tYEOimI%3D)

**⇨ First, Alvin Bragg literally campaigned on the conviction of my father. He didn’t care about truth or justice – only his and Joe Biden’s personal vendetta and political aspirations.

⇨ Then, Bragg and his leftist cronies completed their mission, pushing through a wrongful conviction based on flimsy evidence and outright lies. This was a third-world country sham trial. _For God’s sake, Putin does this stuff!_

⇨ Now, they have the audacity to schedule his sentencing just DAYS before the Republican National Convention. _This is a blatant attempt to interfere with the upcoming election and silence MILLIONS of Americans who stand with President Trump._**

_This is what a Banana Republic looks like, folks._

[ **STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a4bd35a0e591401ca2a39e1089b5983b&_e=TkEy8lpAHFSPVVgyRPTApz21BWD7uvGeIch9hJ5VtM26WEDsMPYvJPW1zvO6WxCXCQ9K05HaKlRNKuGPZWws51RBSu7aaCGdO8OqYhtDxKhIcgGWpZ4Wnu6dTl5j7FhzLndtgtd4Kva-wu40dg5G-_DALWaWqrcJp3wHbjA-KuxZYaC8-RTj3uhFoNJVifa9RtyCTA55QZvnZwjtELWlF2D8xvHoGwhW7HZijceRaf3ZvBR6x5wejQXZMqWuPf8jVETviehbmiZINaB-jtlqv6Axl4sQD9hW_18v7vQqsNQBpQNDisFYuMd11xT0_w7EAlPoalHklYPsftv24K66mVlpdGNBv7hsTpn6YzYi010AzSqT66jH9m4Eu_6DuWEhKTindg0rPMlTYWF0APtGbIn4xCdbEpKnafRofvmXvc0%3D)
What’s done is done; all we can do now is fight back, Friend.

[**That is why I am personally calling on you to support not only my father in this critical election year but also America First patriots like Bernie Moreno in Ohio.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a4bd35a0e591401ca2a39e1089b5983b&_e=TkEy8lpAHFSPVVgyRPTApz21BWD7uvGeIch9hJ5VtM26WEDsMPYvJPW1zvO6WxCXCQ9K05HaKlRNKuGPZWws51RBSu7aaCGdO8OqYhtDxKhIcgGWpZ4Wnu6dTl5j7FhzLndtgtd4Kva-wu40dg5G-_DALWaWqrcJp3wHbjA-KuxZYaC8-RTj3uhFoNJVifa9RtyCTA55QZvnZwjtELWlF2D8xvHoGwhW7HZijceRaf3ZvBR6x5wejQXZMqWuPf8jVETviehbmiZINaB-jtlqv25gh4qp7tzVhkNy9EjhzAOVIYrscFmCr_lW1XsS0mjPP4TXx1kx0lbi0BMInwJxUr3erV5-v8ZOk4g3IzgruisfLWspGYytkh4c1J7o9O9DTys6LYFMTUhhz0_uRAwTmg44iqrdKVMrRcpAu9UDLYc%3D)

_**Bernie gets it.**_ _He understands that Joe Biden and the radical left aren’t after President Trump; they’re after YOU, the American People._

**As your next Senator, I know he will stand shoulder to shoulder with my father and fight the good fight.** [**So please, chip in whatever you can now so that we can ensure the true verdict is decided by the American People on Election Day, November 5th.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a4bd35a0e591401ca2a39e1089b5983b&_e=TkEy8lpAHFSPVVgyRPTApz21BWD7uvGeIch9hJ5VtM26WEDsMPYvJPW1zvO6WxCXCQ9K05HaKlRNKuGPZWws51RBSu7aaCGdO8OqYhtDxKhIcgGWpZ4Wnu6dTl5j7FhzLndtgtd4Kva-wu40dg5G-_DALWaWqrcJp3wHbjA-KuxZYaC8-RTj3uhFoNJVifa9RtyCTA55QZvnZwjtELWlF2D8xvHoGwhW7HZijceRaf3ZvBR6x5wejQXZMqWuPf8jVETviehbmiZINaB-jtlqvzwe7m2BXST8ztq3pgSP22-XUjEDJmCVSfXUHJw2nt54ij3iBMpZx6OH_9mYEVMauqDfz_PxGvplGfJzu5QEJrBWT8pjmpj91jGh5dGQNg8lKUl_QAw91xNnTXGwH75TmyLe9GzGVIEPvKFeii8EmVI%3D)

For America,

Donald Trump Jr.

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a4bd35a0e591401ca2a39e1089b5983b&_e=TkEy8lpAHFSPVVgyRPTApz21BWD7uvGeIch9hJ5VtM26WEDsMPYvJPW1zvO6WxCXCQ9K05HaKlRNKuGPZWws51RBSu7aaCGdO8OqYhtDxKhIcgGWpZ4Wnu6dTl5j7FhzLndtgtd4Kva-wu40dg5G-_DALWaWqrcJp3wHbjA-KuxZYaC8-RTj3uhFoNJVifa9RtyCTA55QZvnZwjtELWlF2D8xvHoGwhW7HZijceRaf3ZvBR6x5wejQXZMqWuPf8jVETviehbmiZINaB-jtlqv3aCJ1lOT28Io1uksUxuVFi8RDDdgW1jGpo18aGb1Xh-ZcgxgwwuyxgfamEOWDXGBRGONDUwHX9DYEze47ZnlRcitiUX-lHTeZS2IQMR_SqgdUw9TKvwAAf66ZHjJnmIfG6HJnGnD7F8gfn9qqnTyjw%3D) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

Ceasefire Proposal
http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgke5dt46o242rag8cvdf4maqcr4d88048tk7a2g_rp22sh2s8i6ep37cpgm9ob6cjh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38ctk6oon9dtjmeqjetjjkorrbdt36kq32tbiekojf8j0c9gmf833cug68pt3muprb9jhegp72t9iemh3actimgqr9ctlkeqj2t1jmjq31dblk1rrasjmemj3fcdh6mjn8cbl69qqfctlk8qb2d9jmpqqcd9k6pqj6d5iekqq0sjnm1rrct1hmuh2bs

Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu says that Hamas must be

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Thank you. Really.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter, thanks for sticking with me as we went into overtime yesterday.
One of the last things you want to do is go into an FEC fundraising deadline month on the wrong foot.
But you all stepped up. Thanks to our donors, to all of our supporters, we’re starting off in a good place. That’s going to go a long way towards defeating Kari Lake — and it couldn’t come at a better time. The GOP is on a real tear after what happened on Thursday, and they’re building a massive cash advantage.
With your help, we’ll hold our own in Arizona. I’m so proud of this team, and so grateful that you’re on it.
Hope you have a great Sunday.
Ruben
* * *

PS: June is an official FEC deadline month, a critical moment this Election Year. What that means is, we’re legally required to publicly report how many donations we received and how much we raised over the last three months after our deadline hits on June 30. It’s a critical deadline for our campaign.
[**If you’d like to help us get a head start, a donation of any amount would be extremely appreciated.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june24.NmHAEe&refcode=em240602-1-30&t=1&akid=2422%2E734936%2EmOC_-G)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june24.NmHAEe&refcode=em240602-1-30&t=2&akid=2422%2E734936%2EmOC_-G)

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=3&akid=2422%2E734936%2EmOC_-G). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2422%2E734936%2EmOC_-G). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=2422_734936_mOC_-G&akid=2422%2E734936%2EmOC_-G)

body:
how I first got involved in politics
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86121436/476903815/-1278658170?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3895-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWM0NWNhZS1lNzIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9nas4LES5wbvruMUNiD-NJhZ1525-i8us0MCjjEVA_Y=)
Can I tell you the story of how I first got involved in politics, friend?
While serving as the president of Nevada's largest synagogue, I was recruited to run in a competitive House race to help flip a red seat blue. Looking back, it's incredibly fitting that _this_ was my entry point to public service – **because my Judaism helps guide much of my work in the Senate today.** **In fact, my decision to say "yes" and run for public office in the first place was guided by the Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam – which means to leave the world a better place than how we found it.**
Now, as the third Jewish woman and only former synagogue president in Senate history, I'm proud to serve Nevada and our country.** ** And as we face everything from growing antisemitism to attacks on reproductive freedom to threats to tear down our very democracy, I'm as committed as ever to keep fighting to better this world and make positive change happen. **But I need your help.**
**My ****far-right opponent**** set a new GOP fundraising record to defeat me, and recent polling shows me tied in the race that experts say will likely decide Senate control. So please, I'm humbly asking:**
[**If the principle of Tikkun Olam resonates with you ****– if you're with me in the fight to continue making progress for the people and communities that we love – ****will**** you chip in $5 or more today to help me defend my seat in Nevada and our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86121444/476903816/-1278658170?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3895-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWM0NWNhZS1lNzIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9nas4LES5wbvruMUNiD-NJhZ1525-i8us0MCjjEVA_Y=)

Fellow Conservative,

_**[Will you endorse me before my primary on Tuesday?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=49570df54b1341a989aefe2925a15320&_e=-staZZ8IloHwdcPhvvW0nFOeub-xIzY_ymMlTE4jpiI1pJ3vUGuE89Tx44ecUapvc06a-I9ND4sCh7DAPUqw8NpWVujmvvq9uo6N27EFhs6tHM5OCo63hDylGcppnRboapU9UedrTHjSbo8jV9Orvz0kZpp5jJAhqkA51myXGRDLImbvYToRLgUSK9Gxs1Syx5C3Yst3vEsUMn_5azJ-IeCBWhgKbh21LQhcyix_9kCkt5OsTHV54I5UJP9hWQYP06Qw5MBWKRhqhGkKvPRipeFx7ey2WjESBXoo_dK2PLPEuYORS7vpUBtUgh6BPxyE9T3G9MTUPDcmH-RBLhq8TQMcGlp2hc6BMUeqyWgzVBX0BovR79Wqr-cccQdjy39yaCgumpg_-93KSbjPg_UDa8BNpVo85RVbhIf-qPdhVOtQPrMBZSwt-esX5rc_CJw4IZphRdse6LpQNVEPjoSre6KTFG9ULmU6Y9_sTBhE3DlA4JuTlcNcIfEa7WtEjC51-kk8xFKcoAwy0GhzEqzK9g%3D%3D)**_

**As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle.** Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority.

_**My primary is THIS Tuesday, March 4th, and I'm hoping to secure the endorsements of 10,000 conservatives before voters head to the polls. **_

**[I'm reaching out today to make the case that I'm worth your personal endorsement](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=49570df54b1341a989aefe2925a15320&_e=-staZZ8IloHwdcPhvvW0nFOeub-xIzY_ymMlTE4jpiI1pJ3vUGuE89Tx44ecUapvc06a-I9ND4sCh7DAPUqw8NpWVujmvvq9uo6N27EFhs6tHM5OCo63hDylGcppnRboapU9UedrTHjSbo8jV9Orvz0kZpp5jJAhqkA51myXGRDLImbvYToRLgUSK9Gxs1Syx5C3Yst3vEsUMn_5azJ-IeCBWhgKbh21LQhcyix_9kCkt5OsTHV54I5UJP9hWQYP06Qw5MBWKRhqhGkKvPRipeFx7ey2WjESBXoo_dK2PLPEuYORS7vpUBtUgh6BPxyE9T3G9MTUPDcmH-RBLhq8TQMcGlp2hc6BMUeqyWgzVBX0BovR79Wqr-cccQdjy39yBgf5rXH72DY4T2dnZYlRDe-lzkcab7zm9yqzNeKvyXcdpVMPlDkgDe9Xrc75xBDe8Ockch7e82HshJKZDLaFDaLMx7q3BindfcXbFM5xb3trgyzyi2jrTFz3rdJhYuHLkdXWnSBVPKW9rV0ilIGVyw%3D%3D)**.

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=49570df54b1341a989aefe2925a15320&_e=-staZZ8IloHwdcPhvvW0nFOeub-xIzY_ymMlTE4jpiI1pJ3vUGuE89Tx44ecUapvc06a-I9ND4sCh7DAPUqw8NpWVujmvvq9uo6N27EFhs6tHM5OCo63hDylGcppnRboapU9UedrTHjSbo8jV9Orvz0kZpp5jJAhqkA51myXGRDLImbvYToRLgUSK9Gxs1Syx5C3Yst3vEsUMn_5azJ-IeCBWhgKbh21LQhcyix_9kCkt5OsTHV54I5UJP9hWQYP06Qw5MBWKRhqhGkKvPRipeFx7ey2WjESBXoo_dK2PLPEuYORS7vpUBtUgh6BPxyE9T3G9MTUPDcmH-RBLhq8TQMcGlp2hc6BMUeqyWgzVBX0BovR79Wqr-cccQdjy39yYOfRmAcBDLakBJQ-dHAmzDqqvnmRgJf1O53NvqdFLFwQiFRiM6r6_k2ppZ4x701KUyLwc9GkdG9XTfrk00XxFkyq-NTb88Lod-cUl8KB81xKWIYDpjNbpp5lw8y9Dya4arCJzjMqcTwNCcbLVsYSoA%3D%3D)

In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [**many veterans like me**] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. _**Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.**_ I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free.

**[Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=49570df54b1341a989aefe2925a15320&_e=-staZZ8IloHwdcPhvvW0nFOeub-xIzY_ymMlTE4jpiI1pJ3vUGuE89Tx44ecUapvc06a-I9ND4sCh7DAPUqw8NpWVujmvvq9uo6N27EFhs6tHM5OCo63hDylGcppnRboapU9UedrTHjSbo8jV9Orvz0kZpp5jJAhqkA51myXGRDLImbvYToRLgUSK9Gxs1Syx5C3Yst3vEsUMn_5azJ-IeCBWhgKbh21LQhcyix_9kCkt5OsTHV54I5UJP9hWQYP06Qw5MBWKRhqhGkKvPRipeFx7ey2WjESBXoo_dK2PLPEuYORS7vpUBtUgh6BPxyE9T3G9MTUPDcmH-RBLhq8TQMcGlp2hc6BMUeqyWgzVBX0BovR79Wqr-cccQdjy39yeb0S48EDHplMZvFAGIv_EsMm4eS0VYk38EriW3ea34QEdPdLhO8VGinzhn_-eB60FnOBqqeCwXROpNSc2x2YOsL6XqksfmzPM3CQSF2SfULox9IHj3VGoZaz1V06jMo3Ocm26AVbOoxwzfeOR2vg0Q%3D%3D)**

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=49570df54b1341a989aefe2925a15320&_e=-staZZ8IloHwdcPhvvW0nFOeub-xIzY_ymMlTE4jpiI1pJ3vUGuE89Tx44ecUapvc06a-I9ND4sCh7DAPUqw8NpWVujmvvq9uo6N27EFhs6tHM5OCo63hDylGcppnRboapU9UedrTHjSbo8jV9Orvz0kZpp5jJAhqkA51myXGRDLImbvYToRLgUSK9Gxs1Syx5C3Yst3vEsUMn_5azJ-IeCBWhgKbh21LQhcyix_9kCkt5OsTHV54I5UJP9hWQYP06Qw5MBWKRhqhGkKvPRipeFx7ey2WjESBXoo_dK2PLPEuYORS7vpUBtUgh6BPxyE9T3G9MTUPDcmH-RBLhq8TQMcGlp2hc6BMUeqyWgzVBX0BovR79Wqr-cccQdjy39yG_ZS0F8rMu1XcEvFPt7-0VmC10T2Ry46BvBi3ueco6ylRnBpYc0w0mhYME7KSYxqNIsZpRSTHcQ9wCWRfhxI-kMoXkyN35E_59rFbexv9Q6lBXGnMttnW_wTgZmMMDL05RzOQ7Cwu6FxuVhHd-dj-w%3D%3D)

_**Chuck Schumer and Washington Democrats know that I pose a direct threat to their chances of holding on to power, and they'll do anything to stop me from winning this race - and spend $100M plus in the process. **_

Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will support my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

clean_body: On Friday, President Trump made headlines when he made an endorsement in the Montana U.S. Senate race | Fellow Conservative, As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams. My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority. My primary is THIS Tuesday, March 4th, and I'm hoping to secure the endorsements of 10,000 conservatives before voters head to the polls. . In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead. Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield. I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. Chuck Schumer and Washington Democrats know that I pose a direct threat to their chances of holding on to power, and they'll do anything to stop me from winning this race - and spend $100M plus in the process. Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will support my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it. I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read. In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis. Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you. I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. And believe me, there are some tales. I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why Our homeland is in danger. Radical Democrats in Washington want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream. The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong conservative candidate who can defeat my liberal Democrat opponent in 2024. Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list. The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election. *If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play. body:
I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents.
_[Click here to stop receiving emails about Jon Tester's Senate campaign in Montana from us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86122441/476906274/-305636696?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDY1MjA2NS1lODIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NexNs0UwPWy9bEZ9jtHG2eCAbwhf51sthgpQW9m2wH0=&emci=14578ef1-1a20-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=e4652065-e820-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=19445147)_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86122442/476906275/417329036?refcode=em20240602am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=e4652065-e820-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDY1MjA2NS1lODIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NexNs0UwPWy9bEZ9jtHG2eCAbwhf51sthgpQW9m2wH0=)
Can I explain something, folks?
I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents.
**In fact, I’m very proud to be the U.S. Senate’s only working dirt farmer.**
Every spring, I spend a lot of weeks working the stubble, getting equipment ready for planting, and out in the field seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive.
I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand.
The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy—but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded.
**And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with special interests, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do.**
**[That’s why I’m personally asking you to join my reelection team and split $10 between my campaign and Adam Frisch's today to help us defend Montana’s Senate seat and win in Colorado. Anything you can give makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86122443/476906276/417329036?refcode=em20240602am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=e4652065-e820-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDY1MjA2NS1lODIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NexNs0UwPWy9bEZ9jtHG2eCAbwhf51sthgpQW9m2wH0=)**

subject: FWD: making sure you've seen this

body:
---
Hi, friend, just wanted to make sure you saw my last email. I know you're busy, so I figured I'd bump this to the top in case you missed it.
In order to compete with my Trump-backed self-funding opponent, we need to build the strongest grassroots team possible. That's why it's so important that we hear directly from grassroots supporters like you.

So I'm personally asking: **Will you take just 60 seconds now to complete our official 2024 General Election Survey so we can win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue? **

**Here's a custom link just for you: ****[https://surveys.signforgood.com/brown-2024-general-election-priorities/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86125994/476915004/2058851362?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=100,50,25,5&code=jtk1787-su-nd&refcode=jtk1787-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjkyZDM0YS1lZDIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C5CeLFEf9bGlabKDePk0r5RPr2RzUnmJPK_sbQqlNRE=&emci=70d68146-f606-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=3b92d34a-ed20-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=18332626)**
Looking forward to hearing from you, friend.

– Sherrod
\---------Forwarded Message---------
From: **Brown, Sherrod**
Subject: I want to hear from you, friend
| | |
---
Friend, the general election has arrived, and I'm facing my toughest reelection yet.

I'm up against Bernie Moreno, an ultra-rich MAGA Republican who has already written himself multiple seven-figure checks to try to buy this seat.
**Moreno represents the wealthiest 1%** and is completely out of touch with working Ohioans. He'd fall right in line with Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell – from pushing for a national abortion ban to advocating against raising the minimum wage.
That's not the kind of leader Ohioans deserve – and that's why I'm 100% committed to defeating him and continuing our fight for workers and families. But in order to compete with Moreno and his MAGA megadonors, we need to build a winning campaign.
**That's why my team and I put together this urgent strategy survey, and why we hand-selected you to complete it. [So please, friend, could you take a minute and fill out our new 2024 General Election Survey before it closes at midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86125995/476915005/2058851362?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=100,50,25,5&code=jtk1787-su-nd&refcode=jtk1787-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjkyZDM0YS1lZDIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C5CeLFEf9bGlabKDePk0r5RPr2RzUnmJPK_sbQqlNRE=&emci=70d68146-f606-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=3b92d34a-ed20-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=18332626)**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86125996/476915006/2058851362?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=100,50,25,5&code=jtk1787-su-nd&refcode=jtk1787-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjkyZDM0YS1lZDIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C5CeLFEf9bGlabKDePk0r5RPr2RzUnmJPK_sbQqlNRE=&emci=70d68146-f606-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=3b92d34a-ed20-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=18332626)

I wish I could sit down with each one of you and hear directly about what's important to you, but this is the next best thing. Your feedback will help our team continue to fight for you in the most effective way possible.
We appreciate your input.
– Sherrod
**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Sherrod Brown:** Friend – thank you for being a part of our grassroots movement and for sharing our commitment to the Dignity of Work. Fighting for workers means building an economy that prioritizes the needs of workers over tax breaks for billionaires and corporations. No matter who you are or what kind of work you do, I promise to fight for you. But I need your help: Experts say I'm one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection and Senate control could come down to Ohio. The only way we can defend this critical seat is with grassroots contributions from supporters like you. **[If you're with me in this fight, please chip in any amount today to win in Ohio and defend our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86125997/476915007/-446718274?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&code=jtk1787-su-nd&refcode=jtk1787-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjkyZDM0YS1lZDIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C5CeLFEf9bGlabKDePk0r5RPr2RzUnmJPK_sbQqlNRE=)** If you’d like to become one of my TOP supporters and receive exclusive updates from our campaign team, **_text “OH” to 44105._** Thank you! [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86125998/476915008/-446718274?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&code=jtk1787-su-nd&refcode=jtk1787-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjkyZDM0YS1lZDIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C5CeLFEf9bGlabKDePk0r5RPr2RzUnmJPK_sbQqlNRE=)

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
$5.
That might sound humble, Peter, but it’s the amount I’m asking you to chip in to my friend Bob Casey’s campaign to keep PA, and the Senate, blue.
Why $5? 🤔 Because while one single donation of $5 may not sound like much alone, someone reading this email might just join you. And then all those gifts of $5 (or more!) add up to enough to fight back against the GOP’s million$.
**Basically, if enough people who open this email kick in $5 or more to Bob’s campaign, he’ll start June off strong. 💪**
[**If we’re gonna keep the Senate blue, we need to come together to help Bob win this race. Please chip in to Bob Casey’s re-election campaign today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240602-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240602-1&refcode2=3139_552475_8HkuxE&akid=3139%2E552475%2E8HkuxE)

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Biden’s Abortion Czar is at it again!
body:
Day by day, public support for the Biden administration continues to decline.
__
Stop the Biden Administration's radical abortion agenda! | | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=f50fffe99e4c4c50bc3b89f0a570b91a&_t=p9OYdGMu786VtIdB1njQufhoslGq2ANss7n0ArvCNLDxPBs_ekJwYpYBGqUcuS83aM42IPMGlpAzl2hAwIR1xY3T49_mUX2jnfSIjN1Bx8YflzmlYpTyq-Gq-XDGxjZ6)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f50fffe99e4c4c50bc3b89f0a570b91a&_e=AUc-fxeMzNvKzuJbRNlWB9beGx6O1AbSajTI2HXa6boAB2s9YQ_uJtPupr8UkeLnTsLwmPsRoh2DyCHEVChnvBAXxwElWo9tE4VrVYRZ5345RL9C5dXlI4v1HYFstKfMqbU6_ZihI27jVmDvhMEgeN7tSL3nsvmsN1sMi2QAVu5-R7FVi58bVnaXpB0Q_4MilWxWp2QqYOmpiN49XmJxzdsxl1tPsAKFjZ23xuiIwiuOWDPh1mAwco5WpyK31f45_jQY1rREVKtq7C0htGFopyDiUHkbN3yL5qRIEntAcpZxsGDGVsQawZNbQCUezk_UosM0biSRS2_dF9s0kcEbuZAdAxtSNnizVoo0rh-4jAaAMSXAfoJG4Pk8Mhb3SzmlNeJswIWLcmiB6hjhQQdY_g%3D%3D)

---
| |
Fellow American,

Day by day, public support for the Biden administration continues to decline. In an effort to salvage what support they have left, the administration has resorted to aggressive abortion propaganda and fearmongering tactics -- making abortion its key issue in the hopes that it will bolster a win in the 2024 election.

Just last week while visiting Arizona, Kamala Harris said, "What has happened here . . . is a new inflection point . . . it has demonstrated once and for all that overturning of _Roe_ was just the opening act . . . just the opening act . . . of a larger strategy to take women's rights and freedoms . . . part of a full-on attack state by state on reproductive freedom."

The Biden administration has even gone so far as to appoint Vice President Kamala Harris as 'abortion czar' as she unashamedly travels to peddle Planned Parenthood's lies across the country and even became the first sitting vice president to campaign at an abortion facility.

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f50fffe99e4c4c50bc3b89f0a570b91a&_e=AUc-fxeMzNvKzuJbRNlWB9beGx6O1AbSajTI2HXa6boAB2s9YQ_uJtPupr8UkeLnTsLwmPsRoh2DyCHEVChnvBAXxwElWo9tE4VrVYRZ5345RL9C5dXlI4v1HYFstKfMqbU6_ZihI27jVmDvhMEgeN7tSL3nsvmsN1sMi2QAVu5-R7FVi58bVnaXpB0Q_4MilWxWp2QqYOmpiN49XmJxzdsxl1tPsAKFjZ23xuiIwiuOWDPh1mAwco5WpyK31f45qSqBPSZveRGOVwR6WhzKuC6jOBlq-kvrMeJGKi7dYzimR0BQodX388TezkrBuy6Juck8qr-ww4zr-m_b3-kv5Me1IRW2QjK4oW8MW_NMe865epdFMGkyzd4HM8A4P89Gx5mYsLx5lHv-SPp02shGxQ%3D%3D)

She hasn't identified a single restriction on abortion that she would back and continues to be a puppet to the abortion industry that spends millions to elect abortion extremists to public office.

You can take action right now and join our fight against this harmful agenda!

As Harris and her abortion-first cronies spread false horror stories about pro-life protections, they deliberately withhold from Americans their alarming plans to implement a sweeping federal all-trimester abortion edict if they regain control in 2024.

As pro-life Americans, it is our time - right now before it's too late - to bring their deceptive efforts to an end, to stop the lies and misinformation, and to ensure a pro-life America.

With recent polls showing that at least seven out of ten Americans support substantial restrictions on abortion, it's clear that America wants to fight against the radical abortion extremism of the Biden-Harris administration.

You CAN fight back. You can make a difference by giving a gift of any size today to fuel the pro-life counterattack and stop this administration's obsession with Planned Parenthood at the link below:

[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/kamalas-obsession](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f50fffe99e4c4c50bc3b89f0a570b91a&_e=AUc-fxeMzNvKzuJbRNlWB9beGx6O1AbSajTI2HXa6boAB2s9YQ_uJtPupr8UkeLnTsLwmPsRoh2DyCHEVChnvBAXxwElWo9tE4VrVYRZ5345RL9C5dXlI4v1HYFstKfMqbU6_ZihI27jVmDvhMEgeN7tSL3nsvmsN1sMi2QAVu5-R7FVi58bVnaXpB0Q_4MilWxWp2QqYOmpiN49XmJxzdsxl1tPsAKFjZ23xuiIwiuOWDPh1mAwco5WpyK31f45GVgr5-vsJ-GMZY_qtFrl7szXcrKNjt0_MBtgJSzydCa1F3fPwPpT3WwKyaG16QrHZMGxHNmz1KIaBH2rrYd42ovN3d7hVH7NUZWPu5xpJdJiWBQC1IXXQJ1M2tWxC1jeqHASZWxVI36nymqYk_GiQw%3D%3D)

A gift to SBA Pro-Life America will be put to work immediately to stand against the lies by:
* Supporting our tireless fight against the Biden administration's abortion-first agenda.
* Helping voters receive the truth about abortion and ensuring pro-life politicians are equipped to protect innocent lives when elected to public office.
* Investing in advocacy efforts that actually serve women and save babies.

Join us in this crucial fight. Together, we CAN build a future where every life is valued and protected in America.

For Life,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America

Just last week while visiting Arizona, Kamala Harris said, "What has happened here . . . is a new inflection point . . . it has demonstrated once and for all that overturning of Roe was just the opening act . . . just the opening act . . . of a larger strategy to take women's rights and freedoms . . . part of a full-on attack state by state on reproductive freedom." The Biden administration has even gone so far as to appoint Vice President Kamala Harris as 'abortion czar' as she unashamedly travels to peddle Planned Parenthood's lies across the country and even became the first sitting vice president to campaign at an abortion facility. She hasn't identified a single restriction on abortion that she would back and continues to be a puppet to the abortion industry that spends millions to elect abortion extremists to public office. You can take action right now and join our fight against this harmful agenda! As Harris and her abortion-first cronies spread false horror stories about pro-life protections, they deliberately withhold from Americans their alarming plans to implement a sweeping federal all-trimester abortion edict if they regain control in 2024. As pro-life Americans, it is our time - right now before it's too late - to bring their deceptive efforts to an end, to stop the lies and misinformation, and to ensure a pro-life America. With recent polls showing that at least seven out of ten Americans support substantial restrictions on abortion, it's clear that America wants to fight against the radical abortion extremism of the Biden-Harris administration. You CAN fight back. You can make a difference by giving a gift of any size today to fuel the pro-life counterattack and stop this administration's obsession with Planned Parenthood at the link below: A gift to SBA Pro-Life America will be put to work immediately to stand against the lies by: Supporting our tireless fight against the Biden administration's abortion-first agenda. Helping voters receive the truth about abortion and ensuring pro-life politicians are equipped to protect innocent lives when elected to public office. * Investing in advocacy efforts that actually serve women and save babies. Join us in this crucial fight. Together, we CAN build a future where every life is valued and protected in America. For Life, Marjorie Dannenfelser President, SBA Pro-Life America | | | | | | | | Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr. PO Box 803 Arlington, VA, 22206 .

clean_body: Need your support now more than ever | Friend, The Kangaroo court has found Trump guilty on the bogus charges brought forward by the Liberal Prosecutor and Trump-hating Judge. These Deep State actors had one goal: Convict an innocent man to destroy the MAGA Movement. They believe that if they lock President Trump behind bars, MAGA will crumble. Right now, we are facing a national emergency. We need you now more than ever. Trump has always fought for you – | This sham trial was as corrupt as they come. Judge Merchan is a known Trump hater. This case is laughable - nobody else on the planet would have been convicted. This sets a scary precedent moving forward. This was a complete and total weaponization of the judicial system against Joe Biden's political opponent. If this is how the Left thinks they will defeat MAGA, they are very wrong. Let's send the Left a clear message that this corruption only makes us fight harder. We will never stop supporting Trump, defending our country, and fighting to defeat your woke agenda. We will not stop until we get rid of the Radical Corruption in our nation. While this verdict is not what we wanted, the fight continues. We cannot do it without your support. body:
My primary is this Tuesday and I'm still hoping to secure your endorsement ahead of the vote | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dce2185c6a5f4f23b3e23036a75af48d&_e=mArkwEhJDYHuJ7REZfRibGS0a_1mbd-hkxmwdQvDjucseAkO-a0W425YpQIt2BBLNz5h9pC_WCXY_enHplLkkzUku2zj3EaaV3PReFCqlHEQOWVkeV_7ZjKPpu7K59TIEeGT3bkT0gsXjcJ-fDDS5LoSqrpxlwEo4I9lJ8pHSTnHV2YYDf01uuZaw_dsAt-5I7-3Ol3xelplWMSvi2-JFc5bOF_gUGV6JmHPqupgIsSVajXX_EhtVV08iNCNURM2huzmPR4EDS6OsuXLzCROqczVGuOL5CFXaqXSiiDxWZyCKdmYuk7MZ5B7fEZfJmqhELa74bkB3iTLrpcfJiPo0fFqeYxzyw4iEZ3HkTb7BDBG4FnOaf77KM4HUvuiwxn29XwX7XN3gvgaVTtZq41lUGnKik5TT-vDxPmuJIwQg_p3nqvz50AJ0SEYCnN-MS_nqKWWaQCS5rg1GcSglGR5hsGGqnOCwKuBlX0wnU8U861-kjJmsCxwb1S-OulkPMm4J-8YSS2J0Q7Cdbn82PDTuwT8ZW-NmkfnzdCp7UjOiaM%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

_**[Will you endorse me before my primary on Tuesday?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dce2185c6a5f4f23b3e23036a75af48d&_e=mArkwEhJDYHuJ7REZfRibGS0a_1mbd-hkxmwdQvDjucseAkO-a0W425YpQIt2BBLNz5h9pC_WCXY_enHplLkkzUku2zj3EaaV3PReFCqlHEQOWVkeV_7ZjKPpu7K59TIEeGT3bkT0gsXjcJ-fDDS5LoSqrpxlwEo4I9lJ8pHSTnHV2YYDf01uuZaw_dsAt-5I7-3Ol3xelplWMSvi2-JFc5bOF_gUGV6JmHPqupgIsSVajXX_EhtVV08iNCNURM2huzmPR4EDS6OsuXLzCROqczVGuOL5CFXaqXSiiDxWZyCKdmYuk7MZ5B7fEZfJmqhELa74bkB3iTLrpcfJiPo0fFqeYxzyw4iEZ3HkTb7BDBG4FnOaf77KM4HUvuiwxn2PqzOHdiEWBa86jFZZ7jfQ1ysO-ZFyKEkifLV7KFh7VKfdgNMsyFI8LhGG46s_urDkYpysHdBIJuNJH5tz1BKUIBGa1miJ6GSALBCjBPE1bJtXEdmrEKnv_O6lZM_Zo95EX9an39WCEMt2N6QKTz2WFO3qofg3AErkSZT6Y7rSlg%3D)**_

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dce2185c6a5f4f23b3e23036a75af48d&_e=mArkwEhJDYHuJ7REZfRibGS0a_1mbd-hkxmwdQvDjucseAkO-a0W425YpQIt2BBLNz5h9pC_WCXY_enHplLkkzUku2zj3EaaV3PReFCqlHEQOWVkeV_7ZjKPpu7K59TIEeGT3bkT0gsXjcJ-fDDS5LoSqrpxlwEo4I9lJ8pHSTnHV2YYDf01uuZaw_dsAt-5I7-3Ol3xelplWMSvi2-JFc5bOF_gUGV6JmHPqupgIsSVajXX_EhtVV08iNCNURM2huzmPR4EDS6OsuXLzCROqczVGuOL5CFXaqXSiiDxWZyCKdmYuk7MZ5B7fEZfJmqhELa74bkB3iTLrpcfJiPo0fFqeYxzyw4iEZ3HkTb7BDBG4FnOaf77KM4HUvuiwxn26RLJqGjQecmm9TA_UcQdd9uoKg0co0b1LO3pZMNjCSyB-GcgrIPYNnj8mIvYSuE_9fAf-5KNnT0sBNr2skDC13E5cGtyNF_ORTC-JL5cvKcmY8u8ktxiOQQpeVqvbJ4QSgAd-MBhNhpCHPmA-ghUOcESnr8p6j_3Fvawla-IYMY%3D)
**As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle.** Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority.

_**My primary is THIS Tuesday, March 4th, and I'm hoping to secure the endorsements of 10,000 conservatives before voters head to the polls. **_

**[I'm reaching out today to make the case that I'm worth your personal endorsement](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dce2185c6a5f4f23b3e23036a75af48d&_e=mArkwEhJDYHuJ7REZfRibGS0a_1mbd-hkxmwdQvDjucseAkO-a0W425YpQIt2BBLNz5h9pC_WCXY_enHplLkkzUku2zj3EaaV3PReFCqlHEQOWVkeV_7ZjKPpu7K59TIEeGT3bkT0gsXjcJ-fDDS5LoSqrpxlwEo4I9lJ8pHSTnHV2YYDf01uuZaw_dsAt-5I7-3Ol3xelplWMSvi2-JFc5bOF_gUGV6JmHPqupgIsSVajXX_EhtVV08iNCNURM2huzmPR4EDS6OsuXLzCROqczVGuOL5CFXaqXSiiDxWZyCKdmYuk7MZ5B7fEZfJmqhELa74bkB3iTLrpcfJiPo0fFqeYxzyw4iEZ3HkTb7BDBG4FnOaf77KM4HUvuiwxn2EGdvqARaV0ovRs2Jc6nJP7L3VAXcdiYNuXXHde2MJ8IOswhwMhYZOvMF3kp2Nl1Z9GaaaatY4rdNoLxPSpRA_0x0YSfimTo_eXG0gotGnj_1s9m5fyuAruXFrSFZBOYGkv3L6QwF2EkEf05Gib1qP9LW_90SitlRzKiNsjXAEFA%3D)**.

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dce2185c6a5f4f23b3e23036a75af48d&_e=mArkwEhJDYHuJ7REZfRibGS0a_1mbd-hkxmwdQvDjucseAkO-a0W425YpQIt2BBLNz5h9pC_WCXY_enHplLkkzUku2zj3EaaV3PReFCqlHEQOWVkeV_7ZjKPpu7K59TIEeGT3bkT0gsXjcJ-fDDS5LoSqrpxlwEo4I9lJ8pHSTnHV2YYDf01uuZaw_dsAt-5I7-3Ol3xelplWMSvi2-JFc5bOF_gUGV6JmHPqupgIsSVajXX_EhtVV08iNCNURM2huzmPR4EDS6OsuXLzCROqczVGuOL5CFXaqXSiiDxWZyCKdmYuk7MZ5B7fEZfJmqhELa74bkB3iTLrpcfJiPo0fFqeYxzyw4iEZ3HkTb7BDBG4FnOaf77KM4HUvuiwxn2WrMNPKnYKxesZeYlWIgz_EwyZPK_RVOcopB4d984R2AnrZCeUIuwFOkb6vf0gQVGJUoEFXEw3XkVeFVcRxsF9oCA3kEOSaYe_CMJGV4grjQRvdxtI_UcIm9gC3vt3Spg05GyERDtCui2nFZKsP6fyvEf7pyBvsT7oFNX-CD1Bv4%3D)

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dce2185c6a5f4f23b3e23036a75af48d&_e=mArkwEhJDYHuJ7REZfRibGS0a_1mbd-hkxmwdQvDjucseAkO-a0W425YpQIt2BBLNz5h9pC_WCXY_enHplLkkzUku2zj3EaaV3PReFCqlHEQOWVkeV_7ZjKPpu7K59TIEeGT3bkT0gsXjcJ-fDDS5LoSqrpxlwEo4I9lJ8pHSTnHV2YYDf01uuZaw_dsAt-5I7-3Ol3xelplWMSvi2-JFc5bOF_gUGV6JmHPqupgIsSVajXX_EhtVV08iNCNURM2huzmPR4EDS6OsuXLzCROqczVGuOL5CFXaqXSiiDxWZyCKdmYuk7MZ5B7fEZfJmqhELa74bkB3iTLrpcfJiPo0fFqeYxzyw4iEZ3HkTb7BDBG4FnOaf77KM4HUvuiwxn2idiTA6LOvmDezYlIzHYLkXii3cg1kv6_OoaJvV-p4uBu_fpUkpwipBCJRXU7aNLR1inxr46tnpVTm8IknYA37ZNetrxTJLO38ZVHocWpZSFw-pNfQFD9iPhnXArj4Ou-PO9EB0jy-5nI2YbPrJXOB5uh8ZIeu1bKofEpXUizJoo%3D)
In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [**many veterans like me**] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. _**Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.**_ I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free.

**[Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dce2185c6a5f4f23b3e23036a75af48d&_e=mArkwEhJDYHuJ7REZfRibGS0a_1mbd-hkxmwdQvDjucseAkO-a0W425YpQIt2BBLNz5h9pC_WCXY_enHplLkkzUku2zj3EaaV3PReFCqlHEQOWVkeV_7ZjKPpu7K59TIEeGT3bkT0gsXjcJ-fDDS5LoSqrpxlwEo4I9lJ8pHSTnHV2YYDf01uuZaw_dsAt-5I7-3Ol3xelplWMSvi2-JFc5bOF_gUGV6JmHPqupgIsSVajXX_EhtVV08iNCNURM2huzmPR4EDS6OsuXLzCROqczVGuOL5CFXaqXSiiDxWZyCKdmYuk7MZ5B7fEZfJmqhELa74bkB3iTLrpcfJiPo0fFqeYxzyw4iEZ3HkTb7BDBG4FnOaf77KM4HUvuiwxn20-37dLipW1noFPEfZ-KXL_JaIE8TRunbnpXOyBEFIVHV5lIiSDliElTFkDpBCT4kNpTGOIazfL3ol_HujwBQTGu2XZj6j-x_zlOfUuatyjQXcsVGc4PuSSqtzJ9wylT1eke_WlRuw0gOeAICoXyIpZgsuk1mxUpoe90rzTZr7xM%3D)**

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dce2185c6a5f4f23b3e23036a75af48d&_e=mArkwEhJDYHuJ7REZfRibGS0a_1mbd-hkxmwdQvDjucseAkO-a0W425YpQIt2BBLNz5h9pC_WCXY_enHplLkkzUku2zj3EaaV3PReFCqlHEQOWVkeV_7ZjKPpu7K59TIEeGT3bkT0gsXjcJ-fDDS5LoSqrpxlwEo4I9lJ8pHSTnHV2YYDf01uuZaw_dsAt-5I7-3Ol3xelplWMSvi2-JFc5bOF_gUGV6JmHPqupgIsSVajXX_EhtVV08iNCNURM2huzmPR4EDS6OsuXLzCROqczVGuOL5CFXaqXSiiDxWZyCKdmYuk7MZ5B7fEZfJmqhELa74bkB3iTLrpcfJiPo0fFqeYxzyw4iEZ3HkTb7BDBG4FnOaf77KM4HUvuiwxn2yVeihGI5XlUlIBSghwY7SdEhJXmlkezlwNVx_3HKXClUwoSjNGv1UTsyXN50HlOCU332OAWhDawLbYdiBxmoeZqSpyu4j9DqA3P_l7ne0VYGeO9vyr--Mm0GSJzPaqQiFPz828zchwwCQti8DNL7QjzGPkzBIWlS2mZV1eAIm94%3D)

_**Chuck Schumer and Washington Democrats know that I pose a direct threat to their chances of holding on to power, and they'll do anything to stop me from winning this race - and spend $100M plus in the process. **_

Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will support my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dce2185c6a5f4f23b3e23036a75af48d&_e=mArkwEhJDYHuJ7REZfRibGS0a_1mbd-hkxmwdQvDjucseAkO-a0W425YpQIt2BBLNz5h9pC_WCXY_enHplLkkzUku2zj3EaaV3PReFCqlHEQOWVkeV_7ZjKPpu7K59TIEeGT3bkT0gsXjcJ-fDDS5LoSqrpxlwEo4I9lJ8pHSTnHV2YYDf01uuZaw_dsAt-5I7-3Ol3xelplWMSvi2-JFc5bOF_gUGV6JmHPqupgIsSVajXX_EhtVV08iNCNURM2huzmPR4EDS6OsuXLzCROqczVGuOL5CFXaqXSiiDxWZyCKdmYuk7MZ5B7fEZfJmqhELa74bkB3iTLrpcfJiPo0fFqeYxzyw4iEZ3HkTb7BDBG4FnOaf77KM4HUvuiwxn2me67yU4KFy1Xp6J_1ziBqzbjMyu5iKLpnrgN8OIMD_XStQFatmxlOSINeLmdO4l3g_3Aq49ksal1DOg3fbubmcTEfiP4k1097WlQx2qGU4Kmv4Y1i0Ss7bZwMQnI_jV4dZG5SNDgLAuM2dJPGT3vYX8RfUV0taBxEGuSw3Vd1fM%3D)
[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dce2185c6a5f4f23b3e23036a75af48d&_e=mArkwEhJDYHuJ7REZfRibGS0a_1mbd-hkxmwdQvDjucseAkO-a0W425YpQIt2BBLNz5h9pC_WCXY_enHplLkkzUku2zj3EaaV3PReFCqlHEQOWVkeV_7ZjKPpu7K59TIEeGT3bkT0gsXjcJ-fDDS5LoSqrpxlwEo4I9lJ8pHSTnHV2YYDf01uuZaw_dsAt-5I7-3Ol3xelplWMSvi2-JFc5bOF_gUGV6JmHPqupgIsSVajXX_EhtVV08iNCNURM2huzmPR4EDS6OsuXLzCROqczVGuOL5CFXaqXSiiDxWZyCKdmYuk7MZ5B7fEZfJmqhELa74bkB3iTLrpcfJiPo0fFqeYxzyw4iEZ3HkTb7BDBG4FnOaf77KM4HUvuiwxn2-r30QJhTqb1uVt1p8_IiLZuYfolQYmQV8iNOMFvUlY6GZDcac88B3a-AtwDgkj82itcgks9fmR10BOTR7VpBTbh2JJTRsn2kew7fCs_ZBDcTjhC4d5iXeJ9PIBl0ausl1cPbZ9zCRIe6XJYeCSJcPpjZnJjBdK0TEXM0cDcVx48%3D)

Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. **When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you.**

I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. _And believe me, there are some tales._

**I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism.** I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why [**I am determined to take on the anti-American, radical Left in Washington as Montana’s next U.S. Senator.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dce2185c6a5f4f23b3e23036a75af48d&_e=mArkwEhJDYHuJ7REZfRibGS0a_1mbd-hkxmwdQvDjucseAkO-a0W425YpQIt2BBLNz5h9pC_WCXY_enHplLkkzUku2zj3EaaV3PReFCqlHEQOWVkeV_7ZjKPpu7K59TIEeGT3bkT0gsXjcJ-fDDS5LoSqrpxlwEo4I9lJ8pHSTnHV2YYDf01uuZaw_dsAt-5I7-3Ol3xelplWMSvi2-JFc5bOF_gUGV6JmHPqupgIsSVajXX_EhtVV08iNCNURM2huzmPR4EDS6OsuXLzCROqczVGuOL5CFXaqXSiiDxWZyCKdmYuk7MZ5B7fEZfJmqhELa74bkB3iTLrpcfJiPo0fFqeYxzyw4iEZ3HkTb7BDBG4FnOaf77KM4HUvuiwxn2tssiiGJeR41zL4g4oyoanQYxgsQ7SyP3YIgGW8dWoKslekXuphZpgpvQUsTZHoSnu62-AlxN6mqsD_i3_cyztWu4ddUkgaM90DhZZCXDBMn0RJbo0dglSeAnsp-RXHp4TpNDammnTfucXS1d_iNyzAlHcqLWkXsALpEHqHfnGhs%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dce2185c6a5f4f23b3e23036a75af48d&_e=mArkwEhJDYHuJ7REZfRibGS0a_1mbd-hkxmwdQvDjucseAkO-a0W425YpQIt2BBLNz5h9pC_WCXY_enHplLkkzUku2zj3EaaV3PReFCqlHEQOWVkeV_7ZjKPpu7K59TIEeGT3bkT0gsXjcJ-fDDS5LoSqrpxlwEo4I9lJ8pHSTnHV2YYDf01uuZaw_dsAt-5I7-3Ol3xelplWMSvi2-JFc5bOF_gUGV6JmHPqupgIsSVajXX_EhtVV08iNCNURM2huzmPR4EDS6OsuXLzCROqczVGuOL5CFXaqXSiiDxWZyCKdmYuk7MZ5B7fEZfJmqhELa74bkB3iTLrpcfJiPo0fFqeYxzyw4iEZ3HkTb7BDBG4FnOaf77KM4HUvuiwxn2XrqlTnyEloXgmosZl4AuoH0QG8ySFoek-vYJp-9jbqgIZCS2S73icpEfEpCdj16pGgie8zCMPvjRGLjwcGjvWft5_g1G8phSGujNVCFrT3Ozz4Rcr85PcUKqb2B_Nd4w7GIVUzwBlaAGzncsFZbkK7r4pmYEeunaehCxFocYDc0%3D)

Our homeland is in danger. Radical Democrats in Washington want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream.

**The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security.**

**The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong conservative candidate who can defeat my liberal Democrat opponent in 2024.**

[**We need a proven warrior to take back this Senate seat and take on the Democrats in Washington. I hope hearing my story proves I am the man for the job.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dce2185c6a5f4f23b3e23036a75af48d&_e=mArkwEhJDYHuJ7REZfRibGS0a_1mbd-hkxmwdQvDjucseAkO-a0W425YpQIt2BBLNz5h9pC_WCXY_enHplLkkzUku2zj3EaaV3PReFCqlHEQOWVkeV_7ZjKPpu7K59TIEeGT3bkT0gsXjcJ-fDDS5LoSqrpxlwEo4I9lJ8pHSTnHV2YYDf01uuZaw_dsAt-5I7-3Ol3xelplWMSvi2-JFc5bOF_gUGV6JmHPqupgIsSVajXX_EhtVV08iNCNURM2huzmPR4EDS6OsuXLzCROqczVGuOL5CFXaqXSiiDxWZyCKdmYuk7MZ5B7fEZfJmqhELa74bkB3iTLrpcfJiPo0fFqeYxzyw4iEZ3HkTb7BDBG4FnOaf77KM4HUvuiwxn2LYThRN6oM5IaebW2iM-TlqS8472ApUws0gKGfnTmNDtsCSTQLVNdJf8QJM79R0ZK2eSCDNYIhe3g9NoVGyvgyzL0OtNnfeSeJczKxPX_gmOAicymHAMymk856TXG961-p8hAZdUjm9IV9kPvR0c_UPZWTzb864XLKdUGUVVDXkA%3D)

clean_body: My primary is this Tuesday and I'm still hoping to secure your endorsement ahead of the vote | Fellow Conservative, As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams. My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority. My primary is THIS Tuesday, March 4th, and I'm hoping to secure the endorsements of 10,000 conservatives before voters head to the polls. . In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead. Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield. I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. Chuck Schumer and Washington Democrats know that I pose a direct threat to their chances of holding on to power, and they'll do anything to stop me from winning this race - and spend $100M plus in the process. Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will support my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it. I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read. In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis. Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you. I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. And believe me, there are some tales. I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why Our homeland is in danger. Radical Democrats in Washington want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream. The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong conservative candidate who can defeat my liberal Democrat opponent in 2024. Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list. The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election. *If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play. This is my most critical mission to date, and Thank you, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA | Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. name: LucasKunce.com
subject: Endorsements
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Lucas is counting on yours, Peter.
#
Peter,
Social Security Works was the first national organization to endorse Lucas Kunce.
Weeks later, statewide labor unions like the Missouri AFL-CIO and the Missouri Fire Fighters made their earliest endorsements for a Senate challenger _ever_ by supporting Lucas’ campaign against Josh Hawley for this U.S. Senate seat.
In the months that followed, Lucas earned critical endorsements from former statewide leaders like Jason Kander, Joe Maxwell, and Susan Montee. And secured support from even more major national groups like League of Conservation Voters and End Citizens United.
Now, Lucas has support from all 114 Missouri counties, and the city of St. Louis. He’s been endorsed by dozens of statewide and local labor unions across the state — just this week, he was officially endorsed by the United Auto Workers.
**But Lucas still needs one very important endorsement — from you, Peter.**
**[Will you join the grassroots, worker-led coalition of tens of thousands of everyday people standing behind Lucas Kunce’s campaign for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat by adding your personal endorsement today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240602_endorse-lucas?t=1&akid=5656%2E614464%2E9rWLxi)**
**[Add your endorsement »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240602_endorse-lucas?t=2&akid=5656%2E614464%2E9rWLxi)**
Lucas’ bold message of taking back power from corrupt politicians like Hawley is already resonating with Missouri voters — and all the GOP insiders propping up his campaign know it. So now, they’re determined to do, say, and spend whatever it takes to tear down Lucas and the grassroots movement we’re building together.
They know Lucas Kunce can defeat Josh Hawley this November — and that every endorsement, donation, and everyday person like you sharing Lucas’ message could make all the difference in what polls are already showing is a neck-and-neck race. **That’s why we have to ask:**
**[Will you join our worker-led, people-powered movement to elect Lucas Kunce to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat by adding your personal endorsement today? When you add your name, we send a signal to everyone watching our race that this movement is growing even stronger every day.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240602_endorse-lucas?t=3&akid=5656%2E614464%2E9rWLxi)**
**[Add your endorsement »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240602_endorse-lucas?t=4&akid=5656%2E614464%2E9rWLxi)**
It’s going to take an unprecedented amount of support from real people like you to elect Lucas, flip this seat, and take back power for everyday Missourians — and we’re so grateful that we’ve always been able to count on you, Peter.
Thanks for everything,
Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240602-5656-footer&t=5&refcode2=5656_614464_9rWLxi&akid=5656%2E614464%2E9rWLxi)**

clean_body: Lucas is counting on yours, Peter. Peter, Social Security Works was the first national organization to endorse Lucas Kunce. Weeks later, statewide labor unions like the Missouri AFL-CIO and the Missouri Fire Fighters made their earliest endorsements for a Senate challenger ever by supporting Lucas’ campaign against Josh Hawley for this U.S. Senate seat. In the months that followed, Lucas earned critical endorsements from former statewide leaders like Jason Kander, Joe Maxwell, and Susan Montee. And secured support from even more major national groups like League of Conservation Voters and End Citizens United. Now, Lucas has support from all 114 Missouri counties, and the city of St. Louis. He’s been endorsed by dozens of statewide and local labor unions across the state — just this week, he was officially endorsed by the United Auto Workers. But Lucas still needs one very important endorsement — from you, Peter. Lucas’ bold message of taking back power from corrupt politicians like Hawley is already resonating with Missouri voters — and all the GOP insiders propping up his campaign know it. So now, they’re determined to do, say, and spend whatever it takes to tear down Lucas and the grassroots movement we’re building together. They know Lucas Kunce can defeat Josh Hawley this November — and that every endorsement, donation, and everyday person like you sharing Lucas’ message could make all the difference in what polls are already showing is a neck-and-neck race. That’s why we have to ask: It’s going to take an unprecedented amount of support from real people like you to elect Lucas, flip this seat, and take back power for everyday Missourians — and we’re so grateful that we’ve always been able to count on you, Peter. Thanks for everything, Team Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

Peter, Primary Day is days away and **unless I can raise an additional $9,428 before midnight, I’m not sure I’ll have the resources to win.** I’ve spent the entire afternoon reviewing the numbers with my finance team, and here’s the short of it:

1. A few years ago, this seat was Blue, **and we barely flipped** – meaning our race is a top target for Pelosi because she knows it’s a purple district.
2. We have a strong team on the ground, _and a big chunk of our fundraising budget goes towards buying pizza for volunteers, providing yard signs to folks, and keeping this campaign running._
3. When we miss our weekly goals, even by a couple of hundred bucks, **we have to pull back on all our campaigning efforts** – and we really can’t afford to backpedal with the election just _**a few**_ days away.

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Support pro-Palestine student activists and protect our right to protest.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
The National Lawyers Guild’s Mass Defense Program is providing on-the-ground legal support for students. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEW1J8ee1BnbiSNaW1wKfsNNIaIn-UvPXZs984QEbN0XtAHkri6xqDkmdMDEj-e5j9HDYbAJaksWHe2uxNcqOKGXoWJz5IC8tSaS67mQUneAbbDG13WUI-2eXjAsRxMa8mFWWulUxoeH4HTCfDiE6PN_Y3DMUdenjhQmdrRPMtCLmpmFvO_PwLTXNP5QwpWG4HXg54EJDFsVBibeksoKf2fl5LKAbzTtbEtNnjMpn9zRMkmuxx2Mdl4I3ydsgSI4d22SiGTwZkogMy43noJ3k8jJA/46v/WmGf30k5SHeV08mWYZFL_Q/h0/h001.D-S2SSOH8qr5JaLUtb7U5tLCNDMOjhkS0Eak1ItWNDE)
---
Friend, My colleagues in Congress are more outraged over the protests on college campuses than they are about the atrocities they’re funding in Palestine. After funding bombs that destroyed all of Gaza’s universities, many lawmakers are now trying to silence and criminalize people at universities here. Rather than listen to their students’ demands to divest from weapons contractors and end university complicity in genocide, school administrators are having students arrested and evicted. **We can’t let universities send militarized police after their students to protect their investments in war. We must listen to and protect these students now.** **Right now, the National Lawyers Guild is helping students who are facing arrests and disciplinary proceedings for standing up against the genocide in Palestine.** Providing legal support and on-the-ground help on campuses, the National Lawyers Guild is training their network of activists, community members, organizers, legal workers, law students, and lawyers to respond to this escalating repression. [**Can you donate today to support pro-Palestine student activists and help power the Detroit and Michigan chapter of the National Lawyers Guild? They rely on grassroots contributions to keep protecting our right to protest.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMdksLWAVy5ThUUL83PtKRb9biHutY50Of4s75bpzieJWIN7uNhiuXVGZ6NTkbeGhkM1bRWlAhDKLmczPDrnDKNkD0zTAeu3MJeYmi8eJe2xSmfM9EODT8dO6Mzez_utx7B-5Jpk010FEnNfwJid83XMx0qwcLj8_5o0xqKGzI9ovHAxTR8HIfpY7tIH4N2xKjY-niZi0donajC-I8ANh1daPWwkOBF1Cm_OBcj1jpaYfIcDMobjuxwbU1xdsqsqXgs7brXqw4T6l7NnYUCp84l9y1Y3QzosMCk8KglX_39L9wm2w1pwjw2rWmg5p_uVaxreiMEQAiLKQK0gEIeSLp97yV1MctpO8GWOn49HxjDM9jFF0pcI-HGnz8YrKbDfTMQ/46v/WmGf30k5SHeV08mWYZFL_Q/h1/h001.QlgUo2SAocWkVK8Yt301DEZucMXC02I8d6FabS0VPvo) [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMdksLWAVy5ThUUL83PtKRb9biHutY50Of4s75bpzieJW3mZVpDygm21fQpyRpPrZfJXt-0O15caeKmTT6rRlEUf57x6IwAIUM2ixPUWJJb78N-OGi2-6HswkdgQHajNCsqG1fHmZCs9pSDZXYnuE7zyStGqOCS72SNsMdzb0X2h_pszczCWjctKIEgKwbQYrvQC_LfOOlHTw73Jgfy_HXLFdA1nvOVUIgv3m2zjfB6D0wqDM-d1sJh8Z0tNBSZGTaq9nbOlGuxdUR7eHODrBnNKmWRHTQUj7TRvw73D-1ldERLiUWsXP637rmRmafG2jrysd25CJ_r-jH4wRQJbcGK7w02wqboNCwK2TifoOidkMioGqTg7py9od_H5sTVOYuw/46v/WmGf30k5SHeV08mWYZFL_Q/h2/h001.ylx54tXFeY9hmBP-jQPIoNhdsLZfgGccaWxzN3RBZrc) | [DONATE TO NATIONAL LAWYERS GUILD](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMdksLWAVy5ThUUL83PtKRb9biHutY50Of4s75bpzieJWlwMnXuSYwnTf8bPUOJBNfqbygQgH-M9mXz5wDuhbxPUmviJgR0jNPultJ64GtXzqV1AWyZXTEj5LC-271nM9Zw7268EaRUylb_lIvVvQNP4PXQHagdFhl9bSoVI17-e2mbKMlrDgcDx_dOTQZ8hhFH01DJRarZcoXdcQ1ltFsx_Pp2kKIxE7QE5xGvqZiazBKmC4OvZMHRkNw6Wuc350FUOwWYHUu26WSEvHXL84RpMdd65HXVS327gyEVD9g3qJif1UWC_7KDmZYlPHfBTi9USQ8JPPJVwqtkf8AxTUxO6ADuevoN5XqRYkzTuG-VtlLA_TNuWFotRFp_nvH5Ltjw/46v/WmGf30k5SHeV08mWYZFL_Q/h3/h001.ampKcJpXl5lq0BYGwLr0pJQLlR7YgIy5SZwbAKMaLU4)
---
As universities use repressive tactics against students, they’re trying to stop a powerful movement that’s asking: Why are our universities so heavily invested in weapons and war in the first place?
I’m a proud member of the Detroit and Michigan chapter of the National Lawyers Guild, which works across the state to protect the rights of those fighting for social change, including people demanding Palestinian liberation.
**Last week I had the chance to spend time with students at my alma mater, Wayne State University, who have been demanding divestment from weapons manufacturers.** While I was on campus, officers in a police SUV tried to drive through a crowd of students. And at the University of Michigan recently, students were sprayed with toxic chemicals for calling to save lives.
**It’s clear that we need to keep each other safe.**

clean_body: The National Lawyers Guild’s Mass Defense Program is providing on-the-ground legal support for students. | | | Friend, My colleagues in Congress are more outraged over the protests on college campuses than they are about the atrocities they’re funding in Palestine. After funding bombs that destroyed all of Gaza’s universities, many lawmakers are now trying to silence and criminalize people at universities here. Rather than listen to their students’ demands to divest from weapons contractors and end university complicity in genocide, school administrators are having students arrested and evicted. We can’t let universities send militarized police after their students to protect their investments in war. We must listen to and protect these students now. Right now, the National Lawyers Guild is helping students who are facing arrests and disciplinary proceedings for standing up against the genocide in Palestine. Providing legal support and on-the-ground help on campuses, the National Lawyers Guild is training their network of activists, community members, organizers, legal workers, law students, and lawyers to respond to this escalating repression. | As universities use repressive tactics against students, they’re trying to stop a powerful movement that’s asking: Why are our universities so heavily invested in weapons and war in the first place? I’m a proud member of the Detroit and Michigan chapter of the National Lawyers Guild, which works across the state to protect the rights of those fighting for social change, including people demanding Palestinian liberation. Last week I had the chance to spend time with students at my alma mater, Wayne State University, who have been demanding divestment from weapons manufacturers. While I was on campus, officers in a police SUV tried to drive through a crowd of students. And at the University of Michigan recently, students were sprayed with toxic chemicals for calling to save lives. It’s clear that we need to keep each other safe. Thank you for demanding a society that respects our shared humanity, upholds our human rights, and values all life. name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Here’s the Truth About This Conviction
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate
body:
Joe Biden and the radical left aren’t after President Trump; they’re after YOU, the American People. |
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=97745667e4ae415bbed09401a7a1f560&_e=SEEIifbYEjw5lccYF-D1f-gRiz8cdjHhqMsmyVOMzx3TB_yvzt-odglHVm-LlTmEoHBLgYhKOFhhmRX-pC5ZOEhQoCQs94sRZwBZLQ79-bDZlPcdcB8aKf2OuyBrLYhF6AsRN8yr4H8pC34M5nPkpUUEdCKlPzzPj6PbU0b-Z_zyg4KcKy724i9ZIXjOQsBg3pmnYsiMeGey8dfANeoElBYcJrLUtunlcSjLrdGGeoqK33TtC0zHPbSSFi2r4hiPjow6w8NbCmCOCRXn-n1S69os90qqUz4tikWKGa2pHbFQYMl_c23sbUT-vhuVarAX36FFE_AfLdOgQNMR0LoaAhhCqWAydULVEyDrQ-L0cvidKGcqLipCioPmztZ-VRBFqupiGC6BDu3txnI85Gi-6fhxvCVVfTjMIpHwlsyznCE%3D)

Well Fellow patriot,

The Democrats have succeeded in their years-long crusade against my father. **_This is a complete and total outrage._**

The guilty verdict brought on by a radical, Soros-backed Democrat in a kangaroo court in New York City will forever be a stain on our nation's history. The case was rigged from the start. [**We’ve got to have your support if we’re going to fix our fractured nation.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=97745667e4ae415bbed09401a7a1f560&_e=SEEIifbYEjw5lccYF-D1f-gRiz8cdjHhqMsmyVOMzx3TB_yvzt-odglHVm-LlTmEoHBLgYhKOFhhmRX-pC5ZOEhQoCQs94sRZwBZLQ79-bDZlPcdcB8aKf2OuyBrLYhF6AsRN8yr4H8pC34M5nPkpUUEdCKlPzzPj6PbU0b-Z_zyg4KcKy724i9ZIXjOQsBg3pmnYsiMeGey8dfANeoElBYcJrLUtunlcSjLrdGGeoqK33TtC0zHPbSSFi2r4hiPjow6w8NbCmCOCRXn-n1S66IZeoMjzXYgo6HiHaA-tHFtVS0vFVeNJdj3PEWsqogCym-Pek05ExWg25qOKNn4hjMXMQkZE7-0-QUGa4rnsv6uTyPnk-pvUb7ooD0UHcOUCgz0wp0jWqzFJ9Ddhj29zIcQ4vpyOOZiwIMu3Kke3ZI%3D)

**⇨ First, Alvin Bragg literally campaigned on the conviction of my father. He didn’t care about truth or justice – only his and Joe Biden’s personal vendetta and political aspirations.

⇨ Then, Bragg and his leftist cronies completed their mission, pushing through a wrongful conviction based on flimsy evidence and outright lies. This was a third-world country sham trial. _For God’s sake, Putin does this stuff!_

⇨ Now, they have the audacity to schedule his sentencing just DAYS before the Republican National Convention. _This is a blatant attempt to interfere with the upcoming election and silence MILLIONS of Americans who stand with President Trump._**

_This is what a Banana Republic looks like, folks._

[ **STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=97745667e4ae415bbed09401a7a1f560&_e=SEEIifbYEjw5lccYF-D1f-gRiz8cdjHhqMsmyVOMzx3TB_yvzt-odglHVm-LlTmEoHBLgYhKOFhhmRX-pC5ZOEhQoCQs94sRZwBZLQ79-bDZlPcdcB8aKf2OuyBrLYhF6AsRN8yr4H8pC34M5nPkpUUEdCKlPzzPj6PbU0b-Z_zyg4KcKy724i9ZIXjOQsBg3pmnYsiMeGey8dfANeoElBYcJrLUtunlcSjLrdGGeoqK33TtC0zHPbSSFi2r4hiPjow6w8NbCmCOCRXn-n1S64r8uFOXsFpQG5KGdsmUa7XNYeDiMBoquEtcZsOl7LZ2s9750nlUCa-FRX38TXFpHdVPx-SHWdIre62VuCCOm62i4hPIev5L_IHDfq8HhJg5M8tNF2ndWc4SXpYLnKkB-mdgwaI7JWMExLshNZG_X1w%3D)
What’s done is done; all we can do now is fight back, Friend.
