Peter — Roy knows the importance of leaving future generations a climate that can sustain them, and we’ve made great strides under his leadership in expanding our clean energy economy and protecting our environment. _But there’s more work to be done._ **[Roy’s proposed budget includes grants to upgrade our waterways and improve the resiliency of at-risk communities. These mitigation efforts will take time, so we need to fund them NOW. Please, sign on to urge the GOP-controlled legislature to pass Roy’s budget so we can get to work >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86130306/476925598/-289399825?refcode=ea.cfcd8cb3-f320-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.cfcd8cb3-f320-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmNkOGNiMy1mMzIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=grnJs5TAwJwD75jgYGbtZn6Jqm9h_dWb9Qic0LG1wgU=&emci=4e15b7f3-7c1f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=cfcd8cb3-f320-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=1049176)** While we work to mitigate the root causes of climate change, we must also take action based on what we know the future holds. Right now is the time to prepare for the devastation this climate crisis will cause, including protecting our coastal communities at risk of flooding. The budget also establishes a $100 million clean water fund, which will help communities remove pollutants like PFAS chemicals from their water supplies, and incentivizes land conservation efforts to protect vital natural habitats, farmlands, and more. **[Roy’s budget takes critical steps toward preparing North Carolina to sustain future generations. body:
On Friday, Donald Trump announced he had raised more than $50 million for his campaign since his conviction -- a number that will continue to rise. | |
---
🇺🇸 To All Democrats, please do not click away from this important message. ☀️ On Friday, Donald Trump announced he had raised more than $50 million for his campaign since his conviction -- a number that will continue to rise.
That's money that will be used not just to try to defeat Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, but to lift up extreme MAGA Republican candidates running at all levels across the country. So we're asking you to donate to the DNC to help us fight back.
If everyone reading this donated $7 today, we would have the resources to fight back and make sure Democrats have what they need to win. Unfortunately, many people will look away from this message. That is why President Biden and Democrats everywhere are hoping you'll step up.
If defeating Trump, electing a Democratic House and Senate, and supporting Democrats running for office everywhere seems worth $7 to you, we're asking you to take a minute to secure the future of this election by making a donation. Thank you. [Please make a donation to the DNC today. Our average online donation is around $30. Many donors give more. Some give less. All that matters is that you are choosing to stand up to Trump and to stand with Democrats today.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvpOShxPWr9mFhJMw1S-wTtvhltHWfNwNtDIaYBJbNv2OiYGsvOb7Ojyb0iUS8Qi3R1aF-2yZ4pyzTaUMQJXTRmiyfCo-8GuQObeSlImGBgd4uPAsOCLzCOTnia5r08ZjhFuJ00ks-z2aF2EpERSesWGsDQS2-ASNCJQ33jnYCPdKsq2wL2yH72K1ABXYzRa9E8bp5TloGFZJR6tAHQ3txFrV9OrumjLyhfX831ja2kwKiLxzb9Mt3LpkLdttkF60gCqVlXy9_NZr0GaS965wKayPSUztWNnhCsyqJiURmapO9wLDOw1dayvJ7YBNfT0_z9Q46afV8ZYhYobrlzeakRv_vqtwl_Hbbn1I9brCaDP5T4GPG8HvgWSujJPk4u_AE7wNwD1watmhF3fRWTH0URETJYR87rdeIZNIGUAVRbkf8JaFUl603OsLDmUUiNaQw8PcKXoG41tOHqDyPouA28S-U8Q031OTgNLV9sT0Ogpw/46v/BmwLw79GRZOmgKNFpk5ljA/h0/h001.6AnLdQraEL2d4XG1cYDyd3QerVVuPNpWqKoGM2jpmtA)

clean_body: On Friday, Donald Trump announced he had raised more than $50 million for his campaign since his conviction -- a number that will continue to rise. | | 🇺🇸 To All Democrats, please do not click away from this important message. ☀️ On Friday, Donald Trump announced he had raised more than $50 million for his campaign since his conviction -- a number that will continue to rise. That's money that will be used not just to try to defeat Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, but to lift up extreme MAGA Republican candidates running at all levels across the country. So we're asking you to donate to the DNC to help us fight back. If everyone reading this donated $7 today, we would have the resources to fight back and make sure Democrats have what they need to win. Unfortunately, many people will look away from this message. That is why President Biden and Democrats everywhere are hoping you'll step up. If defeating Trump, electing a Democratic House and Senate, and supporting Democrats running for office everywhere seems worth $7 to you, we're asking you to take a minute to secure the future of this election by making a donation. Thank you. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | ---|--- | | We're asking, humbly, don't click away. name: Giffords.org
subject: BREAKING: New NRA president spoke to a white supremacist group
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The NRA’s ties to white supremacy and extremism are deplorable
#

Team - The NRA just named Bill Barr as its new president. He is a former Republican Congressman from Georgia. During his time in Congress, Barr gave a keynote address at a meeting of the Council of Conservative Citizens, a white supremacist organization known for its opposition to interracial marriage.
Barr has tried to backtrack saying that he did not know the views of this group before speaking to them, but the CCC themselves have made it clear Barr was aware of the group’s views before delivering this speech, and that they wouldn’t have invited him to speak otherwise.
[**It is absolutely shameful that the NRA chose a president with ties to white supremacists. That’s why we’re fighting back. Will you contribute $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today to send a strong message that we won’t stand for the NRA and its ties to white supremacy?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june24.gd3XnS&refcode=em240602-1-30&t=1&akid=8201%2E3935704%2EzCweJu)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june24.gd3XnS&refcode=em240602-1-30&t=2&akid=8201%2E3935704%2EzCweJu)**
As GIFFORDS Executive Director Emma Brown said: “The fact that the NRA board of directors handpicked a president who was the keynote speaker at a convention of blatant white supremacists tells you everything you need to know about the state of the organization...The NRA and their friends in the gun industry fan the flames of extremism to spread fear and boost sales. They turn a blind eye to mass violence because it helps them line their pockets.”
With former NRA CEO Wayne LaPierre’s resignation earlier this year, Bill Barr’s appointment as the NRA’s new president is the organization’s attempt to revive itself. We need to do everything we can to ensure that the NRA cannot become the powerful force it once was ever again.
[**Can we count on you to chip in $3 today to fight back against the NRA? The NRA’s ties to white supremacy and extremism are deplorable, and we must defeat them once and for all.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june24.gd3XnS&refcode=em240602-1-30&t=3&akid=8201%2E3935704%2EzCweJu)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Every voice matters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Meeting incredible Wisconsinites from all across our state is my favorite part of the job.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2729%2E35263%2EbNjuN2)
Hi Peter, Meeting incredible Wisconsinites from all across our state is my favorite part of the job — and hearing about their concerns is one of the most important parts, too. From the small business owners to the hardworking families across our state, every voice matters. That’s why I’m reaching out today. I wish we could sit down with each and every one of you over a cup of coffee or tea and have a personal conversation about the issues that affect you the most. But I figured that sending a quick email for your thoughts would be the next best thing: **[Peter, can you please take a minute (or two, tops!) of your time to complete our short June Priorities Survey? Your input is so important to our campaign.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/June_Priorities_Survey_2024/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240602_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2729%2E35263%2EbNjuN2)** | | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/June_Priorities_Survey_2024/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240602_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2729%2E35263%2EbNjuN2)
---
Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts. I look forward to reviewing your responses with my team in the coming days.
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=2729%2E35263%2EbNjuN2) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=2729%2E35263%2EbNjuN2)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

| | **IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ...** **[Ted Cruz among Republicans blasting Trump guilty verdict: "This is an absolute travesty of justice":](http://trk.tedcruz.) **"Republican leaders in Texas, from Governor Greg Abbott, Lt. Governor Dan Patrick, Attorney General Ken Paxton, along with Senators John Cornyn and Ted Cruz all condemned the guilty verdict against former President and presumptive Republican presidential nominee Donald Trump. The verdict came down as CBS News Texas was interviewing Cruz. He blasted the trial judge, saying he ran a kangaroo court. "I think this is an absolute travesty of justice," Cruz said. "This is not about law. This is not about criminal..." **['Rather Astonishing': Ted Cruz Calls Out Biden's 'Witness Tampering' Ahead Of Hunter's Trial:](http://trk.tedcruz._eiPh-foRrP-ZTnXxBcA)** "Hunter Biden is set to begin his trial next week as he faces gun charges. As Townhall has been covering, Hunter's "laptop from hell" could come back to haunt him, and there's also been concerns about President Joe Biden having recently met with Hallie Biden. She's not just the widow of the president's son, Beau Biden, she also was romantically involved with Hunter after her husband's death and is expected to be called as a witness by the prosecution in the case. During his Wednesday episode of "The Verdict," Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) slammed..." **[Cruz Looks To Force Vote Dividing Democrats On Israel:](http://trk.tedcruz.)** "Republicans aren’t done trying to squeeze Democrats over President Joe Biden’s recent decision to pause some bomb shipments to Israel. Sen. Ted Cruz (R-Texas) has come up with a creative approach that could circumvent Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer and force vulnerable Democratic senators to take a difficult vote — if the resolution wins privileged status. Cruz is planning to file a War Powers Resolution that would eventually compel the Biden administration to abandon the pier that was constructed to ease the flow of humanitarian aid into..." **[Texas Sen. Cruz On FAA Reauthorization Act, IVF Protection Act:](http://trk.tedcruz._7xOK47oU9mrWuEJeMQ)** "Texas Senator Ted Cruz visited Austin Tuesday, stopping at Austin-Bergstrom International Airport to highlight the upcoming impacts of the FAA Reauthorization Act of 2024. The bill, which was recently signed by President Biden, is expected to bring safety and technology upgrades to the airport. It invests $4 billion dollars into airports across the country, including ABIA. It addresses staffing shortages, enhances safety on runways, and gives ABIA nearly $2 million dollars more every year for infrastructure projects. “The first priority for aviation has to be safety," said Sen. Cruz..." **[EXCLUSIVE: Ted Cruz Introduces Bill To Scrap ‘Natural Gas Tax’ Wedged Inside Biden’s Climate Legislation:](http://trk.tedcruz._AbDARKgW8t5qw)** "Republican Texas Sen. Ted Cruz is introducing a Senate bill that would repeal a “natural gas tax” proposal enabled by the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA), President Joe Biden’s signature climate bill. The “Natural Gas Tax Repeal Act” would scrap IRA provisions that deputize the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) to impose fines on energy companies that emit methane in amounts above government-dictated limits, according to its text. The rule will likely have a significant impact on producers of natural gas, the form of..." **[**Ted Cruz Needs Your Help To Build A****Red Wave For 2024 >>**](http://trk.tedcruz.)**

From the bottom of my heart, Peter, thank you.
Last month was a pivotal moment for our campaign.**Together we:**
* Supported Democrats in critical races across the country.
* Mobilized our in-person and digital organizing campaigns to get out the vote for progressive leaders running competitive elections.
* Focused our resources on community organizing, mutual aid, and collective action.

**We couldn’t have accomplished any of what we did without you****, Peter.** From chipping in and signing petitions, to simply reading our emails — your support now is making an impact that will be felt for years to come.
We have a lot to plan for in the coming weeks. Our very own primary campaign is on the horizon, and our end-of-the-quarter FEC deadline will be here in the blink of an eye. So we need to go even harder than we did last month.
**I know we can handle whatever storms come our way, so if you stand with us, please consider chipping in $5 today to help us protect our hard-earned progress?**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate
body:
I am personally calling on you to support not only my father in this critical election year but also America First patriots like Bernie Moreno in Ohio. |
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e1eb16adafd449f0ba46cfd9a5c0fb3e&_e=Crbflyp5HG03uE3gcQ8cWUubChOHDHmLqEyuwHuMZAbD2A-Ks6el7BNMv4ASphZCHL0AmZKtXZeBdj9PL_LYkLwM9kp70N-SnjYJDYgNRl6uqFdhF3sT6UdOfCtYE5UvQi9Lnt5kiizDmlHHljRHm9eFNTzXZ20nntRkxhreJDtl7UbCMAt912UQMkEh84QZbPtqpLBMJEVJq47QFDGciRt6CRO3vUjRFJecBxK6FgX8smErPYuZPtKgjTRAHqHknSQLXMClDiE573FcdcqkB1x54PpwUuwQJeI3R7_fEDWC7l6pa_tsriuDEBJx5_OfYeCPfc_UxsVgdcyyF_V-2ADkUUHoJGcZEOArFV3m_ri8EKK1VV0aw8scfG4tK0LYmzkt4V-Nk2RvUXXknTxoMdAoi6VK7P46mZywvxHc6xY%3D)

Well Peter,

The Democrats have succeeded in their years-long crusade against my father. **_This is a complete and total outrage._**

The guilty verdict brought on by a radical, Soros-backed Democrat in a kangaroo court in New York City will forever be a stain on our nation's history. The case was rigged from the start. [**We’ve got to have your support if we’re going to fix our fractured nation.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e1eb16adafd449f0ba46cfd9a5c0fb3e&_e=Crbflyp5HG03uE3gcQ8cWUubChOHDHmLqEyuwHuMZAbD2A-Ks6el7BNMv4ASphZCHL0AmZKtXZeBdj9PL_LYkLwM9kp70N-SnjYJDYgNRl6uqFdhF3sT6UdOfCtYE5UvQi9Lnt5kiizDmlHHljRHm9eFNTzXZ20nntRkxhreJDtl7UbCMAt912UQMkEh84QZbPtqpLBMJEVJq47QFDGciRt6CRO3vUjRFJecBxK6FgX8smErPYuZPtKgjTRAHqHknSQLXMClDiE573FcdcqkBzduIB1qR9QFFKwF4-dXxBrhzXb-CIA8M6KwvkyvKNzD-AyFQUVIbwo4z5tGDjZym6JBjDLQilh4K4jXBnjXcY2i4RCqAzJsJEZEN2rfKULaxa4qZE6iOUdLYp8KVv-jEoVV2Y6AEcbgcDe8Q69fqZs%3D)

**⇨ First, Alvin Bragg literally campaigned on the conviction of my father. He didn’t care about truth or justice – only his and Joe Biden’s personal vendetta and political aspirations.

⇨ Then, Bragg and his leftist cronies completed their mission, pushing through a wrongful conviction based on flimsy evidence and outright lies. This was a third-world country sham trial. _For God’s sake, Putin does this stuff!_

⇨ Now, they have the audacity to schedule his sentencing just DAYS before the Republican National Convention. _This is a blatant attempt to interfere with the upcoming election and silence MILLIONS of Americans who stand with President Trump._**

_This is what a Banana Republic looks like, folks._

[ **STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP** ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e1eb16adafd449f0ba46cfd9a5c0fb3e&_e=Crbflyp5HG03uE3gcQ8cWUubChOHDHmLqEyuwHuMZAbD2A-Ks6el7BNMv4ASphZCHL0AmZKtXZeBdj9PL_LYkLwM9kp70N-SnjYJDYgNRl6uqFdhF3sT6UdOfCtYE5UvQi9Lnt5kiizDmlHHljRHm9eFNTzXZ20nntRkxhreJDtl7UbCMAt912UQMkEh84QZbPtqpLBMJEVJq47QFDGciRt6CRO3vUjRFJecBxK6FgX8smErPYuZPtKgjTRAHqHknSQLXMClDiE573FcdcqkB3cV7aN71IfcM3X2Q0U-eVvRKOyBHi6Zu0-AtsOuD7hOI4dH3DDyoovLZj_mA0lIfksW0OQNfa5FYh_Ay0xsMl4McLdk_DlGsCFROxNEXVBK5bm7WQ_oOuN39PNN3pSmMTQ8PRPgc64xGmZYQ_ByhwM%3D)
What’s done is done; all we can do now is fight back, Peter.

[**That is why I am personally calling on you to support not only my father in this critical election year but also America First patriots like Bernie Moreno in Ohio.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e1eb16adafd449f0ba46cfd9a5c0fb3e&_e=Crbflyp5HG03uE3gcQ8cWUubChOHDHmLqEyuwHuMZAbD2A-Ks6el7BNMv4ASphZCHL0AmZKtXZeBdj9PL_LYkLwM9kp70N-SnjYJDYgNRl6uqFdhF3sT6UdOfCtYE5UvQi9Lnt5kiizDmlHHljRHm9eFNTzXZ20nntRkxhreJDtl7UbCMAt912UQMkEh84QZbPtqpLBMJEVJq47QFDGciRt6CRO3vUjRFJecBxK6FgX8smErPYuZPtKgjTRAHqHknSQLXMClDiE573FcdcqkB-ODxhpeCeuW5whankddsaotk7HAu_w4aeqrqGxX7aLyQEFO2U0eLDAcMtITgzb1XvrHAFCRai-JoX43pmTsXvAFpuac0EQB7fWTbGJxA5Osq_TJPVSUOce4AGOiTFfoyvZxt8R93JI_Q-SYsUqZrrk%3D)

_**Bernie gets it.**_ _He understands that Joe Biden and the radical left aren’t after President Trump; they’re after YOU, the American People._

**As your next Senator, I know he will stand shoulder to shoulder with my father and fight the good fight.** [**So please, chip in whatever you can now so that we can ensure the true verdict is decided by the American People on Election Day, November 5th.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e1eb16adafd449f0ba46cfd9a5c0fb3e&_e=Crbflyp5HG03uE3gcQ8cWUubChOHDHmLqEyuwHuMZAbD2A-Ks6el7BNMv4ASphZCHL0AmZKtXZeBdj9PL_LYkLwM9kp70N-SnjYJDYgNRl6uqFdhF3sT6UdOfCtYE5UvQi9Lnt5kiizDmlHHljRHm9eFNTzXZ20nntRkxhreJDtl7UbCMAt912UQMkEh84QZbPtqpLBMJEVJq47QFDGciRt6CRO3vUjRFJecBxK6FgX8smErPYuZPtKgjTRAHqHknSQLXMClDiE573FcdcqkB3oP1Vxg0NyvE6kSO6Jodcd2fQz_KQPRSwXi_hIg3kzdH1UFS1POx6I2sGlsoPOdzJdoN1bnW3ftJ6kUahKjwrNyeMeq-oIWFD2mdgeVXM14FBHhd62BFpHF0Wj2AURPshMOP_SW2I_sy2CiZMlUS7U%3D)

For America,

Donald Trump Jr.

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e1eb16adafd449f0ba46cfd9a5c0fb3e&_e=Crbflyp5HG03uE3gcQ8cWUubChOHDHmLqEyuwHuMZAbD2A-Ks6el7BNMv4ASphZCHL0AmZKtXZeBdj9PL_LYkLwM9kp70N-SnjYJDYgNRl6uqFdhF3sT6UdOfCtYE5UvQi9Lnt5kiizDmlHHljRHm9eFNTzXZ20nntRkxhreJDtl7UbCMAt912UQMkEh84QZbPtqpLBMJEVJq47QFDGciRt6CRO3vUjRFJecBxK6FgX8smErPYuZPtKgjTRAHqHknSQLXMClDiE573FcdcqkB-Yz9v0aTRL5RONyGj8_UfWuH38d5ly4qWJ6tV02-hsgq7Km55p0RDr5i5wILRFwuINsABFOEUnRrpGcsUtOtEnHU44nYsieX-Pd5-fcHC-_MWmo8ueur4R9ZP73GUD3555dJ9UTQCRZWz3-4Mi0wjc%3D) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

[ ** Join Bernie ➞ **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e1eb16adafd449f0ba46cfd9a5c0fb3e&_e=Crbflyp5HG03uE3gcQ8cWUubChOHDHmLqEyuwHuMZAbD2A-Ks6el7BNMv4ASphZCHL0AmZKtXZeBdj9PL_LYkLwM9kp70N-SnjYJDYgNRl6uqFdhF3sT6UdOfCtYE5UvQi9Lnt5kiizDmlHHljRHm9eFNTzXZ20nntRkxhreJDtl7UbCMAt912UQMkEh84QZbPtqpLBMJEVJq47QFDGciRt6CRO3vUjRFJecBxK6FgX8smErPYuZPtKgjTRAHqHknSQLXMClDiE573FcdcqkBxifcVtEqAICzP-eBtUz2uDg7w3xmPCjZSHDUCXFDMN389Av5YcycT7iPH4FikfcRqBGJIfddCEyQC6kuNqjdTj9OeHsVy7v1iDOrdrj_6dKCpI-x5MFTCarxMuSw_g253Mdp0_Oqzr3YQjl2dwglMc%3D)

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86134806/476940145/-1798907004?refcode=bha_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkwMjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWY0OTNiMTQtZmIyMC1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fJaixQXaWMqvaIKGmE0L46am7ed2qXNZZNCoItJDXIw=)

| | I just had to make a tough decision, and I’m hoping you can help me out ASAP. name: Leaders We Deserve HQ
subject: This is what the future looks like
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Your support could mean the difference between winning or losing.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20240602-1&t=1&akid=760%2E587540%2E3Wi0yg)
Peter,
We’ve told you about our Leaders We Deserve endorsed candidate in Montana, but in case you missed it, here are some fast facts about Anja Wookey-Huffman:
* She is running for Montana’s 65th House District in Bozeman.
* She is a working-class candidate and community organizer.
* She is ready to fight back against the MAGA extremism in her state.
* **Her primary election is coming up this Tuesday, June 4!**

**[Your support right now could mean the difference between winning or losing. Pitch in $5 to help Anja-Wookey Huffman win the Democratic primary!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240602-1?refcode=em20240602-1&amount=5&refcode2=760_587540_3Wi0yg&akid=760%2E587540%2E3Wi0yg)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240602-1?refcode=em20240602-1&amount=5&refcode2=760_587540_3Wi0yg&akid=760%2E587540%2E3Wi0yg)
Anja was born and raised in Bozeman. She worked in local restaurants to fund her way through college and pay the bills. She’s been a political organizer since 2020, worked as a legislative intern in the state capitol, and has worked hard to register and turn out voters in her community. **Anja is what Montana’s future looks like!**
She’s in this race to make a difference for her fellow Montanans — and as a young person herself, she personally understands the challenges young folks are facing today. From the rising cost of education and housing to government inaction on gun violence and climate change, she’ll fight to make progress on our priorities.
**Peter, your support has a DIRECT IMPACT on campaigns like Anja’s** because races for the state legislature in Montana typically cost less than $50,000, as compared to states like Texas where it can easily be over $250,000. So a small donation of just $25 can have a big impact.
Because of this grassroots team, Leaders We Deserve just helped elect Molly Cook, now the youngest and most progressive member of the Texas Senate, by 74 votes. _74 VOTES._ That’s how close these elections can be – and we’re tipping the scales for our bold slate of progressive candidates who represent the future of our country.
**[If you’re ready to help elect the next generation of leaders, please contribute $5 now to support Anja’s campaign ahead of Tuesday’s primary election.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240602-1?refcode=em20240602-1&amount=5&refcode2=760_587540_3Wi0yg&akid=760%2E587540%2E3Wi0yg)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240602-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240602-1-760&refcode2=760_587540_3Wi0yg&akid=760%2E587540%2E3Wi0yg)**
Thanks for all of your support!
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20240602-1&t=2&refcode2=760_587540_3Wi0yg&akid=760%2E587540%2E3Wi0yg)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=760%2E587540%2E3Wi0yg)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=760%2E587540%2E3Wi0yg)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)

**As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle.** Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dream.

I remember vividly trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft.** The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

clean_body: My primary is this Tuesday and I'm still hoping to secure your endorsement ahead of the vote | Fellow Conservative, As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dream. My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority. My primary is THIS Tuesday, June 4th, and I'm hoping to secure the endorsements of 10,000 conservatives before voters head to the polls.. . In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly trying to help an ally sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead. Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield. I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. Chuck Schumer and Washington Democrats know that I pose a direct threat to their chances of holding on to power, and they'll do anything to stop me from winning this race - and spend $100M plus in the process. Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will support my campaign each time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it. I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read. On the battlefield, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the highly trained combat warriors I served alongside as a Navy SEAL. Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you. I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. And believe me, there are some tales. I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why Our homeland is in danger. Radical Democrats in Washington want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream. The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to flip the Senate this year is to nominate a strong conservative candidate who can defeat my liberal Democrat opponent in less than six months.. Over the weeks ahead leading up to the election, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we work to defeat entrenched liberal Senator Jon Tester. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list. The only way to flip the Senate this year is if we are all working toward the same mission. *If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED this November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play. This is my most critical mission to date, and Thank you, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA | Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

body:
Thanks for all you’ve done and continue to do, Peter. Peter,

As we look ahead to June, I want to take a moment to **thank each and every one of you** for your support during our end-of-month fundraising deadline.

Your contributions, whether big or small, have fueled our campaign and brought us one step closer to crossing the finish line on Election Day, and I could not be more proud of what we’ve accomplished so far!

My entire team and I are _incredibly_ grateful for your commitment to this campaign and the work we do – but we’re still not out of the woods. With a well-funded opponent, it’s going to be critical for us to reach every fundraising goal we set from now until November.

Look – I’ve always been about finding real solutions for safer communities, investing in our schools, protecting reproductive freedom, uplifting working families – _and so much more._ In Congress, I’ll always stand strong as a leader for everyday St. Louisans, **no empty promises here.** But in a competitive race like ours, it’s clear that we can’t afford to lose any momentum.

As I continue to work around the clock on the campaign trail and get to know folks from all walks of life, sharing my vision for a better St. Louis, **I hope I can count on your continued support in reaching our goals. Your contributions have been crucial, and I'm truly thankful to have you fighting by my side.**

Onward,

| | Fellow American, I've played in lots of double-headers. And that's exactly what you and I have on our hands here. A one-on-one matchup with Adam Schiff on November 5th. **[**Can I count on your contribution of $6 to help defeat Adam Schiff today?**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=204e43c9871b4419b990a8ee7a397770&_e=Zz4KG4xKuB_K4XaZkQeGdSulgmiPC5knWhO9cb4fZnKDdp0-GZ5wMN_dDBQNSsuw8j_DUWQ3X3DrxxhenaeOa5G4ShUmDsmUfI_i1DJIWuqIv4cK9H6Esd1muNBeTwZF0n_J92r-K8BxZ9SU45iswP0DaZdpMdFWVSLGnq8SIJYKIs8xeYVPGxMBzjqcFLRtAUT53_C3R553AzALx6AE6gpnbc93DA5fbaOODXrqbV3Cb_qkLi6hyi3yGDMXpQsoJe6J4OudbvJmmmFDPvpnceltpR2CgOEM6ngzpcEkeso1q8NGUz9JaEJMe3oES0s-jVJtcNPGUiVyjWpKuSuArJe3ZdeQ2_wPAawFvAMppACAjgKL2OpATxVjLni_5uJSozNZetfAGUmCZ4R9yJl-gA%3D%3D)** You see, Adam Schiff's enablers in the corporate media are already spreading the lie that this race is over. They're saying you and I don't have a chance (just like they did when I entered the race back in October). They're saying that Adam Schiff notched a double victory by advancing to the General Election and drawing me as his opponent. In other words, they're ready, willing and able to cut California voters entirely out of the picture again. My response to Schiff's allies saying they'd rather face me: **_Be careful what you wish for._** I'd liken this to my playing days when a cocky opposing pitcher throws a 94mph fastball right over the plate. I'll tell you, the ball would look as big as a grapefruit before I'd smash it over the fence and touch all the bases on the way home. And look how far we've already made it. I'm in first place in the primary and gaining momentum headed towards the November election. Look, I'm not saying this will be easy. Quite the opposite. It's going to be a nonstop, 58-county fight between now and November 5th. **[That said, I must ask: will you rush a contribution to my senate campaign today?](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=204e43c9871b4419b990a8ee7a397770&_e=Zz4KG4xKuB_K4XaZkQeGdSulgmiPC5knWhO9cb4fZnKDdp0-GZ5wMN_dDBQNSsuw8j_DUWQ3X3DrxxhenaeOa5G4ShUmDsmUfI_i1DJIWuqIv4cK9H6Esd1muNBeTwZF0n_J92r-K8BxZ9SU45iswP0DaZdpMdFWVSLGnq8SIJYKIs8xeYVPGxMBzjqcFLRtAUT53_C3R553AzALx6AE6gpnbc93DA5fbaOODXrqbV3Cb_qkLi6hyi3yGDMXpQsottiDuq0_K5EUu3YYKy32OkfUsl7GOObVDE4HSa-5Z8zVJt0-RZbFrPewmDPPlMCH9Nb3VpwQQHawgBMYg-Sp7NFo0BHE7hF3WOzhQBu_5U6wZDJleCEkBtM9yKa4m47bFS9gGL0eiv0lJx7jF6YLQA%3D%3D) ** This is going to be an expensive fight. Hiring staff, recruiting and training volunteers, equipping them with the very best technology to identify our voter and secure their vote by November 5th. There's no time to lose. In closing, I can't help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. But what they've really done is awaken a sleeping giant here. Remember, before it became a wasteland of crime, homelessness, and sky-high taxes, California was a land of dreamers, a land of opportunity. It was a place where a scrawny little kid could start as a bat boy for his heroes, work hard, win a World Series, and land on a Topps baseball card. California can be that place again. America can be that place again. And it starts with throwing out political liars and connivers like Adam Schiff and reclaiming our freedom roots. Time is the most important factor. Thank you!

clean_body: They’re saying that Adam Schiff notched a double victory by advancing to the General Election and drawing me as his opponent. | | | | | Fellow American, I've played in lots of double-headers. And that's exactly what you and I have on our hands here. A one-on-one matchup with Adam Schiff on November 5th. You see, Adam Schiff's enablers in the corporate media are already spreading the lie that this race is over. They're saying you and I don't have a chance (just like they did when I entered the race back in October). They're saying that Adam Schiff notched a double victory by advancing to the General Election and drawing me as his opponent. In other words, they're ready, willing and able to cut California voters entirely out of the picture again. My response to Schiff's allies saying they'd rather face me: Be careful what you wish for. I'd liken this to my playing days when a cocky opposing pitcher throws a 94mph fastball right over the plate. I'll tell you, the ball would look as big as a grapefruit before I'd smash it over the fence and touch all the bases on the way home. And look how far we've already made it. I'm in first place in the primary and gaining momentum headed towards the November election. Look, I'm not saying this will be easy. Quite the opposite. It's going to be a nonstop, 58-county fight between now and November 5th. This is going to be an expensive fight. Hiring staff, recruiting and training volunteers, equipping them with the very best technology to identify our voter and secure their vote by November 5th. There's no time to lose. In closing, I can't help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. But what they've really done is awaken a sleeping giant here. Remember, before it became a wasteland of crime, homelessness, and sky-high taxes, California was a land of dreamers, a land of opportunity. It was a place where a scrawny little kid could start as a bat boy for his heroes, work hard, win a World Series, and land on a Topps baseball card. California can be that place again. America can be that place again. And it starts with throwing out political liars and connivers like Adam Schiff and reclaiming our freedom roots. Time is the most important factor. Thank you! | | | | Steve Garvey #6 | | | P.S. Adam Schiff had $35 million in the bank. Well, reports are now coming out that he spent upwards of $25 million in the primary and is down to $10 million in the bank. Make no mistake, while his cash advantage is greatly diminished, as I write these words, Adam Schiff, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer are quickly reloading. The ActBlue political machine has the capacity to pump millions into his race in the blink of an eye. You and I cannot give them any daylight. Please don't delay. | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 |

Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **" The Second World Wars."**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came to define the war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=677eb087bed64e0bbaf40886fa5c64f6&_e=-csObjZ_4BsLBcnStm5Rlln7A1Zwil4JR0KTeEY04zF7-kZ_0hJ4h4-fzDSEYhcjagCpu2Diy5Cb6CD3Cv9U5VyFKMny_Sa0I8Nvd9Npd_t95I8_mIOBfgQA_cogipTT0waC-yb9JZMM931os4RT4QuW3g3EB54yPD4eXVMgmLHHoJqK42SrO4TWBeKHLKujIQ1h2eaAL0pGdYDe8uKdAdztIYQRXo9E8Uqtm0NdIAlK-N2O_DlPY6olC6jhEpqjz5CF-pEPvJpzDxqEkLph0IfwgqtPX4Jg6aa15cFEhvEDYPGFJCDsiDJaXa2fuYMZXFuXXpSwWM1etMGE3Z_4ANT0OfQ9eLMsejy5Ev4NRlEBZwmy--xJqBJgwA8O8EaA2XECyDksERhjOR0qtuxyr5lLLgliqqC03q97julvf0s%3D) Don't get left behind. Secure your DVD set today with any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of **" The Second World Wars"** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=677eb087bed64e0bbaf40886fa5c64f6&_e=-csObjZ_4BsLBcnStm5Rlln7A1Zwil4JR0KTeEY04zF7-kZ_0hJ4h4-fzDSEYhcjagCpu2Diy5Cb6CD3Cv9U5VyFKMny_Sa0I8Nvd9Npd_t95I8_mIOBfgQA_cogipTT0waC-yb9JZMM931os4RT4QuW3g3EB54yPD4eXVMgmLHHoJqK42SrO4TWBeKHLKujIQ1h2eaAL0pGdYDe8uKdAdztIYQRXo9E8Uqtm0NdIAlK-N2O_DlPY6olC6jhEpqjz5CF-pEPvJpzDxqEkLph0EO4sV_Ki2z7cXYaAeDSqnCgqgiWrRj08mJEuijRo5ugkITenCTHRl-Enq4oADbZ1z_m29JybsK37nrIm3af673CWSH1vXtTeb02NPoXXxXRBPefw_GtDIXGrZI0VM2hNzHzPqYZaknqyJp41JrArbk%3D)**

subject: The White House is calling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nicole for New York
body:
Who should answer?

| [ ](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=9e835558998f42c2851f26e6d01a75c7&_e=CUgpS9NlTtRIVbK-Vdvn7mESkMLXx3Dy0Qz7GIlWC4WVOt88DOfX_v-2iNvobyO12t4LQxPcEYvYGjhugO9Ctxvfj31AxEa-7yj9Ups1hkuf4UccTqINg2VmswClDnPtYAozozdQU4VM-LdfYtHN8f71Vmp0he6h4hndKv5azU0GJ1DzTiK36r81SjXtc6eGlBPKVx8bT_45NhMkcA5k_tRp2uj9kVGXBQJaPILIPCDKaZqoXSf8pErrgk3gSbOvswJp5dccMAAdd0GwxRQCHr8iFQcpzeecwHG6wipaoBI2K8sKdmye9hT1lVY2i-f9)

Fellow American,

_****Do you miss the strong leadership and America First policies of President Trump? ****_Well, you're not alone.

**[President Trump has recognized Nicole's unwavering commitment to conservative principles and her tireless efforts to fight against the radical Left's agenda in New York City.](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=9e835558998f42c2851f26e6d01a75c7&_e=CUgpS9NlTtRIVbK-Vdvn7mESkMLXx3Dy0Qz7GIlWC4WVOt88DOfX_v-2iNvobyO12t4LQxPcEYvYGjhugO9Ctxvfj31AxEa-7yj9Ups1hkuf4UccTqINg2VmswClDnPtYAozozdQU4VM-LdfYtHN8d4WJQch8u55ZyR8vUWizArmnvvHbuT4sjIvBwkApJxAkkWTNfbej8QchBQ80b0hnCuKEm-orvBFZ3O0JThdyeKdj8_xU7SZfQTbjbbkmPKAQdKizzO0A1Rtdpffyu5prEQRKMd8rVSfXr59ZgvdCeMQf2jeHniNXQDIlqCfbvdI)** But the battle doesn't end there. We need your support to ensure that President Trump's vision for America remains alive and well.

| [ **I SUPPORT TRUMP** ](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=9e835558998f42c2851f26e6d01a75c7&_e=CUgpS9NlTtRIVbK-Vdvn7mESkMLXx3Dy0Qz7GIlWC4WVOt88DOfX_v-2iNvobyO12t4LQxPcEYvYGjhugO9Ctxvfj31AxEa-7yj9Ups1hkuf4UccTqINg2VmswClDnPtYAozozdQU4VM-LdfYtHN8a6zr1OPSusP4upVAhJfdwFeu4IwKT8woR1AL3ZhlOzuYLClgNukNPYepnpoNbPSsqq3Lo7cJ1qnHZKLOmx6pLhGq5AdXrBfqBRn2quqXFE2q7WzmXPgRzwI5lGfwd_0YC-Du4r53NsrPFMJfyURtfk1m7ZKhDpEb-NHs3dnfKi6)
---

_****By standing with Nicole Malliotakis, you 're not just supporting a candidate- you're joining a movement to bring Trump's leadership back to the White House.****_ Sleepy Joe may have been keeping the bed warm, but it's time for real business to take place.

Together, we can make a difference and keep America great. **[Contribute today to help us continue the fight for our values and secure a brighter future for all Americans.](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=9e835558998f42c2851f26e6d01a75c7&_e=CUgpS9NlTtRIVbK-Vdvn7mESkMLXx3Dy0Qz7GIlWC4WVOt88DOfX_v-2iNvobyO12t4LQxPcEYvYGjhugO9Ctxvfj31AxEa-7yj9Ups1hkuf4UccTqINg2VmswClDnPtYAozozdQU4VM-LdfYtHN8ZvI2UtcDDd1EEAz7e6eWrzf03XA8v3ZtQXma0lXENcjJVU2KIuSPE1Qy9rMzwXH28SWukF_U7i70T0Hp-bu1G_tnix5mgEEXOiZJw4OOdlzX3KdkNuL9YBiPYkP0FA9Ch72j7UeZQ1k1hdtcNC3VlyN_dHonMF9dZ8-lzfATfyd)**

Thank you,

Nicole Malliotakis

After we file, everyone will be looking at our fundraising numbers and asking one simple question: **_Does Angela Alsobrooks have what it takes to defeat Republican Larry Hogan in November?_** **[With your support, Peter, I KNOW that we can defeat Hogan and his dark money super PACs, but it’s going to take all of us to do it. So can I count on you to chip in $10 or $25 right away to get June started on the right foot?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/26123?t=12&amount=10&akid=1768%2E52803%2EhwmEoZ)** | | | [Donate $10](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/26123?t=13&amount=10&akid=1768%2E52803%2EhwmEoZ)

We need to file a strong report with the FEC to show Mitch McConnell, Larry Hogan, and the rest of the GOP that we’ve got what it takes to keep this Senate seat blue.
There’s too much at stake for us to do anything less, Peter, because the Senate map is clear about one thing:
**_If Larry Hogan wins Maryland, the GOP is all but guaranteed to flip the Senate red, and they would be free to pass a national abortion ban._**
**[Will you please pitch in $10 or $25 right away to help put a big dent in our June fundraising goal early? We need to be ready for anything and everything between now and Election Day.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/26123?t=16&amount=10&akid=1768%2E52803%2EhwmEoZ)**

name: James Carville
subject: Not the update you want to hear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
With the general election officially underway, here’s the update on Pennsylvania’s Senate race that you need to hear, not the one you want to hear:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T64d2c93a-d576-4f48-b54b-05dc7f0f42f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter: With the general election officially underway, here’s the update on Pennsylvania’s Senate race that you need to hear, not the one you want to hear: FIRST: David McCormick, a hedge fund executive from Connecticut, launched his campaign to defeat Bob. THEN: Right-wing super PACs and Wall Street billionaires quickly rallied behind him, spending millions to flood the airwaves in an attempt to buy this critical Senate seat. NOW: David McCormick is officially the Republican nominee, and the full force of the Republican party, including Donald Trump, is all in to flip PA red. If Bob loses, Democrats don’t have a shot in hell to protect the Senate and the White House. That means kissing any chance of protecting women’s rights, workers’ rights, and voting rights goodbye. [I’ll be damned if we screw this up, so here’s what I need from you, Peter. Will you split $25 between Bob Casey and Blue Amp Action right now to help Bob hit the ground running in the general election? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T708f57a7-ba9e-4105-9d9a-15e0e6065e01/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Your support (yes yours, Peter!) will make a huge difference in this battleground race, so thank you. – James Carville
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/yyz_em_fr_op_carvilleforbobcasey_24060214?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9277d75e-cc40-4cd2-8945-019a9f4f20f2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC

When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: The Biden Campaign
subject: “Unified Reich”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Folks, listen... this is serious stuff. And it's not like Trump's echoes of Nazi Germany are a one-time thing. | | |
---
Peter -- Last week, Donald Trump posted a video to his social media suggesting a second term for him would create a "unified Reich" in America. Folks, listen... this is serious stuff. And it's not like Trump's echoes of Nazi Germany are a one-time thing. He calls his political opponents "vermin," he talks about the blood of America being poisoned, and he says he wants to be a dictator on "day one." Trump is trying to take America to a very dark place. We don't want to trivialize this at all. But we are going to use this opportunity to ask you to make today the day you make your first donation to Joe Biden's reelection campaign. Because if we don't have the resources to win, we won't. And this is the one thing you can do right now to make sure Trump doesn't get the chance to take this country backward. **So please:** [Can President Biden count on you to contribute $25 to his reelection today? I hate to email you on a Sunday, but it’s important. I’m personally reaching out because I was just informed I missed May’s fundraising target by just a few hundred dollars.

We have ZERO room for error if we’re going to gain the lead in this tied race and flip Wisconsin’s battleground Senate seat RED.

[**If just a few committed Conservatives pitch in before the end of the weekend, we’ll close our fundraising shortfall and be back on track to securing victory.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=cc2ac6bec8d544dda37699b6d2b62eee&_e=4QxU_UWFHOkKTpw6fQX3yKeroKOsUeIBTFR1FBxbls5FDAeWet8HcVwuhYAqd-b21DQMSQbbZOHe_VLefx55h0S9kcdgwOY5W_iLL6rTmIhXAFCy88aBLf3fz3jJPzBApN_d1bDpBq5u_YqicdXWMBk-fqBoAOOIRBBN87yL55Fqz9pIX7-H9s6XENTgarc8_-3a9VI-AHojnJnASWslHpqc2TNJ5vY50vhzxUHPPiTOUUL0ruX7z2lmGhW_BhjVH7lCwXhoW3ahBzo9zvsFF7S11QXkX9V_DM6g47K2C449aYeXx_T1RgpspA02lsN_hZ-SQo3DeQBAadgkpqvdNyloDvT3A1v-7YNCGIWJwLKG5fWtilPXnpcH9OYgmD-OPdNa7tIODXIHy06piaP-GtQGo-IUHKtoapGfJnmN2Gs%3D)

Chuck Schumer, Tammy Baldwin, and every D.C. special interest group have us under a microscope. Any missed deadline will be interpreted as a sign of weakness, and they’ll bury us in the final months of this race.

Can I count on you?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=cc2ac6bec8d544dda37699b6d2b62eee&_e=4QxU_UWFHOkKTpw6fQX3yKeroKOsUeIBTFR1FBxbls5FDAeWet8HcVwuhYAqd-b21DQMSQbbZOHe_VLefx55h0S9kcdgwOY5W_iLL6rTmIhXAFCy88aBLf3fz3jJPzBApN_d1bDpBq5u_YqicdXWMBk-fqBoAOOIRBBN87yL55Fqz9pIX7-H9s6XENTgarc8_-3a9VI-AHojnJnASWslHpqc2TNJ5vY50vhzxUHPPiTOUUL0ruX7z2lmGhW_BhjVH7lCwXhoW3ahBzo9zvsFF5jxRlR3L2aNTM4zjaWyKGhJDaY8lCG6J0ndOHC_Lu0YyPUQS9QZZ0nYQe5D99ZoZ8ygZ3BRhtmyZfZNmZ6jLe-RIsFCsYO3g8N4zEE0E9GCCfr0U8ORJ3ExnOYFMNV0NzmLRqdK6yjYF-WJMr0StV8%3D)

Sent from my iPhone

| **MEET ERIC**

Eric's a fourth-generation Wisconsinite, born and raised in the Madison area. He's a serial entrepreneur. He founded and managed his first business in his twenties and then went on to start and build many others.

When he is not running his businesses, he is focused on his family and his philanthropic endeavors. He and his brother Steve operate 10 Hovde Homes around the world that provide shelter, supportive services and love to vulnerable children.

body:
| **This message is for: dpwillis67@gmail.com**

Hi team, this is Heather from the Voter Protection Project reaching out because we noticed you didn’t confirm your Democratic Supporter Membership!

**I also wanted to share some quick data: your area stood out as least Memberships submitted, and we missed our 350 Membership goal!**

This is a terrible state to be in, folks. Not only are we about 5 months from the election, but we’re also on the verge of losing ALL blue Dem seats!!!

**There’s no better time to step up.** Democrats from the east to the west coast are working HARD to defend Senate seats, House Majority, and the White House!

[**So today, I hope you’ll help us kick off June strong: Will you please complete your Democratic Supporter Membership to protect and expand our Democracy at risk? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/69819?t=6&akid=14943%2E878179%2EG5I5vB) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/69819?t=7&akid=14943%2E878179%2EG5I5vB) | [COMPLETE MY 2024 DEMOCRATIC SUPPORTER MEMBERSHIP »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/69819?t=8&akid=14943%2E878179%2EG5I5vB)
---
We can’t wait to see your membership roll in, team!

Heather
Executive Director
The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=14943%2E878179%2EG5I5vB). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=14943%2E878179%2EG5I5vB).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=14943%2E878179%2EG5I5vB) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=14943%2E878179%2EG5I5vB). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=14943%2E878179%2EG5I5vB)

Did you catch this news, folks?

**The North Carolina race for governor has just shifted from "lean Democrat" to "toss up" according to the Cook Political Report.**

Democrat Josh Stein, the current Attorney General of North Carolina, is running to protect voting rights in this key swing state – one that’s seen 45 election directors quit due to the threats stemming from MAGA conspiracies.

His opponent is far-right Republican Mark Robinson who endorsed Donald Trump and spread lies about the 2020 presidential election.

We're keeping a very close eye on this race here at DASS.

North Carolina Secretaries of State play a _critical role_ in presidential elections, and we know MAGA extremists have schemed to place election deniers into positions of election oversight. **With the Governor’s race in play, we risk electing one that rewrites the rules and puts elections oversight under MAGA control.**

name: Jill Stein
subject: Our next big challenge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
We have another huge ballot fight on our hands.

| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=il_ballot_access&n=1)
---
Peter, The two-party system has made it extremely difficult for people-powered campaigns like ours to get on the ballot, and some states make it much harder than others. Right now, we’re turning our focus to the next big challenge: [Illinois](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ilballot?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=il_ballot_access&n=2). We have to submit 25,000 valid signatures by the June 24th deadline - meaning we need closer to 50,000 signatures to be able to withstand a likely challenge from the Democratic Party. Democrats across the country are hiring political operatives and lawyers to keep grassroots campaigns like ours off the ballot. **We can’t let them succeed.** We’re going all out to make sure over 8 million Illinois voters have a pro-worker, anti-war, anti-genocide, climate action choice on the ballot - and to make it happen **we need your help now.** **Our most critical need right now is for people to collect signatures in Illinois.** If you can petition in Illinois, we need your help! There are more ways to help too - like providing homestays for volunteers petitioning in Illinois. **However you can help, please let us know now:**
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ilballot?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=il_ballot_access&n=3 "HELP JILL GET ON THE IL BALLOT") [HELP JILL GET ON THE IL BALLOT](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ilballot?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=il_ballot_access&n=3)
---
**We also need everyone to donate whatever they can to help fund this urgent ballot drive.** To undertake this massive and critically important petition drive, we need to raise $300,000 this month. Every dollar you can donate moves us closer to the crucial goal of getting 25,000 valid signatures in Illinois. **Please pitch in as much as you can now to help make it happen!**
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/illinois?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=il_ballot_access&n=4 "DONATE NOW") [DONATE NOW](https://www.jillstein2024.com/illinois?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=il_ballot_access&n=4)
---
You’ve likely heard by now about the **astounding volunteer mobilization in New York that brought in 10 times as many signatures as all other grassroots campaigns!** Though we fell just short of New York’s outrageous ballot access signature requirement, **we’re not done fighting**. We are pursuing strong legal options to challenge New York’s unjust, anti-democratic laws and get on the ballot. So **we are still very much on track to be the only anti-genocide, pro-worker, climate action campaign on the ballot across the country.** **But that all depends on what happens in the next three weeks in Illinois.** Like New York, Illinois is another Democratic Party-dominated state that makes it extremely difficult for Greens and other independents to get on the ballot. To get the signatures we need by the fast-approaching deadline, we need everyone who supports this campaign to do what they can to help _now._ Our campaign has been building momentum fast. Media attention has exploded, poll numbers are rising, more and more supporters are joining every day - and we are slowly but surely getting on the ballot across the country, with success stories in Alaska, Georgia, Idaho, Nevada and more. **But it’s absolutely critical that we harness that momentum to overcome the biggest ballot access challenges - and right now, that means Illinois.** **If you believe in this movement for people, planet, and peace that we have struggled so hard for so many years to build, I ask you to rise to seize this historic opportunity for political change and do whatever you can to help us get on the ballot in Illinois.**
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ilballot?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=il_ballot_access&n=5 "HELP JILL GET ON THE IL BALLOT") [HELP JILL GET ON THE IL BALLOT](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ilballot?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=il_ballot_access&n=5)
---
Please share this urgent message with your friends, family, and fellow activists. We can do this if we all work together - but we need _everyone_ to answer the call. Thank you for everything you do to fight for an America and a world that works for all of us! **Gratitude and solidarity!** Jill Stein
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/illinois?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=il_ballot_access&n=6 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.jillstein2024.com/illinois?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=il_ballot_access&n=6)
---
Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
---
©2024 Jill Stein for President 2024, all rights reserved Jill Stein for President, www.jillstein2024.com
P.O. Box 4359, Fall River, MA 02723-0415
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com**·[Unsubscribe](https://www.jillstein2024.com/unsubscribe?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=il_ballot_access&n=7)**
---

We can do this if we all work together - but we need everyone to answer the call. Thank you for everything you do to fight for an America and a world that works for all of us! Gratitude and solidarity! Jill Stein | "DONATE" Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024 ©2024 Jill Stein for President 2024, all rights reserved Jill Stein for President, www.jillstein2024.com P.O. Box 4359, Fall River, MA 02723-0415

name: Shahid Buttar
subject: Get ready to rumble
body:
Donald Trump's criminal convictions will only further empower him politically, and Democrats share the blame

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..AlY6vMOtAvqtH-fAXRlS3hcQP8rq43CRsuQ9LlX8QvA?) for more
---
[](https://substack..MhGeQ8ufqKMnOTf8GO9UE3es-WmS85LAZGnxHFWB2lg?)
---
# [Get ready to rumble](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=145230007&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ1MjMwMDA3LCJpYXQiOjE3MTczNTA5NjIsImV4cCI6MTcxOTk0Mjk2MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Pucp2AR19sGB8UxHz7HiKfyOtt83F7R1rtWGlUaKQXc)
### Donald Trump's criminal convictions will only further empower him politically, and Democrats share the blame
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/redirect/a2076582-9579-423d-81ba-95172ded1f04?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Jun 2| | | ∙| | Preview
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a2076582-9579-423d-81ba-95172ded1f04?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=145230007&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ1MjMwMDA3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTcxNzM1MDk2MiwiZXhwIjoxNzE5OTQyOTYyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.CLRz0JFrkHuHmdFLiJcLeKgj6Nt58iaQyKRp2SFktGk&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=145230007&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ1MjMwMDA3LCJpYXQiOjE3MTczNTA5NjIsImV4cCI6MTcxOTk0Mjk2MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Pucp2AR19sGB8UxHz7HiKfyOtt83F7R1rtWGlUaKQXc&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=145230007&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ1MjMwMDA3LCJpYXQiOjE3MTczNTA5NjIsImV4cCI6MTcxOTk0Mjk2MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Pucp2AR19sGB8UxHz7HiKfyOtt83F7R1rtWGlUaKQXc)
---
| | [](https://substack..lN1VpCjZ0Kd8wozZzBoEIEgzQ8HFr1pnBgEKUs7MF5E?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/get-ready-to-rumble?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
Last week, Donald Trump became the first former president ever convicted of a criminal offense. While the 34 felonies of which he was convicted were based on entirely legitimate grounds, his supporters are right that they have already been politicized. Figures ranging from Biden and Jamaal Bowman to [Trump himself have raised funds](https://substack.com/redirect/6cafa8ab-bcb9-46d1-b5dd-2268d0997b60?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) using the verdicts as a pretext.
All of them have played into the narrative that the right wing has opportunistically constructed. At stake is not only the 2024 presidential election, but also the independence of the judiciary. Ultimately, it is the future of our Republic (such that it is) at stake. But [neither](https://substack.com/redirect/b0a1180b-e56a-45f4-bfe4-9ce47429fcd1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of the corporate political parties can [plausibly](https://substack.com/redirect/81e2af23-d82a-4034-8fae-4b212c7b5ce0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) claim to defend it.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/999d444f-5a48-434b-9480-c8d0fff64d1a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Prosecuting Trump for falsifying business records in order to swing the 2016 election--in an effort to cover up payments to silence a porn star with whom he had an extramarital affair--is more or less the equivalent of busting Al Capone for tax evasion.
_Help inform your friends! This post is free to read, so feel free to share it._
[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=145230007&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ1MjMwMDA3LCJpYXQiOjE3MTczNTA5NjIsImV4cCI6MTcxOTk0Mjk2MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Pucp2AR19sGB8UxHz7HiKfyOtt83F7R1rtWGlUaKQXc)
Trump's prosecution was entirely legitimate within its four corners, but it (like the impeachment charades that Pelosi performatively supported in Trump's first term, after years of stonewalling the process before [finally being goaded into it](https://substack.com/redirect/dc1f7747-9535-4d47-ac93-3306e25b4443?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) excluded Trump's [most serious crimes](https://substack.com/redirect/b667c01c-d44b-4fde-87f8-61acaee10d44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Meanwhile, the [litany of crimes](https://substack.com/redirect/b0a1180b-e56a-45f4-bfe4-9ce47429fcd1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) related to bipartisan corruption in Washington continue unchallenged.
Can anyone seriously claim that paying hush money to a porn star and lying about it (which was the essence of Trump's crimes) is worse than facilitating a genocide (as Biden continues to do), or [murdering](https://substack.com/redirect/b3e1444f-1572-4f52-8be5-d8fc1b3c1cf0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) U.S. citizens [and their children](https://substack.com/redirect/15a1a000-3e24-43bd-9dad-f07c57ef566c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) based on their speech (as Obama did)?
### **Damned if you do, damned if you don 't**
The judiciary is on trial, and will appear biased regardless of the outcome of the forthcoming sentencing process. Judge Merchan should respond harshly, if only to compel respect for the judicial process and legal system that Trump has used to his benefit throughout his career, yet remarkably managed to politicize in his seemingly weakest public moment.
On the one hand, a sentence limited to probation, or fines, will appear laughably lenient. How many people can get convicted of 34 felonies, yet walk away without a jail sentence? The millions of people of color imprisoned for less severe offenses might reasonably find lenience disturbing.
_Chronicles of a Dying Empire is a publication supported by readers, rather than advertisers. To receive new posts, sign up for a**free subscription**! To support my work, please consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Bu5_OQNId0B9UXs4o-KjvM4JfbNV0654N3msJNMWHSA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=145230007)
Yet, on the other hand, even jail won't stop Trump's campaign to return to the White House. His followers already perceive his prosecution as politicized--even though Biden had no role in it, and Trump was convicted in the State of New York through a legal process not subject to a president's arbitrary ability to pardon his political cronies & himself.
### **Casting stones from a glass house**
Observers have widely overlooked that Democrats also harbor criminals in their midst. I was arrested in the Senate 2015 for [asking one of them a question](https://substack.com/redirect/8c451cfa-d46d-4c6f-8c65-8d5830b2deaf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) after a congressional hearing, and I endured an [Islamophobic character assassination](https://substack.com/redirect/f12960a2-1cb5-43f7-8c4b-512fee198d6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in 2020 that ended my career in retaliation for [challenging another one](https://substack.com/redirect/efaad4d6-8b1a-41a5-91f6-455b1409b00c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in an election.
Americans know that everyone in Washington--including Democrats--are essentially con artists. Many have [laughed all the way to the bank](https://substack.com/redirect/b3d9328a-33a4-4a00-b88d-233950995037?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for decades while ducking public responsibilities, [violating any number of principles](https://substack.com/redirect/3703547d-cbb5-4638-9dc2-4035ac13c39d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that are illegal for the rest of us (like insider trading, for instance, or lying to Congress) along the way.
The corruption observed by Trump's supporters is outrageously bipartisan, which is entirely the fault of Democrats who have ignored the law whenever convenient to them, their corrupt leaders, and their military industrial patrons.
While Republicans are wrong that Trump's prosecution was driven by a political calculus among elected Democrats, they are inescapably right that it reflects selective prosecution. Trump was, for better or worse, put on public trial for acts that pale relative to the unrepentant crimes shared by Democrats.
Can anyone seriously claim that paying hush money to a porn star and lying about it (which was the essence of Trump's crimes) is worse than [facilitating a genocide](https://substack.com/redirect/b0a1180b-e56a-45f4-bfe4-9ce47429fcd1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (as Biden continues to do), or [murdering](https://substack.com/redirect/b3e1444f-1572-4f52-8be5-d8fc1b3c1cf0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) U.S. citizens [and their children](https://substack.com/redirect/15a1a000-3e24-43bd-9dad-f07c57ef566c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) based on their speech (as Obama did)?
### **Kicking the third leg out from underneath the stool**
The separation of powers between the executive, legislative, and judicial branches is the core principle that enabled what some have described as "democracy in America." While the judiciary often escapes the attention of voters and journalists focused on the political branches, it is no less crucial to the functioning of our Republic.
I've been working to defend judicial independence since 2005, when I joined the national staff of the [American Constitution Society for Law & Policy](https://substack.com/redirect/bcb3607c-b8fe-44e9-aa13-a25961a0a2d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) not long after graduating from Stanford Law School. For most of that time, Democrats could not be bothered to care about the right wing takeover of the federal courts. When Obama had the chance to nominate Justices of the Supreme Court, he [passed](https://substack.com/redirect/31fd85fc-4947-44e3-a624-1df46c0576c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on the opportunity to appoint jurisprudential visionaries, instead settling for appointments driven by (political) diversity considerations.
To the extent Democrats remained asleep at the switch until the Trump years, the _Dobbs_ decision shocked them out of a slumber. Unfortunately, concerns about judicial independence, and ethics in exile, may have come too late.
Trump's repeated and continuing attacks on the judiciary are indeed outrageous, and threaten the rule of law. Like his theatrical stance opposing the corruption and abuses of intelligence agencies (which he opposes only because he has perceived them as political threats, not because he has any sincere commitment to shrinking their powers), he's like a stopped clock that is right twice a day.
Our judiciary is, in fact, [hopelessly corrupt](https://substack.com/redirect/9e0c64af-043e-48d0-ac38-81e2a306adfa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), starting from the very top. Justice Thomas has taken money under the table from billionaires while absurdly disclaiming any impropriety. Justice Alito has been caught flying flags announcing his solidarity with the January 6 insurrection. Both of them--in addition to several other Justices--[lied to Congress](https://substack.com/redirect/31fd85fc-4947-44e3-a624-1df46c0576c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) during their respective confirmation hearings.
Their unapologetic ethical violations, as well as the Court's relentless assault on fundamental rights (including reproductive freedom, voting rights, and more) reflect crises that no one in Washington seems either willing or poised to address.
_Paid subscribers can access a further (personal, but poignant and bizarre) reflection on a coincidence relating to the underlying set of events that led to Trump 's criminal convictions and my response to my character assassination in 2020 at the hands of [his enablers in the Democratic Party](https://substack.com/redirect/31d67d8c-23b6-4053-b4b4-a318b7680cf8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)..._

name: State Dems HQ (via DLCC.org)
subject: April, May, and June…
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund
body:
Falling behind even further would be catastrophic for state Democrats nationwide. We need to be proactive, not reactive, to ensure we can maintain our funding commitments this summer. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**IN APRIL:** We missed our end-of-month fundraising goal. At the same time, Republicans raised **_over $47 million_** for their state candidates. Falling behind means potentially having to **CUT funding to state Democrats in battleground states.** **THEN, IN MAY:** Despite thousands of donors chipping in, we, unfortunately, missed our goal by 30% for the second month in a row. Meanwhile, Trump raked in over $50 million after becoming a convicted criminal. **NOW, IN JUNE:** We’re fighting to make up lost ground. The _last thing_ we want to do is cut funding in key states like Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin. But if we fail to reach our fundraising goal _for the third time in a row_ , we’ll be forced to rethink our original 2024 strategy. **Falling behind even further would be _catastrophic_ for state Democrats nationwide. We need to be proactive, _not_ reactive, to ensure we can maintain our funding commitments this summer and into the fall. ** [Can you rush a $7 donation today to close the funding gap and help state Democrats compete and WIN in November? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDt4Do6vyPJ50F6Afq3NtvRMPCrSqAmo0U3VmdCiuWjT2tWZDnzEKSPIYGFWzALnQbIfr_cLfm56iMQi4aH7n-QIhyfaCPj-KHn8jQ07aDA_h-1I3CzfNJg425Fm_kftpg43Br7JSPcx0He86VQNCcF6qVjfRVGGhpS2zsxYM0-e0MDCxEG3alAM5n2QQKpkeAdTsXcaWqcXc5o2HfoCVEx965zX8ee9Olttxiiddsdq4_dg1q9A7CEPkhdV-2_yV0i8SUUhZ2PRFTaHmWoMZvULAmBhuFXXt2xbQQuj1bjdpQeVqCl9wCXCP0uLZJ9YDSIFVKuDWECODyBCmVw9swks5leT04h2jP-ccI4YlFHiE/46v/98t8PJERTkiQ03p_iAe9bw/h0/h001.uqZq7vwFO2MfEyKUwqJiEh3QKN_DFhwXHYs-OQBdTv4) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: Falling behind even further would be catastrophic for state Democrats nationwide. We need to be proactive, not reactive, to ensure we can maintain our funding commitments this summer. | | | | | ---|--- IN APRIL: We missed our end-of-month fundraising goal. At the same time, Republicans raised over $47 million for their state candidates. Falling behind means potentially having to CUT funding to state Democrats in battleground states. THEN, IN MAY: Despite thousands of donors chipping in, we, unfortunately, missed our goal by 30% for the second month in a row. Meanwhile, Trump raked in over $50 million after becoming a convicted criminal. NOW, IN JUNE: We’re fighting to make up lost ground. The last thing we want to do is cut funding in key states like Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin. But if we fail to reach our fundraising goal for the third time in a row , we’ll be forced to rethink our original 2024 strategy. Falling behind even further would be catastrophic for state Democrats nationwide.
