Friend,

Let me tell you - I can barely contain my excitement.

_I just received some EXCELLENT news from one of my friends that brought me to tears._

****_I haven 't cried like this since 2019 when LSU beat Alabama. It's time to grab a box of tissues and cry some tears of joy because I'm about to give you some news that just might save our Red Wave._

Moses might have well parted the red sea a second time because this is a MIRACLE.

A Patriotic GODSEND has called and said the 6 words that every campaign wants to hear.

body:
Don’t be shy!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86143580/476959261/-849459103?refcode=ea.b5b2d1e9-0921-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.b5b2d1e9-0921-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWIyZDFlOS0wOTIxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JjwS2RHZFwDzuJ-LCW5kF5156YVEF4fGUjc5iWMLUoQ=&emci=02a2f921-a01f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=b5b2d1e9-0921-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=46764483)

With the Tennessee state legislature officially out of session, it’s full throttle on the campaign trail as we zoom toward Election Day — now just about five months away! Your voice and your priorities are crucial at this pivotal stage of the race. As we shift gears, I want to ensure that our campaign is laser-focused on the issues that matter most to you and your family. Whether it's improving healthcare access, safeguarding our voting rights, or tackling gun violence, your input drives our fight for a better Tennessee. **_[That's why I’m reaching out today to ask for a minute of your time. Could you take our quick Priorities Survey to let me know what’s most important to you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86143581/476959262/-362712357?refcode=ea.b5b2d1e9-0921-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.b5b2d1e9-0921-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWIyZDFlOS0wOTIxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JjwS2RHZFwDzuJ-LCW5kF5156YVEF4fGUjc5iWMLUoQ=&emci=02a2f921-a01f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=b5b2d1e9-0921-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=46764483)_** Here in Tennessee, we’re poised to make big changes, but only if we stand united on the issues that impact our everyday lives. From fighting to protect reproductive rights to pushing for economic policies that benefit working families, I’m ready to represent your voice in the U.S. Senate. I'm all ears and ready to listen — your feedback is crucial as we connect with the good people of Tennessee. And as we've seen from our latest polling, it's clear that when more and more Tennesseans hear our message, they join our movement for change. **_[So, don’t be shy! Hit the link, share your thoughts, and let’s shape our future together!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86143582/476959263/-362712357?refcode=ea.b5b2d1e9-0921-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.b5b2d1e9-0921-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWIyZDFlOS0wOTIxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JjwS2RHZFwDzuJ-LCW5kF5156YVEF4fGUjc5iWMLUoQ=&emci=02a2f921-a01f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=b5b2d1e9-0921-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=46764483)_** | [**TAKE MY SURVEY**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86143584/476959264/-362712357?refcode=ea.b5b2d1e9-0921-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.b5b2d1e9-0921-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWIyZDFlOS0wOTIxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JjwS2RHZFwDzuJ-LCW5kF5156YVEF4fGUjc5iWMLUoQ=&emci=02a2f921-a01f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=b5b2d1e9-0921-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=46764483)

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

clean_body: Don’t be shy! | With the Tennessee state legislature officially out of session, it’s full throttle on the campaign trail as we zoom toward Election Day — now just about five months away! Your voice and your priorities are crucial at this pivotal stage of the race. As we shift gears, I want to ensure that our campaign is laser-focused on the issues that matter most to you and your family. Whether it's improving healthcare access, safeguarding our voting rights, or tackling gun violence, your input drives our fight for a better Tennessee. Here in Tennessee, we’re poised to make big changes, but only if we stand united on the issues that impact our everyday lives. From fighting to protect reproductive rights to pushing for economic policies that benefit working families, I’m ready to represent your voice in the U.S. Senate. I'm all ears and ready to listen — your feedback is crucial as we connect with the good people of Tennessee. And as we've seen from our latest polling, it's clear that when more and more Tennesseans hear our message, they join our movement for change. | Thank you for being such a vital part of this journey. Gloria | = Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Send donations via check to: Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

name: Neuropathy
subject: THIS “miracle” mineral ERASES nerve pain
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Groundbreaking research reveals a
surprising connection between neuropathy and this "miracle"
mineral.

A new study found that people who
had high levels of this "miracle" mineral in their diet were less
likely to experience neuropathy.

Folks suffering from

Tingling…
Numbness…
Burning…
And pain in their hands,
feet, legs, and face…

Were all shocked by how adding
this mineral in their diet could eliminate their nerve pain so
quickly… and restore sensation…

Even for people with severe nerve
pain or nerve degenerative diseases like diabetes mellitus and
multiple sclerosis...

Something no prescription drugs,
shots, chiropractic, acupuncture, or doctor visits ever helped
them do…

⇒ Click here to see the
study for yourself

-Dr. Chad Walding
DPT, ISSA Nutrition Specialist &
NativePath Co-Founder

Whichever of the six MAGA Republicans running to defeat me gets nominated, they'll have the full support of Donald Trump from that point through November. Reaching our fundraising goals goes a long way in putting up the strongest possible fight through Election Day, but it doesn't end here. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = All my thanks, \- Jared | | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P.O. subject: Justice must be served!

body:
History is watching us. The future inheritors of this great American experiment are watching us.
It’s ok to be angry, Friend. In fact, you should be angry.

|
---
| | |
Friend,

It's ok to be angry, Friend. In fact, you should be angry.

Because on Thursday, as a Soros-funded prosecutor and Democrat donor Judge celebrated, a Kangaroo Court has convicted President Trump, the leading candidate for President.

Friend, something is dreadfully wrong in America, and this November is our final chance to save the country we love.

name: Mary Trump
subject: Will you help me defend democracy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Team —
On January 6, 2021, the very existence of our democracy was threatened and, for the first time in American history, the peaceful transition of power was interrupted.
The insurrectionists have not been defeated. The attempted coup on that day may have failed, but its architects have been emboldened and they are, in fact, planning the next one.
Today, we’re going to start fighting back. The Democracy Defense Fund is an organization committed to saving our country from the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it — but we need your help.
Will you join our pro-democracy movement by splitting a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton? Any amount helps in our fight to save democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
You know my uncle. He started the “Big Lie” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk.
We must stop him and his loyal cronies and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund — and it’s why Seth Moulton and I are asking for your help now.
We need resources to support organizations and people who are committed to protecting the right to vote and preserving our Constitution, just like Seth Moulton.
This includes an all-out effort to support campaigns at the local and state level in order to take back state houses and preserve election integrity.
All of that is necessary in order to defend our democracy, friend. And that’s what we’re committed to do here at Democracy Defense Fund.
This will only be possible if we all do our part — starting right now. So, will you split a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Thank you,
Mary

name: George Whitesides
subject: My daughter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
|
---
Peter,

[I wanted to take a moment to share more about why I'm running for Congress. I hope you'll read this entire message, then consider splitting a donation between my campaign and Defeat Republicans to help us improve lives in CA-27 and beyond.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86148616/476969182/-870189398?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240602_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyYTg5ZmQ4LTEyMjEtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fjY6bLJhCcrWx7Yr1qpWU5uSqVGc-Y3cWDg3IOjGFTQ=)

When I think about why I'm running for Congress, I think about my kids -- specifically my daughter, Maya.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86148617/476969183/-870189398?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240602_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyYTg5ZmQ4LTEyMjEtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fjY6bLJhCcrWx7Yr1qpWU5uSqVGc-Y3cWDg3IOjGFTQ=)
I'll never forget the day six years ago when Maya came home from kindergarten and told me about some “exercises” she’d done with her classmates. She didn't quite understand what was going on, but I realized she was describing an active shooter drill.

It hit me at that moment; we now live in a country where millions of Americans fear that a hug goodbye before school, a concert, or even church, could be the last.

I also think about the Supreme Court's ruling on _Roe v. Wade._ Right now, Maya is on a path to have less control over her body than my wife, or even my mom, did. I never imagined that was possible, and it's completely unacceptable.

**The problem we face is that a major political party in our country is not willing to take common sense steps to save lives. The good news is we have the power to change that; if we can change who represents us in Congress.**

My Republican opponent Mike Garcia co-sponsored a bill that would create a nationwide ban on abortion _without exceptions._ Literally days after the mass shooting in Uvalde, Texas, Garcia was taking cash from a pro-gun group that opposes background checks.

My campaign to unseat Mike Garcia is one of the most important races in taking Congress back from extremists. Republicans hold a nine-seat majority and **CA-27 is one of just ten GOP-held toss-up districts in the entire country.**

[If you're with me, split a contribution of whatever amount you can between our campaign and Defeat Republicans to flip CA-27 and bring some common sense back to Washington. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86148618/476969184/-870189398?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240602_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyYTg5ZmQ4LTEyMjEtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fjY6bLJhCcrWx7Yr1qpWU5uSqVGc-Y3cWDg3IOjGFTQ=)

clean_body: | Peter, = When I think about why I'm running for Congress, I think about my kids -- specifically my daughter, Maya. = I'll never forget the day six years ago when Maya came home from kindergarten and told me about some “exercises” she’d done with her classmates. She didn't quite understand what was going on, but I realized she was describing an active shooter drill. It hit me at that moment; we now live in a country where millions of Americans fear that a hug goodbye before school, a concert, or even church, could be the last. I also think about the Supreme Court's ruling on Roe v. Wade. Right now, Maya is on a path to have less control over her body than my wife, or even my mom, did. I never imagined that was possible, and it's completely unacceptable. The problem we face is that a major political party in our country is not willing to take common sense steps to save lives. The good news is we have the power to change that; if we can change who represents us in Congress. My Republican opponent Mike Garcia co-sponsored a bill that would create a nationwide ban on abortion without exceptions. Literally days after the mass shooting in Uvalde, Texas, Garcia was taking cash from a pro-gun group that opposes background checks. My campaign to unseat Mike Garcia is one of the most important races in taking Congress back from extremists. Republicans hold a nine-seat majority and CA-27 is one of just ten GOP-held toss-up districts in the entire country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. | = = = = Thanks, George ******** ****** ****** ****** ****** ******** Defeat Republicans | Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www.DefeatRepublicans.org) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Early voting in Nevada's primary has started! 🗳️

in the race that could decide Senate control. That's why she’s reaching

name: Mark Pukita, GFI Ohio
subject: 😫 Tired of the Same Old Faces in DC?
body:
Let's work together to bring change in the political landscape. | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=8ff7606204&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| This week's 3 most important things you need to know or actions you need to take to help us recapture our cities, state, and nation.

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6b6e45180c&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| | | **
WANT TERM LIMITS IN DC?
WANT A BALANCED BUDGET IN DC?
WANT FEDERAL POWERS LIMITED?
SO DOES COS!
"CONVENTION OF STATES ACTION"**

---
|
Most of you have probably heard of an organization called **Convention of States Action** , or "**COS** ". If you haven't, COS needs your help!

COS is working to hold a [**Convention of States**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=c5f64da50f&e=5c740fa3e2). It is a national movement to call a convention under Article V of the United States Constitution, restricted to proposing amendments that will **impose fiscal restraints** on the federal government, **limit its power and jurisdiction** , and impose **term limits** on its officials and members of Congress. Since Congress won't pass legislation to do any of these things, this is how We The People force it upon them!

If this sounds good to you, please sign-up at the COS website [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d5bc8f2b52&e=5c740fa3e2)**** for national registration and [**ALSO HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=2043a2e3c2&e=5c740fa3e2)**** for Ohio-specific registration, or by clicking the image below.

THANK YOU!

---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=5a9427bd45&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
---
| |
**"MUST WATCH" & "CAN'T MISS"
PODCASTS TO HELP PEOPLE
BETTER UNDERSTAND
SELF-GOVERNANCE IN OHIO**

---
|
Here are 4 "must see" and "must subscribe" PODCASTS focused on government, politics, and self-governance in Ohio. They are in alphabetical order by title. They are all valuable & important. Every Ohioan should be subscribed to these podcasts. They help keep Ohioans up-to-date on what's happening in Ohio & county governments that we're not hearing about from legacy, corporate, Ohio media outlets.

[**Ohio Political News**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=03d127e625&e=5c740fa3e2)

[**The Godly Patriot**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=c62805beeb&e=5c740fa3e2)

[**The Moms & Mark Podcast (Coming Soon! Please hit "follow" & also hit the bell for notifications when we launch!)**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=57fa2cd8bb&e=5c740fa3e2)

[**We the People Convention News & Opinion Podcast**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=0bc27013b6&e=5c740fa3e2)

If you have suggestions on any additions to this list, feel free to call or text Mark Pukita at 614-499-0599 (c) and make a recommendation. You can email him too: [mark@mark4ohio.com](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=a8db428aad&e=5c740fa3e2)

THANK YOU!
---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=01c79af9a9&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
---
| |
**KEEP AMERICA FOR AMERICANS!
CHINA'S SILENT WAR ON AMERICA!
WEEK 2 • LESSON 2**

---
|
Two weeks ago we sent out a one-time special message about a new initiative called "[**America for Americans**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f61712460c&e=5c740fa3e2)" designed to wake up more Ohioans to the threat China poses to our communities, state, and nation. If you haven't seen that message, you can access a copy of it on the web [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=4e52eec1c4&e=5c740fa3e2).

Part of this initiative is an Ohio-developed, 10-week "course" titled “**China’s Silent War on America** ”. A lesson will be released every week for 10 weeks. To remind you, we'll highlight new lessons in this email. Last week we highlighted [**Lesson 1**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d7715c573c&e=5c740fa3e2). This week, we're highlighting [**Lesson 2: China’s Goal of World Domination Using the Belt and Road Initiative.**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=432abe1d32&e=5c740fa3e2)

[**America for Americans**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=fcfb29824c&e=5c740fa3e2) will provide a short lesson, one a week for ten weeks, to educate us on the many strategies China is using to undermine America’s power at home and abroad, while enriching its own homeland. The reader will also be guided towards action items to help reduce China’s influence in the state of Ohio.

Click [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f54ae874c0&e=5c740fa3e2) or on the image below to access [**Lesson 2**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=0f2e511230&e=5c740fa3e2) of “**China’s Silent War on America** ” called **"China’s Goal of World Domination Using the Belt and Road Initiative".**

_Next week's lesson, Lesson 3, will be about how China works to sow chaos here in the United States through a strategy called China's "United Front System"._

THANK YOU!

---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=73268a95f6&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
| [May 26, 2024 - ⏰ Crucial Info Awaits You This Week](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d34c04f895&e=5c740fa3e2)

[May 19, 2024 - 📢 Your Voice Needed for Election Integrity TODAY!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=968b41d9ed&e=5c740fa3e2 "📢 Your Voice Needed for Election Integrity TODAY!")

[April 28, 2024 - ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d26c95b34a&e=5c740fa3e2)[👥 ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=73d133d50f&e=5c740fa3e2 "👥 Urgent: Safeguard our Kids, Elections, and Party!")[Urgent: Safeguard our Kids, Elections, and Party!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=2e1ff7c81b&e=5c740fa3e2)

[April 21, 2024 - 📣 Breaking: Election Integrity Lawsuit](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d3995e2169&e=5c740fa3e2)

[April 14, 2024 - This Week's Must-Know Trio!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=4ed275e641&e=5c740fa3e2)

[April 7, 2024 - Secure American Freedoms This Week!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=115f61023e&e=5c740fa3e2)

[**CLICK HERE for access to all past issues!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=1623b5613b&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
|

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
mark@gfiohio.com
614-499-0599 (c)

This week, we're highlighting will provide a short lesson, one a week for ten weeks, to educate us on the many strategies China is using to undermine America’s power at home and abroad, while enriching its own homeland. The reader will also be guided towards action items to help reduce China’s influence in the state of Ohio. Click or on the image below to access of “China’s Silent War on America ” called "China’s Goal of World Domination Using the Belt and Road Initiative". Next week's lesson, Lesson 3, will be about how China works to sow chaos here in the United States through a strategy called China's "United Front System". THANK YOU! | | | Prior Issues of This Email You May Find Valuable | "📢 Your Voice Needed for Election Integrity TODAY!" "👥 Urgent: Safeguard our Kids, Elections, and Party!" | | | Thank you for being a GFI person as part of the GFI network. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here! Fellow patriot,

I’m Bernie Moreno, a proud businessman who has been serving Ohioans for years, helping families find the perfect car for their needs. My opponent, Sherrod Brown, thinks bashing an honorable and necessary profession like selling cars is clever. But guess what? I’m proud of my work chasing the American dream.

\*\*So, just for Sherrod, my campaign is doing something special:\*\*

-> ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=9069982.3938.1.afa2087869cb24ffe3a9fcd226206d20 )<-

_ \*\*Welcome to our November to Remember Fire Sherrod Brown Sales Event!\*\* _

_You heard that right! _Just like the unbeatable deals you would have found at my dealerships, we have an unbeatable opportunity to take back Ohio, flip the Senate red, and put an end to Sherrod Brown’s career in Washington!

-> \*\*FIND YOUR NEXT SENATOR\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=9069982.3939.1.c79f2d01c40925454229fa91714e9939 )<-

_ \*\*We’ve got Hot Deals that you won’t want to pass on:\*\* _

🔥 \*\*ZERO DOWN ON TAXES – Get rid of America-last, tax-and-spend liberals like Sherrod Brown and put more money in your pockets!

🔥 FACTORY WARRANTY ON VALUES – Unlike Brown's far-left, woke views, my conservative principles are guaranteed to stand the test of time.

🔥 TRADE IN YOUR OLD SENATOR – Trade in Brown for a fresh, new leader who’s committed to America, not D.C. elites and his own career.

_ The time to take advantage of this offer is N__OW!_\*\*

\*\*_ And good news... _\*\*

\*\*_You’re already PRE-APPROVED TO DONATE!_\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=9069982.3940.1.b43e2542403c59c987b67428860c8715 )

Let’s make this a November to Remember and take Sherrod Brown for a final ride out of the Senate! Together, we will steer Ohio toward a better and more prosperous future.

To victory,

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=9069982.3941.1.4d3f56609ecd78033284c1567651e2f2 )

Bernie Moreno

GOP Nominee for Senate, Ohio

->

\*\*Meet Bernie Moreno:\*\*

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=9069982.3942.1.b522f4d13a8874e70d2fcb6e15771e0a ) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

-> \*\* Join Bernie ➞ \*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=9069982.3943.1.3f9a7ec476c18839861cc7b037a16f4f )<-

<-

-> ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=9069982.3933.1.2543d47c13a560d7cdecc38bbfa2324e )<-

->

\*\*FOLLOW BERNIE ON SOCIAL MEDIA\*\*

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=9069982.3934.1.54c5c82855e3717ac31a3e8006079b46 ) ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=9069982.3935.1.503f0e62bbbc5cbb4da1c5219d7b7aa7 ) ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=9069982.3936.1.9a5b5d7cee88850615083ac99637be3a )

Hi Peter,
As we head into the summer, it is more clear than ever that we are in one of the most crucial political showdowns in Tennessee here in District 20.
Right now, I have a Republican opponent threatening my seat in the Tennessee State Senate. Our opponent is ready to run an aggressive campaign, and has already shored up support from donors with deep pockets. Tennessee Republicans intend to spend $1M against us , and will stop at nothing to flip this seat.
I’ve spent four years in the legislature working for Tennessee families , but in order to keep being a voice for Nashvillians and Tennesseans, I need your support. Let’s continue to fight for the values that helped us flip this seat in 2020, and send a message that we are here to stay.
Can I count on you to chip in $25, $50, $100, or $250 today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/re-elect-heidi-email] Your investment is crucial to our ability to fund the widespread voter outreach necessary to win this race.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/re-elect-heidi-email]
Thank you for joining me at this critical time.
Heidi Campbell
Senator Heidi Campbell is running for re-election in TN Senate District 20. She is championing change for Tennessee and won't rest until we see gun safety reform, corporate accountability, and a safe and prosperous community where everyone can thrive.

name: Brencia Berry (via Democrats.org)
subject: Enough is enough.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
On National Gun Violence Awareness Day, let’s fight for safety measures to prevent more tragedies. | |
---
Hi, Derek. Each year during National Gun Violence Awareness Month, we pause to remember those we have lost to gun violence and all those impacted by it, and rededicate ourselves to ending this epidemic. For years, Democratic leaders and advocates have worked to address the rise of gun violence, even in the face of opposition from Republicans at all levels of government. President Biden and Vice President Harris have taken urgent action to address gun violence in our country. In 2022, they signed the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act, **the most significant gun legislation in 30 years** , which implemented red flag laws, narrowed the “boyfriend loophole,” began requiring young people under 21 to undergo enhanced background checks, made gun trafficking and straw purchasing federal crimes, and provided funding to expand access to mental health services. The Biden-Harris administration created the first-ever White House Office of Gun Violence Prevention whose mission is to fight to prevent more tragedies. Our president’s goal is to make our schools, churches, grocery stores, and communities safer. We hope you’ll get involved, too. [Join an upcoming training session that will prepare you to share facts with your online community using our organizing tool, Reach. Become an informed and trusted messenger for your community! ](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.HV-T5b9C6Y6Pisqo-P4PmwBtZ_GxELuT586x3F0HSfeU7kWu4l5_994IJ3u6rvF58HCvbDeZswrpJa0IiCPm9_Hmj5z4et4dxDBOXfT24uAyv1Qfe6nDLsUkdT4KMWpuH0F30YWCVARdZifuNyVv2RhD1pmPLAWVmRxjMBugqzCCHyzYbZS9wPUa_EHq5KUaaFwHFQFxunYrCHpQ98R_4r_xllLJ-Grlr5yrXUDm0Kix2GEKpahEzk_H1C7sKmVkatuqxYwMWgUuOeEtjtWAPLyo1ag2mEvqyHRsTT0qB3GICds_n-RVPvr6HslHOqsCvZ_msW4mJssRHnymwI54pA/46v/jKe7kCpLSkOgBD4-H5l_mQ/h0/h001.kl_mzu_hZcL3uYIR0QA6OSXmueDSJ3soym2nvOCBCto)

clean_body: On National Gun Violence Awareness Day, let’s fight for safety measures to prevent more tragedies. | | Hi, Derek. Each year during National Gun Violence Awareness Month, we pause to remember those we have lost to gun violence and all those impacted by it, and rededicate ourselves to ending this epidemic. For years, Democratic leaders and advocates have worked to address the rise of gun violence, even in the face of opposition from Republicans at all levels of government. President Biden and Vice President Harris have taken urgent action to address gun violence in our country. In 2022, they signed the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act, the most significant gun legislation in 30 years , which implemented red flag laws, narrowed the “boyfriend loophole,” began requiring young people under 21 to undergo enhanced background checks, made gun trafficking and straw purchasing federal crimes, and provided funding to expand access to mental health services. The Biden-Harris administration created the first-ever White House Office of Gun Violence Prevention whose mission is to fight to prevent more tragedies. Our president’s goal is to make our schools, churches, grocery stores, and communities safer. We hope you’ll get involved, too. Your continued advocacy and support for Democrats helps make greater strides for gun safety. Brencia Brencia Berry Political Director Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . Important endorsement announcement from the Jane Fonda Climate PAC

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86149524/476972344/1328794144?refcode=ea.e9f4f6a1-1721-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.e9f4f6a1-1721-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5ZjRmNmExLTE3MjEtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=el66S18odrpve7Vp6CA3D8jAZgKoOcindxgwNmw0CdA=&emci=c2782e01-1521-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=e9f4f6a1-1721-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=4823105)

Hi Team, We’re thrilled to introduce you to the next group of climate champions we’re supporting this year. These candidates are ready to lead the charge in protecting Colorado’s natural beauty and tackling the climate crisis head-on. Colorado is well known as the home of a wide variety of natural wonders. Unfortunately, the fossil fuel industry and other corporate polluters seem to always prioritize their profits over protecting the natural resources we hold dear. But the issue is bigger than protecting pristine views and natural wonders. The deadly byproducts of fossil fuel extraction, transmission, and storage pose a direct threat to communities across the state, communities that have too long been ignored by their elected officials. Fracking, oil and gas pipelines, and poorly regulated utility giants consistently pollute the air and water communities depend on, in addition to the broader impacts of our changing climate, like wildfires, drought, and flooding. The good news is that this year, Coloradans have a chance to elect some climate champions in key positions who are ready to roll up their sleeves and get to work. Here are the incredible candidates we’re endorsing: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86149525/476972345/-218330231?refcode=ea.e9f4f6a1-1721-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.e9f4f6a1-1721-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5ZjRmNmExLTE3MjEtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=el66S18odrpve7Vp6CA3D8jAZgKoOcindxgwNmw0CdA=) _**Elliott Hood for CU Regent At-Large**_
Elliott is a passionate advocate for climate action and sustainability. As an environmental scientist and educator, he has consistently demonstrated his commitment to protecting our planet. Elliott’s vision includes implementing sustainable practices across all CU campuses, promoting climate-focused research, and implementing policies that reduce the university’s carbon footprint. _**Kyra deGruy Kennedy for State House District 30**_
Kyra understands that climate change is the most pressing issue we face. She has a proven track record of working on legislation that funds clean energy projects, wildfire mitigation, and watershed protection. Kyra is dedicated to addressing historic inequities caused by climate change, investing in sustainable infrastructure, and transitioning Colorado off fossil fuels in a safe and just way. . **_Junie Joseph for State House District 10_**
Junie has been a tireless advocate for climate action and environmental justice in the Colorado State Legislature. She has promoted renewable energy initiatives, supported sustainable transportation solutions, and worked on legislation that protects Colorado's natural resources. Junie's leadership is essential for continuing the fight against climate change and ensuring a just transition to a sustainable future. **You’ll hear more from us about each of these candidates between now and their June 25 Primary Election. [In the meantime, will you help us boost their campaigns by splitting a contribution today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86149526/476972346/-218330231?refcode=ea.e9f4f6a1-1721-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.e9f4f6a1-1721-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5ZjRmNmExLTE3MjEtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=el66S18odrpve7Vp6CA3D8jAZgKoOcindxgwNmw0CdA=)** | [Split a Contribution](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86149527/476972347/-218330231?refcode=ea.e9f4f6a1-1721-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.e9f4f6a1-1721-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5ZjRmNmExLTE3MjEtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=el66S18odrpve7Vp6CA3D8jAZgKoOcindxgwNmw0CdA=)

The Jane PAC Team

body:
I want to show you these hateful mailers Ken Calvert sent out about me

| Peter, as Pride Month starts, I wanted to share with you what happened to me when I first ran for Congress in 1994. **I was** **publicly outed as gay by my Republican opponent, Ken Calvert.**

**Today, I wanted to show you the exact mailers that were used:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86149658/476973052/649527246?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20240602_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTZlOTk5OC0xODIxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=twJ1jT2odYNQNvGas4RPy1vkcORcP8CHVQjnTHlncEI=) Peter, in a series of bright pink mailers, Ken Calvert – _a currently sitting US Congressman_ – **revealed my sexuality to thousands of Riverside residents without my consent.**

For members of the LGBTQ+ community, coming out is an extremely personal and sensitive moment. So, you can imagine my horror and heartbreak upon finding out I had been outed so publicly in such a hateful way. I was crushed.

**I ended up losing that extremely competitive race and it wasn’t until 18 years later that I finally won my race for Congress in 2012.**

Today, I am proud to be able to fight for LGBTQ+ rights and dignity in Congress. But sadly this type of homophobia is still rampant in the Republican House Majority:
* _Ken Calvert – the man who sent these mailers – is still in Congress!_
* _House Speaker Mike Johnson is a far-right Christian Nationalist who wants to criminalize homosexuality!_
* _The House MAGA Majority spent weeks last year attacking trans folks!_

[**Peter, in 1994 when I was attacked for my identity, I lost my race because I didn’t have good people like you by my side. But now I do -- and together we can fight for LGBTQ+ rights. That’s why I’m hoping that I can count on you to chip in $7 to help me remove hateful Republicans from power by taking back the House Majority. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86149659/476973053/649527246?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20240602_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTZlOTk5OC0xODIxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=twJ1jT2odYNQNvGas4RPy1vkcORcP8CHVQjnTHlncEI=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86149665/476973059/649527246?amount=7&amounts=7,10,15&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20240602_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTZlOTk5OC0xODIxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=twJ1jT2odYNQNvGas4RPy1vkcORcP8CHVQjnTHlncEI=)

Fellow American,

A verdict has been reached.

**Judge Juan Merchan's kangaroo court has found Donald J. Trump guilty.**

So, what's next?

**_We never stop fighting. The Left believes that by marking DJT "guilty", our movement will simply melt away, and they'll get away with the destruction of this country, of our MAGA movement, of America as we know it._**

**That will NEVER happen.**

JD Vance

name: Michael Keaton
subject: Pennsylvania has a chance to be the hero
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240602-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240602-2&refcode2=3106_552475_fIfLUm&akid=3106%2E552475%2EfIfLUm)
Peter, Michael Keaton here.
**[I’m reaching out on behalf of a fellow Pennsylvanian, Bob Casey. Before I get into it, can you chip in $5 or whatever you can spare to his re-election campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240602-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240602-2&refcode2=3106_552475_fIfLUm&akid=3106%2E552475%2EfIfLUm)**
Just like Bob, I was born and raised in Pennsylvania.
I’m the youngest of seven kids and the proud son of two parents who taught all of us the importance of holding strong and decent values — values that Bob embodies every day in the Senate as he fights for the people of our Commonwealth.
He’s a tireless advocate for our seniors, kids, union workers, and more in Washington. Whether he’s working to expand access to Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid, protect our right to organize, or lower costs for working families — he’s never one to back down from a fight.
That’s why I’m asking for your help to send Bob Casey back to the Senate.
By defending the Senate, we’re defending democracy — and that’s not an exaggeration.
**[The Democratic Senate majority hinges on Pennsylvania. So if you can spare $5, $10, or $20 to give to Bob’s campaign — it’s important.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240602-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240602-2&refcode2=3106_552475_fIfLUm&akid=3106%2E552475%2EfIfLUm)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240602-2?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240602-2-el&refcode2=3106_552475_fIfLUm&akid=3106%2E552475%2EfIfLUm) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240602-2?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240602-2-el&refcode2=3106_552475_fIfLUm&akid=3106%2E552475%2EfIfLUm) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240602-2?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240602-2-el&refcode2=3106_552475_fIfLUm&akid=3106%2E552475%2EfIfLUm) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240602-2?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240602-2-el&refcode2=3106_552475_fIfLUm&akid=3106%2E552475%2EfIfLUm) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240602-2?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240602-2-el&refcode2=3106_552475_fIfLUm&akid=3106%2E552475%2EfIfLUm) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240602-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240602-2&refcode2=3106_552475_fIfLUm&akid=3106%2E552475%2EfIfLUm)

This November, Pennsylvania has a chance to be the hero, the buzzer-beater, the walk-off. Let’s not pass up this opportunity.
Thank you. Let’s get ‘em.
— Michael

Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.
clean_body: Peter, Michael Keaton here. Just like Bob, I was born and raised in Pennsylvania. I’m the youngest of seven kids and the proud son of two parents who taught all of us the importance of holding strong and decent values — values that Bob embodies every day in the Senate as he fights for the people of our Commonwealth. He’s a tireless advocate for our seniors, kids, union workers, and more in Washington. Whether he’s working to expand access to Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid, protect our right to organize, or lower costs for working families — he’s never one to back down from a fight. That’s why I’m asking for your help to send Bob Casey back to the Senate. By defending the Senate, we’re defending democracy — and that’s not an exaggeration. Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue. This November, Pennsylvania has a chance to be the hero, the buzzer-beater, the walk-off. Let’s not pass up this opportunity. Thank you. Let’s get ‘em. — Michael

name: Carville, James
subject: the absolute worst
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
it's time kick things into high gear
| | |
---
Friend, we're already heading into the final stretch of Q2. If we want ANY chance of saving our Senate majority this fall, it's time to unhitch the trailer and kick things into high gear.
**And it’s not just about our Senate majority — Rick Scott is one of the biggest threats to our country. Period. **
This guy wrote the plan so extreme even Republicans couldn’t win on it! **He wants****to end Social Security and Medicare and raise****taxes on everyone EXCEPT millionaires. Meanwhile, he’s one of the richest members of Congress. **
**[That's why I'm personally asking you to split $5 today between Kirsten and Debbie to help Debbie Mucarsel-Powell (D) hit her weekly $100,000 goal and flip Florida blue this November. name: THANK YOU JAMIE RASKIN! (via VPP)
subject: Sign the letter before your signature spot closes:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
He just DESTROYED the GOP over their impeachment plot:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/69745?t=6&akid=14939%2E878179%2ErhWvwi) Jamie Raskin is a HERO! He’s one of the TOP Democrats fighting to end the MAGA mob’s impeachment scheme — and he’s not backing down.

[**The GOP is hell-bent on SILENCING Raskin, so we need a SURGE of support from folks like you to show we have his back! HURRY: ADD YOUR NAME BY MIDNIGHT to thank Rep. Jamie Raskin »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/69745?t=7&akid=14939%2E878179%2ErhWvwi) | [YOUR ONLY CHANCE TO SIGN: CHIP IN $3 TO ADD YOUR NAME NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/69745?t=8&akid=14939%2E878179%2ErhWvwi)
---
TO: Rep. Jamie Raskin
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: You’re a hero! **_To Rep. Jamie Raskin — thank you for being one of the top defenders of our democracy!_**

We owe _so much_ of our Democratic success this year to you.

You were a crucial figure in averting the disastrous government shutdown (twice!). You called out the GOP for electing extremist Speaker Mike Johnson.

**And now, you’re fighting tooth and nail to save President Biden from a baseless impeachment — even in the face of vile MAGA attacks.**

[**I know Republicans are using every dirty trick in the book to SILENCE you — So today, I’m fighting back and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to elect more amazing Democrats like you who will flip the House and save our democracy! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/69745?t=9&akid=14939%2E878179%2ErhWvwi) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/69745?t=10&akid=14939%2E878179%2ErhWvwi)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=14939%2E878179%2ErhWvwi). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=14939%2E878179%2ErhWvwi).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=14939%2E878179%2ErhWvwi) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=14939%2E878179%2ErhWvwi). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=14939%2E878179%2ErhWvwi)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=14939%2E878179%2ErhWvwi)

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: Could I ask you to raise your voice today?
body:
You and I both know that every life is a precious gift.
__
Stop the Biden Administration's radical abortion agenda! | | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=478bdb90a31d43b9a25d2c6a1996e626&_t=TX-8Q8clNm3Sl9KUXDqA7_WAmNIE5Y7l4mnXfNdGqhI2brYTayh-BjVgBQQXonFBhzjbdCIyUFnl7lA29DTbLV40xeil0jVH7WzpzHBxjrXF3qbGq-sOg4T-33YVHoH1)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=478bdb90a31d43b9a25d2c6a1996e626&_e=15H5hy0itzsVMWjzE5EHkeMrXeu6yCn31KX2zdGU69A-nX85d9HQ6dp73LBgSNQal7vkqyyR6puL2IEuXFPWn0cfOS6rmH4tGg8Qv2N2e5JjScquy1QYE0lY0V5HwPRUBt6KqAmsx4p85t6UgYwpLUOJFHo-D3tCuwpZyLoIVyBkA4onsIGWMwcz2KcKtNL6myCAYwCjd0S8_D-EetQpXUqQknDDU2cSe-BGuVVJpYzfTl6w6753eCfk0NIuv9H5ILJKfFe9yzWE-5uSTh6LvQOVfWaoysDpiTva8WD6KknlTccUbbdi7KbVPQ2gpBIHi2DqX-nBIiq3ULoh_uxufUMGlpvIDh6Cb2uTH7z5AcDOd4LmaHW0b-4S2bDcYq4s)

---
| |
Dear Fellow American,

It's Sarah Huckabee Sanders, Governor of Arkansas.

You and I both know that every life is a precious gift. Yet, the Biden Administration continues to threaten the innocent and the voiceless under the guise of reproductive rights.

Every day, they press ahead with policies that expand access to dangerous abortion drugs and allow abortion-on-demand, resulting in countless, unthinkable losses of innocent life. The danger to future generations, the heartbreaking impact on families, and the erosion of our most fundamental values as Americans are at stake.

But we don't have to accept this reality. There is a solution, and you are a key part of it.

I am proud to join forces with SBA Pro-Life America, the most principled and effective organization fighting to end abortion in our country. By advocating for legislation that serves women and saves babies, SBA Pro-Life America stands at the forefront of this battle for life.

**But our effectiveness relies on dedicated individuals like YOU. YOUR voice matters. YOUR actions matter.**

That's why I'm personally inviting you to join us by signing the Stand For Life Pledge. This is a powerful way for us to demonstrate that, together, we form a strong, nationwide coalition poised to protect life, challenge policies that devalue it, and promote a culture that cherishes the value of every human life.

As a pro-life American, would you step forward today and sign our Pledge for Life? You can do so at the link below:

[https://action.sbaprolife.org/sarah-huckabee-sanders](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=478bdb90a31d43b9a25d2c6a1996e626&_e=15H5hy0itzsVMWjzE5EHkeMrXeu6yCn31KX2zdGU69A-nX85d9HQ6dp73LBgSNQal7vkqyyR6puL2IEuXFPWn0cfOS6rmH4tGg8Qv2N2e5JjScquy1QYE0lY0V5HwPRUBt6KqAmsx4p85t6UgYwpLUOJFHo-D3tCuwpZyLoIVyBkA4onsIGWMwcz2KcKtNL6myCAYwCjd0S8_D-EetQpXUqQknDDU2cSe-BGuVVJpYyDX231S02BBGtDnAGG6GBw0N8QPcWwiLIhi5HI_ErLdXTXL7aEH7GWXateUwCLIzuPosfzqwL8azxheSpCc5hvUOtT2ZdDzvIky0WGW35qAopAys0Il1x_JUM2KkDXou8zWXTSSbctYaEP1piUUpri)

Together, we can protect the future and build a pro-life America. Thank you for standing with us and for acting on your beliefs - because it's in these actions that change truly begins.

God bless you,

Sarah Huckabee Sanders
Governor of Arkansas

clean_body: You and I both know that every life is a precious gift. Stop the Biden Administration's radical abortion agenda! | | | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | Dear Fellow American, It's Sarah Huckabee Sanders, Governor of Arkansas. You and I both know that every life is a precious gift. Yet, the Biden Administration continues to threaten the innocent and the voiceless under the guise of reproductive rights. Every day, they press ahead with policies that expand access to dangerous abortion drugs and allow abortion-on-demand, resulting in countless, unthinkable losses of innocent life. The danger to future generations, the heartbreaking impact on families, and the erosion of our most fundamental values as Americans are at stake. But we don't have to accept this reality. There is a solution, and you are a key part of it. I am proud to join forces with SBA Pro-Life America, the most principled and effective organization fighting to end abortion in our country. By advocating for legislation that serves women and saves babies, SBA Pro-Life America stands at the forefront of this battle for life. But our effectiveness relies on dedicated individuals like YOU. YOUR voice matters. YOUR actions matter. That's why I'm personally inviting you to join us by signing the Stand For Life Pledge. This is a powerful way for us to demonstrate that, together, we form a strong, nationwide coalition poised to protect life, challenge policies that devalue it, and promote a culture that cherishes the value of every human life. As a pro-life American, would you step forward today and sign our Pledge for Life? You can do so at the link below: Together, we can protect the future and build a pro-life America. Thank you for standing with us and for acting on your beliefs - because it's in these actions that change truly begins. God bless you, Sarah Huckabee Sanders Governor of Arkansas | | | | | | | | Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr. PO Box 803 Arlington, VA, 22206 .

name: Melissa Vine
subject: Thank you for signing up and joining me!
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/l4BxNE81oEannCh9sTP7fQ2?refcode=2400-website [https://secure.ngpvan.com/l4BxNE81oEannCh9sTP7fQ2?refcode=2400-website]Hey friend,

I am Melissa Vine, and I want to introduce myself as a candidate for Congress in Iowa's 3rd Congressional District! I'm the pro-choice Democrat who will unseat Zach Nunn. Thank you for signing up to join my campaign!

https://secure.ngpvan.com/l4BxNE81oEannCh9sTP7fQ2?refcode=2400-website [https://secure.ngpvan.com/l4BxNE81oEannCh9sTP7fQ2?refcode=2400-website]

Ten years ago, I faced a turning point in my life. I left an abusive marriage and suddenly found myself going from being a successful business owner to having $0 to my name.

At that moment, I made a promise to my four young boys and myself that this would not be the end of our story. Starting over, I worked at Hy-Vee, earning $8.50 an hour to provide for my family. I then pursued and completed my master's degree, launched and sold two small businesses, and worked as a mental health provider. Through these experiences, I realized that helping people one-on-one wasn't enough.

I want to change the systems that harm people. Will you donate today and join my journey to make a lasting difference for Iowa families like mine? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/l4BxNE81oEannCh9sTP7fQ2?refcode=2400-website]

DONATE [http://secure.ngpvan.com/l4BxNE81oEannCh9sTP7fQ2?refcode=2400-website]

Representative Zach Nunn and others in Congress are pushing policies that severely limit abortion access and undermine women's rights to make their own healthcare decisions. Their positions show a lack of understanding of the real-life challenges women face .

The upcoming election will be pivotal - abortion access, the economic well-being of working families, and the integrity of our democracy are all at stake. We need leaders who understand these issues and are committed to addressing them.

That is why I have stepped up to run for Congress. I believe that if you hit rock bottom, it should never be the end, but the beginning of a new chapter. It's time to bring a change to Congress – a change that genuinely represents and fights for families like ours.

We've set an ambitious goal of raising $10,000 in grassroots donations from new supporters this week and need to reach it. Please donate anything you can today! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/l4BxNE81oEannCh9sTP7fQ2?refcode=2400-website]

With gratitude and determination,
Melissa Vine
Candidate For Congress IA-03

http://secure.ngpvan.com/l4BxNE81oEannCh9sTP7fQ2?refcode=2400-website [http://secure.ngpvan.com/l4BxNE81oEannCh9sTP7fQ2?refcode=2400-website]

DONATE [http://secure.ngpvan.com/l4BxNE81oEannCh9sTP7fQ2?refcode=2400-website]

WEBSITE [https://melissavine.com/]

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

---
Look,

Last week, we sent you an urgent poll about Social Security after a new House Republican plan called for over $1.5 trillion in cuts to Social Security, including an increase in the retirement age to 69 and cutting disability benefits.

**But our records indicate that you didn’t respond.** Without [4] more responses from your area, our data won’t be statistically significant.

**[_So we’re giving you a second chance to complete the poll. Click HERE or use the button below to sign »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll?source=FFR_20240602_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS&t=7&akid=21482%2E4449941%2Ehzm72h)** | **[COMPLETE POLL NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll?source=FFR_20240602_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS&t=8&akid=21482%2E4449941%2Ehzm72h)**
---
We’ve attached the original poll below for your records. Thanks,

\- Fight for Reform Data Team
* * *
From: Oh no... [FFR]
Subject: DECREASE in Social Security?!
To: Name on file
**ACTION REQUIRED**
**We are seriously trying not to panic, team** – If the GOP cuts Social Security benefits, the most vulnerable will face an uncertain future!

That’s why we’ve sent out an **urgent Social Security poll for your area****:** we need to know what you think to better prepare for the 2024 election!
**[_Do you agree we need to protect Social Security from Republican cuts and save our seniors?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll?source=FFR_20240602_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS&t=9&akid=21482%2E4449941%2Ehzm72h)** | **[YES, I ABSOLUTELY DO! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll?source=FFR_20240602_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS&t=10&akid=21482%2E4449941%2Ehzm72h)**
---
**[NO, I DO NOT »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll?source=FFR_20240602_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS&t=11&akid=21482%2E4449941%2Ehzm72h)**
**[I’M UNSURE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll?source=FFR_20240602_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS&t=12&akid=21482%2E4449941%2Ehzm72h)**
**_WE NEED 200 LOCAL RESPONSES BY 5-27-24, 11:59 PM ET_ **
We can’t let MAGA Republicans demolish our earned benefits.

We really need you to speak up, team.

FFR

The answer is yes. Absolutely yes. Our campaign is powered by people like you contributing to emails like this. Believe it or not, lots and lots of Democrats have already chipped in their $25 since the verdict came in, and they’re depending on you to do the same. Your $25 is how we harness the news cycle and retake the narrative -- and do all the other things necessary to win this race. It all adds up when we work together. And that’s exactly how we’re going to defeat Donald Trump and his MAGA extremists again. One $25 donation, Peter. Your President is counting on you. Can you make it? | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you sincerely for all you do for this campaign. If we're in it together, we're going to win this election. Biden-Harris 2024

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: the longest email I’ll send you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/26126?t=1009&amount=25&akid=1764%2E52803%2ESk7FZc ][IMG]

Peter, this is probably the longest email you’ll ever get from
me.

But it’s also one of the most important, so it really would mean a lot to
me if you could read through it.

If you’re in a hurry or if you’re already sold and ready to do whatever it
takes to help me defeat Larry Hogan and defend our Senate majority,
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/26126?t=1010&amount=25&akid=1764%2E52803%2ESk7FZc ]then please consider making a quick grassroots contribution to help us
start the general election with some serious momentum!

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/26126?t=1011&amount=25&akid=1764%2E52803%2ESk7FZc ]Donate

I want to outline our campaign message going forward for the General
Election to fill Maryland’s open U.S. Senate seat. It hinges on 3 major
components:

Power to the People

This campaign has never been about me,
Peter. It’s always been about
Marylanders, our families, and our communities.

And when Republican Larry Hogan entered the race putting our Democratic
Senate majority at risk, it became about the future of the entire country.

That’s why national Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this
race. But during the Democratic Primary, we proved that Maryland is won by
the many, not by the money.

We’ve never had limitless resources, million dollar checks, or shady dark
money super PACs pulling the strings. Instead, we built a grassroots
coalition of people in every corner of the state who stepped up to
volunteer, donate, and talk to their neighbors about our campaign.

Your time and your contributions were the driving force behind our primary
victory, and we need to continue building on that in order to win in
November.

Focus on the Issues that Matter

While Republicans are lining up to get behind Donald Trump and his
divisive MAGA agenda, we're focusing on the issues that matter most to
people — like protecting abortion rights, improving wages, and preserving
our democracy.

My Republican opponent Larry Hogan hopes Marylanders won’t remember that
as governor, he vetoed legislation that would have expanded access to
abortion care throughout the state.

He’s banking on Marylanders forgetting that he vetoed a $15 minimum wage
and legislation to benefit unions and workers.

He’s hoping Marylanders won’t realize that electing him means handing
control of the Senate over to extremists like Ted Cruz and Lindsey Graham.

On the issues that matter most, Hogan’s record speaks for itself: He’s all
wrong for Maryland, and he’ll say and do whatever he thinks will win him
this seat.

Make the Case for a Democratic Senate Majority

Here’s the truth,
Peter: There simply isn’t any
way Democrats maintain our razor-thin Senate majority if Larry Hogan wins
this open seat.

Mitch McConnell handpicked Hogan for this race because he sees Maryland as
his best chance to flip a seat, retake the majority, and enact his
far-right, anti-choice agenda.

If the GOP retakes the Senate, they'll have the power to pass a national
abortion ban, roll back environmental protections, undermine our
elections, and so much more.

Hogan has proven that he cannot be trusted to protect our reproductive
rights or put Maryland families first. Defending the Senate is the only
way to protect our freedoms, uplift working families, and preserve our
democracy.

We’ve got a winning message that’s resonating with voters,
Peter, and I need your support
to make sure everyone hears it. [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/26126?t=1012&amount=25&akid=1764%2E52803%2ESk7FZc ]Can I count on you to chip in $25 to
give our grassroots team the resources we need to reach Marylanders across
the state?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/26126?t=1013&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=1764%2E52803%2ESk7FZc ]Chip in $25
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/26126?t=1014&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1764%2E52803%2ESk7FZc ]Chip in $50
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/26126?t=1015&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=1764%2E52803%2ESk7FZc ]Chip in $100
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/26126?t=1016&express_lane=true&amount=200&akid=1764%2E52803%2ESk7FZc ]Chip in $200
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/26126?t=1007&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=1764%2E52803%2ESk7FZc ]Chip in $250
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/26126?t=1008&amount=35&akid=1764%2E52803%2ESk7FZc ]Other Amount

Thank you for taking the time to read this, Peter.

Together,

Angela Alsobrooks

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/89?t=1001&akid=1764%2E52803%2ESk7FZc ][IMG]

We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=1002&akid=1764%2E52803%2ESk7FZc ]click here.
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/115?t=1003&akid=1764%2E52803%2ESk7FZc ]Text JOIN to 74064 to receive SMS updates
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4693?t=1004&akid=1764%2E52803%2ESk7FZc ]Chip in a one-time donation
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4694?t=1005&akid=1764%2E52803%2ESk7FZc ]Chip in a monthly recurring donation!

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1764%2E52803%2ESk7FZc

Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
Alsobrooks for Senate
PO Box 6058
Largo, MD 20792

subject: A quick note

body:
I hate to email you on a Sunday, but it’s important. I’m personally reaching out because I was just informed I missed May’s fundraising target by just a few hundred dollars. | Peter,

I hate to email you on a Sunday, but it’s important. I’m personally reaching out because I was just informed I missed May’s fundraising target by just a few hundred dollars.

We have ZERO room for error if we’re going to gain the lead in this tied race and flip Wisconsin’s battleground Senate seat RED.

[**If just a few committed Conservatives pitch in before the end of the weekend, we’ll close our fundraising shortfall and be back on track to securing victory.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c49275b12ac84f8f899fb2220ebf9ed2&_e=E7MBlIPsW591JSkY7fA-y5XQZFIUn4RGxWRrl7wJetNZDdkIzh9GXbojFmS9eDaenj74AkKPSL3YUsDVuPuJDioSE4Qe5_itDzDEZtzjCKBgLkdrkxd81JNZ7fPyCtCbtCtQRg-k0W4lCdtn1CUZuZe4om04U92BN-ethRgVBHJndUrr0ompBjTu2yNn2p079HYxhwMGElleUloEYUA9t8d6Q5eX1vFDCoxWLFhOslLCjkedCQH8R7kZ1xL-8gxJHzZ75ePqdy2x-1mptQiWriqq-_2CjOy6ikvUS2SQh3TdP4p2izYQJOHp13u8LpYFj1R1duSLO4FuTu-kw8Za7Fqz2oETZyGdH8TBvsiBVtVPK-qkmrRzvRb4f3oW3lUPE6W6Cmtlz43kfyiVZ7ZaprxsYzR6hLuFYJDLjZxGtAcaJsW_eqgc2qK-X_2OiuLQ)

Derek -- **[In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a donation to the Democratic National Committee.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvpOShxPWr9mFhJMw1S-wTtvhltHWfNwNtDIaYBJbNv2OiYGsvOb7Ojyb0iUS8Qi3TU9i6hTr-d30MSfIXNvMbr2VrroB7rcyVKrjq51s2Mjd_pf-jsqJchs2jen_nwvr5_0cLh1M6nsTsezRg41RGtgm4OsgjoFYqN0a1JqCkjQrEVe68xrBS4iL3VI9o0TWSzIxDZNH_o-Cm57lYIaRIY0KQ7K2G1crW0wAOanc0PTB4GKPDVFomqzTGI9mteYBlGb3_0hGjwCh0aoh74BjJIJPoKKN0XjjwldVsMZSsJQdhBXA8FvPM9Sqw1p68e7qeKP2Kxrf9380NUEGb-kFR9b_S1jRpmxky53OaXF0HCsysGrc1gFM9l3KCmz24egJY0y1nZib5FwUVXPViqCf_0/46v/5iXupJt3Q1K-knvhasWBxg/h0/h001.EvP39U_p8NDGGZsPPgeaQgkq1Z93AuUTbq3lPnorM2s)** Please give us a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important. Here is the truth: As you read this, Democrats running for the House, the Senate, and of course, Joe Biden are under constant attack from Republican campaigns and super PACs. Making matters more difficult, the Trump campaign just announced it raised more than $50 million since his conviction three days ago. This on top of the fact that Trump and the RNC outraised us in April. Taken together, it’s not great. We can't let that happen again. Not only is June a month where we report our fundraising numbers (again), but there is no organization better positioned to help Democrats who are vulnerable to increased Republican spending than the Democratic National Committee. If everyone getting this email donated $7 in response, we'd reach our fundraising goals before this deadline ends. But not everyone gives -- so we're relying on committed Democrats who know the stakes in this election to chip in what they can. So here's the part where we ask: [Can Joe Biden and Democrats everywhere count on you to contribute $7 to the DNC today? clean_body: Here is the truth: | | Derek -- Please give us a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important. Here is the truth: As you read this, Democrats running for the House, the Senate, and of course, Joe Biden are under constant attack from Republican campaigns and super PACs. Making matters more difficult, the Trump campaign just announced it raised more than $50 million since his conviction three days ago. This on top of the fact that Trump and the RNC outraised us in April. Taken together, it’s not great. We can't let that happen again. Not only is June a month where we report our fundraising numbers (again), but there is no organization better positioned to help Democrats who are vulnerable to increased Republican spending than the Democratic National Committee. If everyone getting this email donated $7 in response, we'd reach our fundraising goals before this deadline ends. But not everyone gives -- so we're relying on committed Democrats who know the stakes in this election to chip in what they can. So here's the part where we ask: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | ---|--- | | Thank you, The Democrats Text JOIN to 43367 Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . Cultural Marxism, communism, socialism, “equity” - the radical Left’s agenda goes by many names, but it’s all the same evil. The Democrats want to DESTROY meritocracy and replace it with their woke plans to give everyone a gold medal. But here’s the truth: meritocracy built this nation. It’s what got us to the moon and made us the greatest country on Earth. Now, the radical Left is pushing a radical transgender ideology, pitting kids against their parents and each other, and brainwashing the next generation into hating our country. **This is how communism takes root - and this election could be our last chance to stop it.** [**I****’****m running for U.S. Senate to SAVE our country, and I need your help. Will you pitch in now?**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=8345f531727947ba93256441402e4da2&_e=wtcdu11NmB3CHL6c-H0lW-WVR8cma0JmT8iN1AHFQAc4yCoDtnMyMfPuCtleIbyWqkJ3gcfOYiWCSWFbVBkgfyhHyJblTyihft8rV1MKzPBU3aFnWLF_-oMyLY708zBd6Ia63k1ImmI_XLtkjfPfOjwDb2xF4p85ODkKBkNH5XYbiljL0nbuMFwvVVYKLqvFPu6UDUrch2fwdmfG9hPxhCtqnt5TrHg2wpsGJnTyz7Du4RQAsQ0v5bKuo_gd2INjKZxH71jrZZF2nsjP6tp_rk5FMHE-RMjIVoSHhNOledxgYrTq53ZxbzXuRyfuU3oCvJMeozKx9qvUdW7gZGLdD24cwA2Sco4ZBVxhftAx8r6T2NNpKlyVq7R6yO6lgGlJ)

I understand the cost of communism, Peter. My family and I escaped Communist Vietnam in 1975 just days before Saigon fell. My father was on a kill list. If we didn’t get to America in time, I might not be alive today. This country gave me everything. I attended the best high school in America. I built a life for myself. **And I paid it back with 25 years of service in the Navy.** I fought in special operations in some of the most dangerous corners of the world. Once again, I saw the dangers of communism and socialism. _And I vowed I_ _’_ _d NEVER let America go down the same path._ [**Now, it****’****s time to spring into action to save American freedom before it****’****s too late. Friend, I am so grateful for the response this campaign has received so far, and I wanted to take a moment and send you a personal thank you.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86152849/476983755/476240567?refcode=em_fr_2024.06.02_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=10&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWRlYjQ3YzYtMjkyMS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lm7eXZjRAmvBU6HNYlN5X_rLhBr54_5UxmM_slEj9vk=) Friend, I am so grateful for the response this campaign has received so far, and I wanted to take a moment and send you a personal thank you. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86152850/476983771/476240567?refcode=em_fr_2024.06.02_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=5&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWRlYjQ3YzYtMjkyMS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lm7eXZjRAmvBU6HNYlN5X_rLhBr54_5UxmM_slEj9vk=) I know the road ahead until November will be a challenge, but I also know that with the help of supporters like you, we can cross that finish line and give this district the representation they deserve. With House control on the line, experts are calling this race a toss-up, and one of the most flippable seats in the country. It’s going to be close, and we have our work cut out for us. That’s why I’m asking personally: **[Will you chip in $5 or more today to help me flip this critical seat, and take back the House majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86152851/476983783/476240567?refcode=em_fr_2024.06.02_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=5&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWRlYjQ3YzYtMjkyMS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lm7eXZjRAmvBU6HNYlN5X_rLhBr54_5UxmM_slEj9vk=)** | [**CHIP IN $5 →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86152852/476983797/476240567?refcode=em_fr_2024.06.02_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=5&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWRlYjQ3YzYtMjkyMS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lm7eXZjRAmvBU6HNYlN5X_rLhBr54_5UxmM_slEj9vk=)

A campaign like this in a race this competitive is truly a team effort. Winning will take all of us, but together, I know we can bring it home.
Thank you so much for your support.
_Janelle_

name: John James
subject: Will you be my co-pilot?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan
body:
When I served as an Apache pilot in the U.S. Army, my co-pilots were everything to me.| | | Fellow Patriot, When I served as an Apache pilot in the U.S. Army, my co-pilots were _everything_ to me.

Neither of us could achieve our missions alone, and our unwavering trust in each other helped us get the job done and DEFEND America.

_I may be out of the pilot’s seat, but now, I need a co-pilot for our new mission: defending our values and keeping the American Dream alive for the next generation._

[**I’m asking you today: will you be my co-pilot on this new mission?**](http://links.jjforcongress.com/u/click?_t=f784024d18db4d2d88c26e9627b85cc7&_m=d7145ccc6606430e85fbae6c0bf8587b&_e=oIHz7yNdf5PJlmEu1sWppZqFFI2stwSs1xHqNrjYvuyutPvVnbwm874hOIZVsSS-DJ9xr_cKJk_aj3uayPyD33U5Dd53e8kAmvt_CtGZG9Ydo5vjAGzOYB9gLOFt54vo-C6L_CQymQKe-xJbHi1kuusbIhyqkrOk_XaAhbtDEzU4SOvA-Tibd0wIc3166jrQOl0PhQPEllwOJmMMcJu3DQp7KEIiAdAnrpTYD_MKSjQUCwUfvmwSyLU-afamuCDVRibJIwGIls8rJmfSIZ2eqKeXZnJeYomxPCpbWlVGzbIeT0KWSXTsmeiOZymHVNa37Zye9Z3BcDvw1aWW-U_8scLf-IgMbuCB8NAsSPmr-JE%3D)

clean_body: When I served as an Apache pilot in the U.S. Army, my co-pilots were everything to me.| | | Fellow Patriot, When I served as an Apache pilot in the U.S. Army, my co-pilots were everything to me. Neither of us could achieve our missions alone, and our unwavering trust in each other helped us get the job done and DEFEND America. I may be out of the pilot’s seat, but now, I need a co-pilot for our new mission: defending our values and keeping the American Dream alive for the next generation. Your Friend, John James | | Paid for by John James for Michigan Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by John James for Michigan Use of John James’ military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

name: Save Social Security via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: If Congress doesn't tax the rich, Social Security will be insolvent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, the Social
Security Board just released a report showing that if something drastic
doesn’t change, the program will need to CUT benefits to seniors by 2035.

The solution? Raise taxes on millionaires and billionaires. Our movement
and our progressive champions in Congress, like Pramila Jayapal, are ready
for this fight:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17921?t=1011&akid=6104%2E5885482%2EM5EuyU ][IMG]

Wealthy people pay LESS of a percentage of their income in Social Security
taxes than teachers, janitors, retail workers, and the vast majority of
working people because of ridiculous, unjust tax loopholes. Congress must
get rid of these tax loopholes to save Social Security!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17922?source=email-20240602&t=1012&akid=6104%2E5885482%2EM5EuyU ]Add your name: Tax the rich and fund Social Security! Millionaires and
billionaires must pay their fair share before it’s too late for our most
important social safety net programs.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17922?source=email-20240602&t=1013&akid=6104%2E5885482%2EM5EuyU ]ADD YOUR NAME

Social Security taxes are capped after someone earns around $160,000 per
year in income. That means the ultra-wealthy stop paying even if they make
millions a year. It’s a clear example of the tax code written for
millionaires and billionaires by politicians getting big campaign
donations from CEOs, corporations, and right-wing billionaires.

Republicans have been trying to cut Social Security for decades. And if
Congress does nothing, the GOP will get its way — just by being an
obstacle to changes that help working people and hurt their wealthy
donors.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17922?source=email-20240602&t=1014&akid=6104%2E5885482%2EM5EuyU ]Add your name: Tax the rich, save Social Security!

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution
