name: Adam Schiff
subject: Guilty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
|
---
Peter, a Manhattan jury found Trump guilty on all 34 felony counts of falsifying business records to cover up campaign finance violations during the 2016 election.

Twelve ordinary American citizens decided the legal fate of Donald Trump. Proving that nobody – not even a former President of the United States or (pretend) billionaire – is above the law.

And despite Trump’s efforts to distract, delay, and deny – justice arrived for Donald Trump all the same. And by a jury of his peers. My takeaway:

Our system of justice worked. Our rule of law withstood the immense pressure Trump brought to bear. Notwithstanding the enormous stresses on our democracy, the system is holding. And accountability matters.

[Winning the presidency may now be the only thing remaining between Trump and avoiding prison time — either in this prosecution or three others — and he has shown he will tear down the entire system of American democracy to protect himself and return to power. WE MUST NOT LET HIM. Thousands of Democrats are sending in contributions to hold Trump accountable at the ballot box. Make no mistake, this verdict will only increase Donald Trump’s attempts to discredit the justice system and tear down our democracy. His enablers in Congress will do the same.

**We need to call those efforts out for exactly what they are:**

_**A blind attempt to protect a now-convicted felon, and deeply immoral human being, in the headlong pursuit of power.**_

Because justice prevailed. Justice.

And it’s up to each of us to make sure the justice system continues to hold him accountable. In federal cases in Washington, D.C. and Florida and the state case in Georgia.

And in November, we MUST defeat Donald Trump at the ballot box. That will be the ultimate accountability and affirmation of our democracy. Thanks for standing up for the rule of law and the cherished legacy of our founders.

– Adam

Defeat Republicans

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: Troubling
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
->

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=9120089.3954.1.8ce060560c0befb82e70f916cde3ba1e )

<-

Team Sheehy,

We’ve got some troubling news to share.

I won’t sugarcoat this.

\*\*We are not raising enough money to win this race.\*\*

We can’t let money be the reason we lose. I am a conservative political outsider looking to shake up Washington and retire one of the Senate’s worst career politicians.

U.S. Senate campaigns are expensive. \*\*Campaigns like mine are costly. Between research, advertising, grassroots outreach, and campaign events, we will need tens of millions of dollars to win in November. ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=9120089.3955.1.9cb90d834b53436f24eebeeaee90ca92 )\*\*

\*\*Would you part with $5 right now for the future of our country?\*\* Because the future of our country is what’s at stake in this race.

->

\*\*CHIP IN $5→

\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=9120089.3956.1.91727a61d4eb55150c08d1c8e01fb5b5 )

<-

\*\*It’s moments like this when I need to know I can count on the support of my most steadfast supporters.\*\*

If I could win this race without sending a single letter, email, or text to my supporters, I would. But that is simply not the case in modern politics. It costs MILLIONS to win a U.S. Senate seat, and any amount of money you might consider donating to my campaign today will make a difference.

So, \*\*are you willing to help me defeat the most endangered Senate Democrat? ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=9120089.3957.1.2449ca8a583b035c0b8f98793be2887e )\*\*

Victory in this race will only come if everyone on my team - and every conservative on this email - gives all of the effort they have to give. My team and I know that. _ \*\*We’re working around the clock—seven days a week—to ensure we leave no stone unturned.\*\* _

For America's Future,

->

\*\*CHIP IN $5→

\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=9120089.3958.1.366bbf6a649d18633a4d47fdb5995d63 )

<-

Tim Sheehy

Former Navy SEAL

Republican for U.S. Senate

->

\*\*SEND IN THE SEAL

CHIP IN TODAY

\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=9120089.3959.1.45e6fe3a1c00e5f8f1abcb95e0b88c55 )

<-

->

\* \* \*

“

"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY — NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

name: Tina Smith
subject: Happy Pride Month!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Happy Pride Month, team! June is a month to celebrate and uplift our friends, family, and neighbors in the LGBTQ+ community. Although we’ve achieved some big wins for the LGBTQ+ community over the last few years, including the passage of the _Respect for Marriage Act,_ we still have a LOT of progress to make. Across the country, politicians are trying to rip away these rights and discriminate against the LGBTQ+ community. From legislation barring transgender youth from being who they are authentically to regulations on what books can be taught in schools, right-wing legislators are harshly targeting LGBTQ+ youth — who are often already facing discrimination and marginalization and should be uplifted, not harmed, by politicians. That’s why I am fiercely advocating for legislation to protect the rights and freedoms of the LGBTQ+ community, including the _Equality Act,_ which would prohibit discrimination based on sexual orientation and gender identity. [**As we kick off LGBTQ+ Pride Month, please add your name alongside mine in support of the _Equality Act_ and other efforts to protect the rights of the LGBTQ+ community.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86154744/476991098/-153498561?refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240602_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWRjYTk3ZC0zNzIxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F24Eu3OEeoD6DzDujISvkQRGPrkeGYYJaWtGr7aXdts=&emci=d0dca97d-3721-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=d1dca97d-3721-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=6227932) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86154745/476991099/-153498561?refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240602_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWRjYTk3ZC0zNzIxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F24Eu3OEeoD6DzDujISvkQRGPrkeGYYJaWtGr7aXdts=&emci=d0dca97d-3721-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=d1dca97d-3721-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=6227932)
---
Now more than ever, we need to speak out on behalf of the LGBTQ+ community and defend their right to love who they love and be who they are without hate or harm.

clean_body: | Happy Pride Month, team! June is a month to celebrate and uplift our friends, family, and neighbors in the LGBTQ+ community. Although we’ve achieved some big wins for the LGBTQ+ community over the last few years, including the passage of the Respect for Marriage Act, we still have a LOT of progress to make. Across the country, politicians are trying to rip away these rights and discriminate against the LGBTQ+ community. From legislation barring transgender youth from being who they are authentically to regulations on what books can be taught in schools, right-wing legislators are harshly targeting LGBTQ+ youth — who are often already facing discrimination and marginalization and should be uplifted, not harmed, by politicians. That’s why I am fiercely advocating for legislation to protect the rights and freedoms of the LGBTQ+ community, including the Equality Act, which would prohibit discrimination based on sexual orientation and gender identity. | Now more than ever, we need to speak out on behalf of the LGBTQ+ community and defend their right to love who they love and be who they are without hate or harm. Thank you for adding your name in support, Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

clean_body: June 4th | Friend, The Iowa Republican Primary is just DAYS away. On June 4 , Iowans will choose their Republican Nominees for the November General Election. It's no secret that past election cycles have been won by razor-thin margins. I won my first election by just 6 votes in 2020, and the way things are going, 2024 looks like it will be a dead heat as well. **We are going to need an even better turnout this cycle if we want to keep our district red, keep the House of Representatives, and turn this country around. It all starts on June 4. This election is a battle between everyday grassroots Americans and the wealthy and powerful who are trying to buy this seat from us. This is our chance to send a resounding message to the rest of the country that the people are still in charge! SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN TODAY: | Thank you! Mariannette Miller-Meeks Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress Miller-Meeks for Congress P.O. Box 33 Ottumwa, IA 52501 If you would like to send donation by mail,**

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: You deserve to know why
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1493%2E135344%2EPiQS1s)

It's June, so that means we're right around the corner from our important Federal Election Commission deadline: On June 30th, we have an "end-of-quarter" deadline closing our “Q2,” which is the second quarter of the election year.
This will be the last FEC fundraising deadline before the Republican National Convention, beginning on July 15, and before we learn who our Republican opponent will be ahead of the primary on August 6th. It’s also the first deadline since we launched our TV and digital ads.
So it's a biggie. The most important of the campaign to date.
I know campaigns say that a lot, and you deserve to know why it's so important -- especially since we're going to be sending a lot of emails about it. Let me show you a perfect embodiment of how these FEC deadlines translate into a report card on our campaign.
See this tweet from a Detroit News bureau chief?
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-june24.nyVfY7&refcode=em240603-1-sa&t=2&akid=1493%2E135344%2EPiQS1s)
It's from after the last quarterly FEC fundraising deadline reports were filed, after March 31st.
Everyone looks at them. The press, our opponents, and especially outside spending entities looking to see if we are vulnerable to attack as they decide where to allocate their resources.
For us, if we file a good report, maybe some of those super PACs decide to move on from our race. File a bad report, and all bets are off.
Add to that the fact that the fundraising goals we set for these FEC deadlines are not arbitrary. They are important benchmarks we have to meet in order to keep our ads on the air and continue reaching voters. They are what we need to raise in order to win.
So yes, this is the most important FEC fundraising deadline of the campaign so far. And yes, our April and May fundraising was less than we had hoped for. So we're really banking on a big month to catch up before we file our report. And we can't do that without people who care enough about the outcome of this race to make a difference. So please:
[**Can I ask you to use this link to make a contribution before our FEC fundraising deadline on June 30th? Our average online donation is around $30. Some give more. Others give less. But if we get lots and lots of donations of all amounts, we'll reach our goals.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-june24.nyVfY7&refcode=em240603-1-sa&t=3&akid=1493%2E135344%2EPiQS1s)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-june24.vxqhA1&amount=3&refcode=em240603-1-sa&t=22&akid=1493%2E135344%2EPiQS1s)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-june24.bF_B1o&refcode=em240603-1-sa&t=23&akid=1493%2E135344%2EPiQS1s)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-june24.nFCAUo&refcode=em240603-1-sa&t=24&akid=1493%2E135344%2EPiQS1s)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-june24.KtZUXe&refcode=em240603-1-sa&t=25&akid=1493%2E135344%2EPiQS1s)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-june24.pLxOQF&refcode=em240603-1-sa&t=26&akid=1493%2E135344%2EPiQS1s)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-june24.vxqhA1&refcode=em240603-1-sa&t=27&akid=1493%2E135344%2EPiQS1s)**
---
****
Thank you,
Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=1493%2E135344%2EPiQS1s).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=29&akid=1493%2E135344%2EPiQS1s)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.
